highlights.summary:
BGS Institute of Technology admission details will be updated at this place once the details are out. Students with a wish to get admission can go on the site and apply for the available programmes.

The COMEDK UGET 2026 registration process has started for BGS College of Engineering and Technology admission to the BE/BTech programme. The last date to register is Mar 16, 2026. Also, the COMEDK UGET exam 2026 will be held on May 9, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

faqs.question: What is the median salary trends witnessed during BGS Institute of Technology placements?
faqs.answer: As per NIRF report 2025, BTech median package recorded in 2024 and previous two years was 4 LPA, 3.85 LPA and 3.36 LPA. For M.Tech course, the median package in 2024 was 5 LPA whereas in 2023 and 2022, it was 5.25 LPA and 5.1 LPA.

faqs.question: What is the average package recorded during BGS Institute of Technology placements?
faqs.answer: BGS Institute of Technology average package data is not released. The median package recorded during BTech and M.Tech placements in 2024 was 4 LPA and 5 LPA. This data is as per Engineering NIRF report 2025.

college_info.intro: BGS Institute of Technology popular programmes are MBA & BTech. MBA students are given jobs in top organisations like TCS, Infosys, etc. The MBA programme at BGS Institute of Technology tries to teach students the application of the knowledge of Management theories & practices to solve various business problems. The flagship programmes available at the college are approved by AICTE. The students are given placement support & are given opportunities to be placed in top companies like Kotak, TCS, Cognizant, etc. Hence, it is one of the best colleges giving quality education to students. The below are details on the top programmes:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: BGS Institute of Technology gives PhD, UG, & PG programmes to students. These courses are available across the Engineering, Management, etc streams. At the undergraduate level (UG level) the available programme is BTech. The BTech course is availlable in 8 specialisations like Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Computer Science & Engineering, Information Science Engineering, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Robotics & AI, & Basic Science. The below are the available courses at BGS Institute of Technology:

faqs.answer: A:    The total tuition fee for undergraduate engineering course in Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning Engineering at BGSIT is approximately INR 8 lakh. But the total tuition fee for Robotics and Artificial Intelligence undergraduate engineering course is INR 4 lakh. There are other fee components that are a part of the course fee apart from the tuition fee. But it is possible to complete the Robotics & Artificial Intelligence Engineering at  BGSIT for approximately INR 5 Lacs excluding the hostel fee.
faqs.question: Can I do AI Engineering course at BGS IT under INR 5 lakh?

faqs.answer: A:    The total tuition fee for undergraduate engineering programs at BGSIT range from INR 4 Lacs to INR 10.4 lakh. The data for the average package offered for B.E. courses is not available. But the NIRF report shows that the median package is INR 4 LPA. This means that atleast 50% students would earn INR 4 Lacs in one year. So the ROI depends upon the particular course you are doing and on your individual performance.
faqs.question: What is the ROI for B.E. courses at BGSIT?

faqs.answer: A:    In BGS Institute of Technology, the undergraduate course in Mechanical Engineering has been allotted 30 seats while Civil Engineering has been allotted 60 seats. Among the core branches, Electronics & Communications Engineering has been given the highest seat allocation at 180 seats.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: BGSIT: The brand which eagerly waiting for branding.

review_content.Placements: 60% of students got placed. 9.5 LPA is the highest package. 1.8 LPA is the lowest package. All service-based companies like TCS, Infosys, Cognizant, Capgemini, IBM, Bosch, Wipro, Tech Mahindra, Accenture, HCL, Mphasis, and many startups come here. TCS recruited more number of candidates. 20% of students got placed.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college is good at infrastructure maintenance since the college is outside of the city. Free Wi-Fi access is there for students with moderate speed. Labs are there but not that well-equipped. All are basic only. The hostel facility is available for girls and boys separately.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Review of BGS Institute of Technology.

review_content.Placements: Placement statistics of our college show that the average salary package provided to the selected candidates on campus drive arranged by the college was 5.1 LPA. Our college also invites other college students to participate in the drive arranged by them. About 60% of students have a chance to get internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: A high level of security is available all over the campus. There is no chance for the happening of rule-breaking and other in-disciplinary activities. It collects affordable fees for placements, tuition fees, and transportation. It also has a spacious parking area to park a lot of two-wheelers and four-wheelers.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: I'm satisfied with faculty members and facilities of our college.

review_content.Placements: " In the MBA course, a decent number of students got successfully placed from our college. The average salary package varies from 4 LPA-7 LPA. Top recruiters in our college are from the management and consulting fields. Top roles offered are CRM, consultant, HR, recruiters, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: BGS Institute has a good infrastructure for MBA. Facilities in the college are good enough, including Wi-Fi, labs, library, canteen, hostel, sports, etc. Facilities are available for students. Hostel facilities are also good. The quality of food in hostel mess is good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure but bad placements.

review_content.Placements: Placements are not good as of now. Only two companies came to date and hired only girls. Accenture was our top recruiter, and that was also scheduled due to some technical issues. They are also hiring mostly girls in other colleges. The highest package was around 6 LPA, and the lowest was around 3 LPA. Some students got internships by their own skill in both big companies and start-ups. The top roles offered were junior developer, associate developer, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. Labs are facilitated with the latest PCs, have free college Wi-Fi, classrooms are good, and have projectors. The library is good with a variety of books and free Wi-Fi. The hostel facility is good, but the quality of food is bad sometimes. But the college canteen serves good food at an affordable price. Has good medical facilities as the medical college is next to us. Has all kinds of sports equipment and courts. And sports tournaments and championships will be conducted by both the university and students.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: College has really good management and infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: At the BGS institute of Technology, students were getting decent placements opportunities. Students were getting proper help and support from the placements cell. 4-6 LPA was the average package offered in our college. In this college, the top recruiting companies were Deloitte, TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Tech Mahindra, etc. Around 60% of the students get internship at this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: BGS Institute has a top infrastructure for the MBA course. The college has good-quality facilities for the students. The college has Wi-Fi, labs, a library, a canteen, and other necessary facilities for the students. The hostel facility was available for the students. Mess and canteen food was good to eat.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: The college is best suited for average students.

review_content.Placements: The college has a good track record of getting its students placed. The college is also doing great in providing internship opportunities to the students. The companies that come in are HERO group, TATA group and also top MNCs from across the country.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and the infrastructure provided to the students of BGS include all sorts of amenities available here such as a playground, and a library. The college also conducts a fest each year to make sure the students enjoy. The food quality in the mess is also good.

There are other fee components that are a part of the course fee apart from the tuition fee. faqs.answer: BSG Institute of Technology does not mention its fee refund policy explicitly on its website. But it is affiliated with Adichunchanagiri University. ACU is a UGC recognised university. Therefore, ACU follows UGC policy and norms of Government of Karnataka with regards to fee refund.
faqs.question: Q: What is the refund policy of BGS Institute of Technology?

faqs.answer: The fees range for courses offerred by the BGS Institute of Technology is around INR 116940 - INR 600000.
faqs.question: Q: What is the fees range for courses offerred by the BGS Institute of Technology?

faqs.answer: The basic BGS Institute of Technology eligibility requirement is that a student must have passed in 2nd PUC / 12th Std / Equivalent test with English as one of the Languages & obtained a min. of 45% marks in aggregate in the subjects like Physics & Maths. Along with the mainsubjects, the additional subjects inlcude Chemistry / Bio-Technology / Biology / Electronics / Computer. The college also accepts the entrance test scores for admission.

admission_overview.college_name: BGS Institute of Technology Admission 2026: Courses, Fees, Selection and Application

admission_overview.title: BGS College of Engineering and Technology Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: BGS Institute of Technology admissions 2026 are entrance-based. The college offers various courses to candidates at the UG, PG, and Doctorate levels. These include- BTech, MTech, PhD and MBA. BGS Institute of Technology accepts the scores of certain entrance exams for admission, such as KCET, GATE, etc.

eligibility_selection.title: BGS Institute of Technology Eligibility and Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: BGS Institute of Technology offers some courses at UG, PG, and Doctorate levels. They must ensure they fulfil the below eligibility and selection criteria before applying for admission to BGS Institute of Technology courses:-

courses_table.eligibility: Pass Class 12 with a minimum of 45% aggregate (40% for the reserved category) from a recognised board
Pass B.E./BTech from a recognised university
Pass Graduation from a recognised university

faqs.answer: BGS Institute of Technology is a good institution for B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialisation at BGS Institute of Technology are Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Information Technology, Computer Science Engineering, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning.
faqs.question: Are there any specializations offered by BGS Institute of Technology?

faqs.answer: BGS Institute of Technology COMEDK Round 2 cutoff for Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning is 71149 which is very close to this range. This was for the general category under All India quota. Unless the candidate belongs to some other category or domicile, one can not afford to score less than this. With this rank, there is a probability of getting admission however since, the cut offs keep changing from round to round, better ranks definitely increases your chances of getting admission in BGS Institute of Technology.BGS Institute of Technology offers admission across various specialisations of BTech through COMEDK scores followed by the counselling. In order to be eligible for admission, candidates must appear and match the round-wise and category- wise cutoff.
faqs.question: Can I get admission at BGS Institute of Technology in BTech if my rank is between 71000 and 72000?

faqs.answer: BGS Institute of Technology BTech cutoff 2023 for Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning was 71149 for EWS and 71149 for PWD category. While the admissions are based on the scores/rank obtained in COMEDK, the last cut offs also change a lot depending on All India quota or Home State. It also varies if the applicant is a female.BGS Institute of Technology offers admission across various specialisations of BTech through COMEDK scores followed by the counselling. In order to be eligible for admission, candidates must appear and match the round-wise and category- wise cutoff.
faqs.question: What is the cutoff for BTech at BGS Institute of Technology for EWS and PWD categories?

faqs.answer: The duration of undergraduate engineering programs at BSG Institute of Technology, ACU is 4 years. But the maximum duration to complete the BE programme is 8 years from the date of admission to BSGIT, ACU. If a student fails to complete the course in 8 years, he/she will have to discontinue it.
faqs.question: In how many years can I complete the BE programme at BSG Institute of Technology?

admission_process.title: BGS College of Engineering and Technology Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: BGS Institute of Technology admission processinvolves many steps. The college offers entrance-based admissions to candidates. Below is a breakdown ofIBGS Institute of Technologyadmission process:-
BGS Institute of Technology registration process is online. Candidates must fill the admission enquiry form on the official website of the college and also regoster for the required entrance exam.
BGS Institute of Technology grants or selects candidates for admission based on entrance exam scores. It accepts the scores of KCET, GATE, etc. for admission.
Selected candidates must pay the fees to confirm admission at the college.
Below are the details ofBGS Institute of Technology feesand seat for popular courses:-

faqs.question: What is the COMEDK UGET 2026 result date?
faqs.answer: The release date for COMEDK UGET 2026 result is 26th May 2026. Candidates who appear for the exam will be able to check their scorecard which will be available for download on the official website of COMEDK.

faqs.question: Will the KCET exam be held online?
faqs.answer: KCET is an accepted entrance exam for admisison in BE courses in BSG Institute of Technology. The KCET Exam will be held through theoffline mode.The question paper will be consist of MCQs. The total duration of the exam paper is 80 minutes. There is no negative marking in the question paper.

courses_data.name: BGS College of Engineering and Technology M.E./M.Tech Admission 2026
courses_data.description: BGS Institute of Technology offers the MTech course at the PG level for two years. Admission are entrance-based and scores of the GATE/ Karnataka PGCET exams are accepted.

faqs.question: How many entrance exam cutoffs will be released for admission to BTech at BGS Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: BGS Institute of Technology will release 2-3 rounds of COMEDK cutoffs for admission to BTech. The cutoffs will be released on a rolling basis, and the seats will be filled on a first-come, first-served basis. The cutoffs will be based on the following factors:The COMEDK score of the candidateThe category of the candidateThe number of seats available in the courseCandidates must visit the official website of entrance exam to read clear instructions on how to proceed with the counselling process, once the round is released.

faqs.question: What is the cutoff for BTech at BGS Institute of Technology for OBC category?
faqs.answer: BGS Institute of Technology BTech cutoff 2023 for Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning was 71149 for OBC category. While the admissions are based on the scores/rank obtained in COMEDK, the last cut offs also change a lot depending on All India quota or Home State. It also varies if the applicant is a female.BGS Institute of Technology offers admission across various specialisations of BTech through COMEDK scores followed by the counselling. In order to be eligible for admission, candidates must appear and match the round-wise and category- wise cutoff.

faqs.question: What are the documents required for COMEDK UGET registration?
faqs.answer: For the COMEDK UGET registration, applicants have to upload the following  documents in the COMEDK application form as per the specifications mentioned in the notification:Photograph of candidateSignature of candidateUnique Id Proof of CandidateSSLC/10th Marks Card of CandidateSignature of ParentUnique Id Proof of ParentST/SC/OBC certificate (Issued by Tahsildar)Karnataka Domicile CertificateKKR Certificate (Issued by Assistant Commissioner of corresponding district)

faqs.question: When will the KCET counselling be held?
faqs.answer: The KCET counselling procedure will be held after the release of KCET results for the selected applicants through theonline mode. KCET counselling process for 2026 will be held from the2ndweek of September.

average_package.title: BGS Institute of Technology Average Package 2025

faqs.question: What is the average package recorded during BGS Institute of Technology placements?
faqs.answer: BGS Institute of Technology average package data is not released. The median package recorded during BTech and M.Tech placements in 2024 was 4 LPA and 5 LPA. This data is as per Engineering NIRF report 2025.

faqs.question: What is the median salary trends witnessed during BGS Institute of Technology placements?
faqs.answer: As per NIRF report 2025, BTech median package recorded in 2024 and previous two years was 4 LPA, 3.85 LPA and 3.36 LPA. For M.Tech course, the median package in 2024 was 5 LPA whereas in 2023 and 2022, it was 5.25 LPA and 5.1 LPA.

faqs.question: Which companies offer campus placements at BGSIT?
faqs.answer: BGSIT, ACU associates with many recruitment partners to facilitate campus placements for its students. Some of the companies that offer campus placements at BGSIT, ACU are HP, L&T Infotech, TCS, Accenture, ICICI Bank, Cognizant, Kotak Mahindra Bank, and Capegemini.

faqs.question: What is the KCET application fee?
faqs.answer: Applicants have to pay the KCET application fee to complete KCET registration. The application fee for KCET 2026 varies according to the category of candidates. Applicants can check the KCET application fee for various categories below: 1. GM, 2A, 2B, 3A, 3B category students of Karnataka: INR 500 2. SC, ST, CAT-1 category students of Karnataka: INR 250 3. Karnataka Females: INR 250 4. Students from Outside Karnataka (GM): INR 750 5. Students from Outside India (GM): INR 5000

cut_off.college_name: BGS Institute of Technology Cutoff 2025: Check Karnataka PGCET Round Wise Cutoff Ranks

description: BGS Institute of Technology cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to several UG & PG courses. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the course, exam, round and category-wise cutoff details. Further exam-related updates are below:

BGS Institute of Technology Karnataka PGCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. For admission to the MBA/PGDM course, the last round cutoff rank was 30855 in the General AI category.

Karnataka PGCET is the accepting exam for MBA/PGDM admission at BGS Institute of Technology. In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA/PGDM admission was 30855 in the General category under the AI quota. In 2024, the cutoff rank for the same course was 19150, while in 2023, it was 14289.
For more categories, rounds, and quotas, candidates can use the provided filters to view the cutoffs.
Candidates preparing for 2026 admission can refer to the table below to view some of the important dates related to Karnataka PGCET 2026.

BGS Institute of Technology accepts Karnataka PGCET entrance exam scores for admission to the MBA/PGDM courses. Candidates can refer to the table below to check out the consolidated year-wise Karnataka PGCET cutoff lists.

As per the KCET last-round cutoff 2025 for B.E. / B.Tech admission, B.Tech in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science has the lowest cutoff rank of 39040 for the General AI quota. The lower cutoff rank indicates strong competition for admission.
For other categories, rounds and quotas, use the filter options below:
According to the BGS Institute of Technology B.E. / B.Tech Cutoff 2025, the closing rank for B.Tech in Computer Science and Design stood at 70313 among the students belonging to the General AI quota.

For the HS quota, the cutoff rank for the same specialisation was 83726. Comparing both the quotas, the last round cutoff rank for General AI category students was more competitive for admission than the HS quota students.

hostel_campus.college_name: BGS Institute of Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Separate hostel facility is available boys and girls with a capacity of 400 and 350 respectively. Each student is provided with an almirah, cot, table and chair as well as english and hindi newspapers. The students are also provided with 24 hrs telephone and Internet facility. The hostels are guarded by 24 hrs security guard.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Tennis Court, Volley Ball

hostel.description: Separate hostel facility is available boys and girls with a capacity of 400 and 350 respectively. Each student is provided with an almirah, cot, table and chair as well as english and hindi newspapers. The students are also provided with 24 hrs telephone and Internet facility. The hostels are guarded by 24 hrs security guard.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Tennis Court, Volley Ball

labs.description: Available Facilities: Civil Engineering Lab, Computer Lab, Electronics Lab, Mechanical Lab

reviews.review_heading: BGSIT: The brand which eagerly waiting for branding.
reviews.review_text: The college is good at infrastructure maintenance since the college is outside of the city. Free Wi-Fi access is there for students with moderate speed. Labs are there but not that well-equipped. All are basic only. The hostel facility is available for girls and boys separately.

reviews.review_heading: Review of BGS Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: A high level of security is available all over the campus. There is no chance for the happening of rule-breaking and other in-disciplinary activities. It collects affordable fees for placements, tuition fees, and transportation. It also has a spacious parking area to park a lot of two-wheelers and four-wheelers.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with faculty members and facilities of our college.
reviews.review_text: BGS Institute has a good infrastructure for MBA. Facilities in the college are good enough, including Wi-Fi, labs, library, canteen, hostel, sports, etc. Facilities are available for students. Hostel facilities are also good. The quality of food in hostel mess is good.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure but bad placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. Labs are facilitated with the latest PCs, have free college Wi-Fi, classrooms are good, and have projectors. The library is good with a variety of books and free Wi-Fi. The hostel facility is good, but the quality of food is bad sometimes. But the college canteen serves good food at an affordable price. Has good medical facilities as the medical college is next to us. Has all kinds of sports equipment and courts. And sports tournaments and championships will be conduc...

reviews.review_heading: College has really good management and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: BGS Institute has a top infrastructure for the MBA course. The college has good-quality facilities for the students. The college has Wi-Fi, labs, a library, a canteen, and other necessary facilities for the students. The hostel facility was available for the students. Mess and canteen food was good to eat.

reviews.review_heading: The college is best suited for average students.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and the infrastructure provided to the students of BGS include all sorts of amenities available here such as a playground, and a library. The college also conducts a fest each year to make sure the students enjoy. The food quality in the mess is also good.

reviews.review_heading: I would recommend students to join this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not well maintained. Sports are conducted on our campus. Mess is not good. Canteen is also not good for breakfast and it is good for lunch. Laboratory is very good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good campus and we are well placed.
reviews.review_text: We have a good library, labs, a well-furnished campus, and a large playground. We have a good mess and canteen facilities with good and healthy food.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good placements but the facilities and faculty are average.
reviews.review_text: Our college has spacious classrooms, labs, and a wide library. Labs are supported with an internet connection. There is a sports ground and a gym. Certain medical facilities are provided. The food is average when left to your taste. You can spend quality time in the gym.

reviews.review_heading: Placements are now increasing and the intake of students has also increased.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good and includes a playground consisting of a basketball court, volleyball court, shuttle badminton court, etc. The library is also good and has a spacious reading hall. The hostel is not very good when compared to other colleges. The facilities in the hostel are not very good.

reviews.review_heading: BGS Institute of Technology is a very good college.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are very good and clean and we can easily hear and analyse the lessons that faculty members teach. The college campus is also very good and beautiful. The campus is very peaceful to sit in.  Overall, it is a very good college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of BGS Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is excellent, which looks like a palace. Top infrastructure is provided by our college. Our college has good speed Wi-Fi, but the library doesn't have books. The boys' hostel is situated inside the campus, and the girls' hostel is outside the campus. The hostel has the best food and canteen.

reviews.review_heading: B.G.S Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are very good. The campus is huge. Lab facilities are very good. The non-teaching staff are rude to the students. Apart from that, everything else is good. The principal is also very friendly.

reviews.review_heading: The college is simply brilliant as it has good infrastructure and peaceful environment.
reviews.review_text: It has a big 4 floored main block and many sub block buildings for individual branches it has a teaching block also for regular classes ! It has good labs and facilities that help us get direct and live knowledge of the machine or a system or a software.

reviews.review_heading: I'm lucky to be graduated from this college.
reviews.review_text: Good Wi-Fi, infrastructure, smart class facility are provided. And recently it has became a Autonomous colluge. And well furnished and Healthy environment campus. Separate Departmental wise Seminar halls and Placement cell, and 400 meters big ground for sports.

college_info.college_name: BGS Institute of Technology

data.description: BGS Institute of Technology provides hostel rooms to its students on a sharing basis. The rooms are provided with basic furniture like cot, table and chair. The hostel fee may be charged separate from the tuition fee. Late night entry, leaving hostel without permission, smoking & drinking is not allowed in the BGSIT hostel.

college_info.intro:
Courses offered by Amrapali University include BTech, BHM, BHMCT, BTTM, BCom, BBA, BPharm, BEd, BSc, MTech, MCA, Master of Hotel Management and Catering Technology (MHMCT), MBA, MCom, MPharm, MEd, DPharm, Diploma in Hospitality Operations (DHO), and PhD in various specialisations. These courses are offered through 9 departments. Also, for admissions to these courses, candidates should fulfil the eligibility criteria. Below are the details regarding Amrapali University's popular programmes:
Check out the below video for more information:

placements.overview: As per the data available on the official website, the institute has released the list of students placed in the Faculty of Technology & Computer Applications and the Faculty of Hospitality Management during Amrapali University placements 2024. Moreover, the participating recruiters offered over 700 job offers to the students of the batch 2023. Furthermore, the major highlights of Amrapali University placements 2022 are listed below:

student_insights.feedback: Offered in the final year only
Higher in core jobs
Majority opted in India
Students are expected to reach out to companies themselves
Organized & proactive placement process
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved
Love being in college

faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters of Amrapali University Haldwani?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, a BBA degree from Amrapali University makes students eligible for various jobs in government departments and organisations (both Central and State). There are many such jobs in government organisations that require skills learned during a BBA course. faqs.answer: A:    Many students have reviewed the BPharma course offered by Amrapali University on Shiksha's student review page. As per the reviews,  80% of BPharma students were placed during the recent placement drive. Other than this, the the highest and average salaries bagged by students stood at INR 5 LPA and INR 2 LPA, respectively.Note: The data presented has been taken from student reviews. Thus, it is subject to change.
faqs.question: How are BPharma placements Amrapali University?

faqs.answer: A:    As per the student reviews present on Shiksha, around 70%-80% of DPharma students were placed during Amrapali University placements. Other than this, as per the reviews, the average salary offered to students ranged from INR 20,000 to INR 30,000 per month.Note: The data presented has been taken from student reviews. Thus, is subject to change.
faqs.question: How are the Amrapali University DPharma placements?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Amrapali University offers various courses at the UG, PG, Doctoral and diploma levels. These include- BBA, BTech, BSc, MTech, MCA, etc. All these are offered in various specialisations.

faqs.answer: A:    1)The minimum eligibility criteria for admission to Amrapali Group of Institutes (AGI)  is 45% marks in 10+2 with Maths.2)For admission to the MBA programme at Amrapali Institute in Haldwani, the minimum eligibility is 45% aggregate in class 12 with Mathematics.  3) It offers undergraduate, postgraduate, and Diploma programs in Engineering, Management, and Computer Applications.  4) Admissions are based on merit, i.e., the last qualifying examination as per AICTE, UGC, Affiliating universities, affiliating board, PCI, NTE as per the state government guidelines. 5) Candidates who are in the final year of the class 12th exam can apply for the UG course.
faqs.question: Can I get into Amrapali University MBA with 70% in class 12th?

faqs.answer: A:    The Amrapali Group of Institutes is a private college. As The Amrapali Institute of Hotel Management, Haldwani Ranking 56 out of 75 in India 2023 and 56 out of 67 in India 2021 whivh was 2nd in Uttarakhand .The Amprapali Group Of Institute is a private, autonomous institution that is connected to Uttarakhand Technical University. And the Infrastructure is also very good of this Institute also the Faculities of the institute is good at their work. So their fees structure and tution fees are higher than some other private colleges.
faqs.question: How costly is Amrapali Group of Institutes?

faqs.answer: A:    Amrapali University Haldwani charges a hostel fee from students who wish to live in hostels. For a two-year course duration, the total hostel fees amount to INR 1.3 lakh. Other than this, students enrolled in the course are also required to pay a tuition fees.Note: The above-mentioned fee is as per the official sources. However, it is indicative and subject to change.
faqs.question: How much is the Amrapali University Haldwani hostel fees for MBA students?

faqs.answer: A:    Amrapali University Haldwani charges a hostel fee from students who wish to live in hostels. For a four-year course duration, the total hostel fees amount to INR 2.25 lakh. Other than this, students enrolled in the course are also required to pay a tuition fees.Note: The above-mentioned fee is as per the official sources. However, it is indicative and subject to change.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Amrapali University.

review_content.Placements: Students have another field degree, but the placement cell warns that if you are not given an interview by these companies, we will not permit to attend your field placement interview. That's why only 30% of students got placed in that field and 70% of students got placed from another field. The highest package is 6 LPA and the lowest is 1.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies visit our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are well-structured and labs are well-facilitated. Library is also good all book are available in it. In hostel many events are organized by students and warden. Hostel mess and canteen are okay means food is not good in mess.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Amrapali University, Haldwani.

review_content.Placements: The lowest package in our course is 2 LPA, and the highest package offered is 6 LPA. Many reputed companies recruit for our course. Almost all students get internships through our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are very good. The college provides Wi-Fi. Classrooms are neat and clean. The college infrastructure is also very good. The hostel buildings are well-maintained. The quality of food in the mess and canteens is also good.
review_content.Faculty: Our teachers are well-qualified, helpful, and knowledgeable. The teaching quality is very good. Semester exams in our college are not difficult. Teachers are very supportive. Their nature is good. Our course curriculum is also very good.

review_summary.college_name: Amrapali University Haldwani Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of Amrapali University Haldwani.

content.Placements: The lowest package offered in our course is 2 LPA. The highest package offered in our course is 7 LPA. The average package offered in our course is 3-4 LPA. Almost all students can't intern from our course. Top recruiting companies for our course are Cipla, Mankind, etc.
content.Infrastructure: There are so many facilities provide by our college for our course are hostels Wi-Fi, labs, classroom, library, etc. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen are very good Our college also provides medical facilities Our college regularly organise sports and games and competitions.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good academic with supportive faculty and decent infrastructure.

content.Placements: Around 75% of students are placed. The lowest package is 2.5, and the highest is 12 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Tech Mahindra, Wipro, Oracle, IBM, and Tata Motors. Around 70% of students got internships. Top roles are software engineer, data scientist, data analyst, and web developer.
content.Infrastructure: We have all the facilities and the best infrastructure. I can not tell about the hostel infrastructure, because I used to go from my home. In our college, there are many events for sports and games, but I do not know about the medical facilities because we have not faced any situation.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of Amrapali University.

content.Placements: Students have another field degree, but the placement cell warns that if you are not given an interview by these companies, we will not permit to attend your field placement interview. That's why only 30% of students got placed in that field and 70% of students got placed from another field. The highest package is 6 LPA and the lowest is 1.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies visit our college.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are well-structured and labs are well-facilitated. Library is also good all book are available in it. In hostel many events are organized by students and warden. Hostel mess and canteen are okay means food is not good in mess.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of Amrapali University, Haldwani.

content.Placements: The lowest package in our course is 2 LPA, and the highest package offered is 6 LPA. Many reputed companies recruit for our course. Almost all students get internships through our college.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are very good. The college provides Wi-Fi. Classrooms are neat and clean. The college infrastructure is also very good. The hostel buildings are well-maintained. The quality of food in the mess and canteens is also good.
content.Faculty: Our teachers are well-qualified, helpful, and knowledgeable. The teaching quality is very good. Semester exams in our college are not difficult. Teachers are very supportive. Their nature is good. Our course curriculum is also very good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college for students.

content.Placements: 80 percent of students get placed with the highest package of 5 LPA. The lowest package is 2.5 LPA. Some of the recruiting companies are GS Pharma, and companies from outside of India also recruit students. The internship percentage is 100 percent in the third year, sixth semester. Students get into the universe city in industries.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure of the department are good. There are Wi-Fi connections, several labs for separate subjects, and smart classrooms. Some facilities are provided in hostels, such as Wi-Fi connections, a playing area, a study area, and clothing sections. Many sports and games are played by students in the evening.

admission_overview.college_name: Amrapali University Haldwani Admission 2025: Courses, Dates, Fee, Eligibility, Application

admission_process.title: Amrapali University Haldwani Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Amrapali University Haldwani admissionis strictly based on the eligibility criteria of the courses, which are defined by AICTE, UGC, and Affiliating Universities. The Amrapali University is a private University approved by AICTE. It offers full-time undergraduate and postgraduate programmes in engineering, hotel management, applied sciences, and management. The application process for Amrapali University courses admission is conducted online on the official website of the University. Candidates must meet the eligibility criteria before applying for admission toAmrapali University.
The various courses offered by the Institutes are affiliated with Uttarakhand Technical University, Kumaun University, Uttarakhand Open University and Uttarakhand Board of Technical Education.

Amrapali University offers admission to various UG and PG courses. The duration of UG courses is three years and PG courses are two years. AU Haldwani also offers Diploma courses as well. The eligibility criterion for all UG is Class 12th from any of the recognized boards and eligibility percentage with age set by authorities of AU Haldwani. A quick overview of theAmrapali University Haldwani courses and feesalong with their selection criteria is tabulated below:
Eligibility Criteria

Read More:Amrapali Group of Institutes e-brochure

The Amrapali University admission process consists of multiple steps that include the release of application forms followed by the shortlisting of candidates based on merit secured in the qualifying exam. The selection criteria for all Amrapali University courses is merit-based. Interested candidates can check the below steps for the Amrapali University admission process:
Step 1: Amrapali University Application Process
Candidates who meet their desired course's eligibility criteria must fill out the application form before the deadline. The forms are made available on the AU official website.
Step 2: Amrapali University Selection Rounds
The University shortlists candidates based on the merit secured in the qualifying exam. After shortlisting candidates, the University releases a merit list on the official website.
Step 3: Amrapali University Final Admission
Selected candidates are required to pay the admission fee and appear for the document verification process.
Check out more details about the Amrapali Group of Institutes in the below video:

faqs.answer: Amrapali University Haldwani offers a total of 60 seats for the MBA programme. The distribution of seats among various MBA specialisations may vary, depending on the university's specific allocation for each specialisation. To get a seat, students must register and appear for one of the government-approved entrance exams. After that, they must fill out an application form available on the official website of the university.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for admission to MBA at Amrapali University Haldwani?
faqs.answer: The admission process for Amrapali University Haldwani MBA begins with the eligibility check. As per official sources, to be eligible for the course, a candidate must have completed a UG degree in any discipline with a minimum of 50% marks (45% for the reserve category) or equivalent CGPA score in any discipline from any recognised university or institution. Students who meet these requirements are eligible to apply for a preferred MBA course.

paragraphs: What's new regarding Amrapali University placements 2024? As per the data available on the official website, the institute has released the list of students placed in the Faculty of Technology & Computer Applications and the Faculty of Hospitality Management during Amrapali University placements 2024. Earlier, the participating recruiters offered over 700 job offers to the students of the batch 2023.

In 2022, a total of 304 students were placed in the Faculty of Hospitality Management . The number of students placed in the Faculty of Technology & Computer Applications stood at 96 . Popular recruiters participated include The Oberoi, The Ritz Carlton, The Trident , etc.
The key highlights related to Amrapali University placements 2022 are listed below:
No. of Students placed
Faculty of Hospitality Management: 304
Faculty of Technology & Computer Applications: 96

The Oberoi, The Ritz Carlton, The Trident

The number of students placed in Faculty of Hospitality Management in 2022 was six times more than the count stood in 2021. Further, 96 students placed in Faculty of Technology & Computer Applications in 2022 and no students placed in 2021. college_info.college_name: Amrapali University Haldwani Scholarship Details

paragraphs: The Amrapali Group of Institutes is a private college. As The Amrapali Institute of Hotel Management, Haldwani Ranking 56 out of 75 in India 2023 and 56 out of 67 in India 2021 whivh was 2nd in Uttarakhand .The Amprapali Group Of Institute is a private, autonomous institution that is connected to Uttarakhand Technical University. And the Infrastructure is also very good of this Institute also the Faculities of the institute is good at their work. So their fees structure and tution fees are higher than some other private colleges.
Amrapali University provides various need and merit-based scholarships. The scholarships offered by the university are mentioned below:
Merit Scholarship (Both for UG & PG)
Scholarship for Martyrs, Home Guard, Police, Para Police, Fire Police, Defense forces, Para military dependents (Both Serving & Retired)
Family Scholarship for Amrapali University Staff
Loyalty Scholarship
AU Scholarship for Female Students
Alumni Scholarship
Sibling Scholarship

Amrapali University Haldwani charges a hostel fee from students who wish to live in hostels. For a four-year course duration, the total hostel fees amount to INR 2.25 lakh. Other than this, students enrolled in the course are also required to pay a tuition fees.
Note: The above-mentioned fee is as per the official sources. However, it is indicative and subject to change.

Major specialisation at PES Institute of Technology and Management (PESITM) are Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Information Technology, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering.
faqs.question: Are there any specializations offered by PES Institute of Technology and Management (PESITM)?

faqs.answer: A:    PES Institute Of Technology admission to the BE/ BTech courses are based on candidates' performance in the COMEDK entranc exams. Based on the Round 3 of the COMEDK 2024 cutoff, B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering was the most in-demand course with a closing rank of 82808 to get admission at. The Round 1 closing rank of the same course was 18923 for the General AI quota. So, candidates belonging to General AI quota must aim to secure over and above the cutoff ranks mentioned here to get CSE admission at PES Institute Of Technology. Candidates can check out the table below to get an idea of the COMEDK round-wise cutoff ranks for CSE programme: RoundCOMEDK CSE Closing Rank118923262711382808

faqs.answer: The consortium of Medical, Engineering, and Dental Colleges of Karnataka conducts three rounds of COMEDK UGET counselling for admission to the BE/ BTech courses. The Round 1 of the Seat Allotment is out for different categories, including General, OBC, SC, ST, EWS and PWD. COMEDK Round 1 cutoff is being held for both general merit and Hyderabad Karnataka region candidates. However, round 2 will be conducted for Hyderabad Karnataka region students only. COMEDK counselling round 3 will be conducted for general merit candidates. For more details, click here.
faqs.question: Q: What is the schedule for COMEDK Counselling 2025?

faqs.answer: Candidates seeking admission to BTech course through COMEDK 2024 scores must follow the below-mentioned steps to register for COMEDK Counselling 2024: Step 1: Visit the official website of COMEDK at comedk.org. Step 2: Login to Applicant Login ID using the application number and password.Step 3: On the next page, click on the 'Counselling Registration' TabStep 4: Verify the mentioned details and pay the registration fee to participate in COMEDK Counselling 2023Step 5: On the successful payment message, close the tab and go back to your application form.Step 6: Click on the ‘Document Upload' Tab and upload all the required documents. Step 7: Frequently check the application form and email to keep a track of the verification status of uploaded document.

review_summary.college_name: PES Shimoga Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I enjoyed my time at PESITM with supportive teachers, good labs, and a friendly campus life.

content.Placements: In our CSE batch at PESITM Shivamogga, around 65-75% of students got placed. The highest package was around 8-10 LPA, the average package was about 4-5 LPA, and the lowest was around 2.5-3 LPA. Many students also got internships at companies like TCS, Infosys, and Edgevere. Common roles included Software Developer and Web Developer. I found the placement training sessions very helpful for interviews.
content.Infrastructure: The CSE branch labs are well-equipped with computers and software, classrooms are clean and spacious, and the library has enough books and digital resources. Hostel facilities are decent with regular cleaning, water, and security. The food court is average, but the pes refreshment offers better options. Sports facilities like the gym, cricket stadium, volleyball and indoor games help students stay active.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: PESITM with pros and cons

content.Placements: 80 percent of students are placed in the course. The highest is 6 LPA, the lowest is 2 LPA, and the average package is 3 LPA. Wipro, Infosys, TCS, Betsol, and service-based companies hired students from Artificial Intelligence, Computer Science, Information Science, Mechanical Engineering, Electronics Engineering, and Electrical Engineering.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are available for the course. Except Wi-Fi is not available for students, It is only used by college staff, which is a disadvantage for us. UPS is not available. Classrooms are good, labs had equipment, library is good. The quality of facilities in the hostel is good. Mess food is available, but it is not very good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: All about the PESITM Shimoga.

content.Placements: Placements are very good. The average package offered is 4LPA, the lowest package offered is 3LPA, and the highest package offered is 8LPA. It is average placement campus. The top roles offered are the manager post, and about 90% of students get placements. Top recruiting companies are SAB and Apple.
content.Infrastructure: A separate hostel for boys and also sharing rooms are available. Girls hostel is also nearer to it, and there is no matter of ragging and all. Wi-Fi is available on campus, and classrooms are also well maintained. A new building is under construction.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It has good core placements, industrial visits, sports, and campus activities.

content.Placements: 71% of students get placed in the year 2025. 92 students from the final year have already been placed in various companies with the highest package of 5 LPA. Among them, 71 students have been placed in core companies providing internships for 1 year with a stipend of Rs. 20,000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has good labs, a huge library, and a separate department library. Food is normal. There are sports grounds for games like cricket, football, and basketball. In the cricket ground, we organise VTU games. Every year, VTU organises many sports events, and in that, our college will get many prizes. individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Better results and good placement.

content.Placements: In our branch, most of all placed in placements. The highest package is 8 LPA, and the lowest is 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Infosys, and Edgeverve. We have attended other startup companies and moderate companies also. We have good communication with CDC, and they are helping with placements.

The quality of food is good. Wi-Fi and purified water facilities are also there. Security person and sweepers are also there for cleaning and security purposes.

faqs.question: What is the schedule for COMEDK Counselling 2025?
faqs.answer: The consortium of Medical, Engineering, and Dental Colleges of Karnataka conducts three rounds ofCOMEDK UGETcounselling for admission to the BE/ BTech courses. The Round 1 of the Seat Allotment is out for different categories, including General, OBC, SC, ST, EWS and PWD. COMEDK Round 1 cutoff is being held for both general merit and Hyderabad Karnataka region candidates. However, round 2 will be conducted for Hyderabad Karnataka region students only. COMEDK counselling round 3 will be conducted for general merit candidates. For more details,click here.

faqs.question: What is the process to register for COMEDK Counselling?
faqs.answer: Candidates seeking admission to BTech course through COMEDK 2024 scores must follow the below-mentioned steps to register for COMEDK Counselling 2024:Step 1: Visit the official website of COMEDK at comedk.org.Step 2: Login to Applicant Login ID using the application number and password.Step 3:  On the next page, click on the 'Counselling Registration' TabStep 4: Verify the mentioned details and pay the registration fee to participate in COMEDK Counselling 2023Step 5: On the successful payment message, close the tab and go back to your application form.Step 6: Click on the ‘Document Upload' Tab and upload all the required documents.Step 7: Frequently check the application form and email to keep a track of the verification status of uploaded document.

faqs.question: How much rank should I score to get CSE at PES Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: PES Institute Of Technology admission to the BE/ BTech courses are based on candidates' performance in the COMEDK entranc exams. Based on the Round 3 of the COMEDK 2024 cutoff,B.E. in Computer Science and Engineeringwas the most in-demand course with a closing rank of82808to get admission at. The Round 1 closing rank of the same course was18923for the General AI quota. So, candidates belonging to General AI quota must aim to secure over and above the cutoff ranks mentioned here to get CSE admission at PES Institute Of Technology.Candidates can check out the table below to get an idea of the COMEDK round-wise cutoff ranks for CSE programme:RoundCOMEDK CSE Closing Rank118923262711382808

faqs.answer: The overall seats available across all courses offered by PES Institute of Technology and Management (PESITM) is up to 768. Good thing to know is that PES Institute of Technology and Management (PESITM) has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like AICTE.

For admission to the MBA/PGDM course, the last round cutoff rank was 26042 in the General AI category. For the HS quota, the last round cutoff for the same course stood at 8770 in the General category. Comparing both the quotas, it is clear that the cutoff rank was less competitive for admission to the General AI category students as compared to the HS quota.

hostel_campus.college_name: PES Shimoga Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: I enjoyed my time at PESITM with supportive teachers, good labs, and a friendly campus life.
reviews.review_text: The CSE branch labs are well-equipped with computers and software, classrooms are clean and spacious, and the library has enough books and digital resources. Hostel facilities are decent with regular cleaning, water, and security. The food court is average, but the pes refreshment offers better options. Sports facilities like the gym, cricket stadium, volleyball and indoor games help students stay active.

reviews.review_heading: PESITM with pros and cons
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are available for the course. Except Wi-Fi is not available for students, It is only used by college staff, which is a disadvantage for us. UPS is not available. Classrooms are good, labs had equipment, library is good. The quality of facilities in the hostel is good. Mess food is available, but it is not very good.

reviews.review_heading: All about the PESITM Shimoga.
reviews.review_text: A separate hostel for boys and also sharing rooms are available. Girls hostel is also nearer to it, and there is no matter of ragging and all. Wi-Fi is available on campus, and classrooms are also well maintained. A new building is under construction.

reviews.review_heading: It has good core placements, industrial visits, sports, and campus activities.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good labs, a huge library, and a separate department library. Food is normal. There are sports grounds for games like cricket, football, and basketball. In the cricket ground, we organise VTU games. Every year, VTU organises many sports events, and in that, our college will get many prizes. Our college students also participate in hackathons in coding at all over Karnataka state engineering colleges.

reviews.review_heading: Better results and good placement.
reviews.review_text: In our department, all facilities are available like Wi-Fi, library, classrooms, and labs. Hostel is also good but we have to adjust to that environment. The quality of food is good. Wi-Fi and purified water facilities are also there. Security person and sweepers are also there for cleaning and security purposes.

reviews.review_heading: Review of PES Institute of Technology and Management (PESITM).
reviews.review_text: The college has a good infrastructure and facilities but coming to the hostel the food quality is poor. Many times we got insects in price, so with hostel food there should be much improvement. Wi-Fi, labs, library are available and can be used effectively.

reviews.review_heading: My college life with good and bad memories.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. All facilities are available, like Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, projectors, labs, and a library with good books. There are strict timings, and we go for an outing on the college bus. Volleyball ball, basketball, and cricket are the main sports in college. The canteen is good and they recently opened a bakery.

reviews.review_heading: My college days in PESITM.
reviews.review_text: Lab facilities are provided to work Wi-Fi facilities are provided for project purposes and classrooms are very clean and well-maintained.  Good library facilities are provided with many varieties of books. The hostel food is not very good, but the sports and games facilities are very good.

reviews.review_heading: The college campus is good, but the college doesn't provide good facilities.
reviews.review_text: There is no such Wi-Fi for students, and the labs had a minimum number of computers. I am not a hosteller, but according to my friends POV, hostel food was worse. Once in the hostel, they found cockroaches in the food, and they need to improve that.

reviews.review_heading: A College with Good Infrastructure and Average Placement, Ragging Free
reviews.review_text: The hostel rooms and hygiene are okay, but the food is very poor in taste, and some food items are limited in quantity. The taste of snacks provided is also not good. Hostel fees are 64,000, which is not worth the money, and the hostel environment is very strict; you have to take permission to go out of the college campus.

reviews.review_heading: Good college as per the present industry needs.
reviews.review_text: In PES Institute of Technology and Management Shimoga, have good infrastructure, including the latest systems in labs. All classes are digital classes having the projector. Wi-Fi facility is only available for faculties. Also, the library named PRERANA is a good place for study.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good in infrastructure and other things but better in quality of teaching.
reviews.review_text: About infrastructure, it is a good and nice campus and has a good infrastructure with lab facilities and wifi facilities. Its a good campus filled with greenery and surroundings. We have land and other shops outside the campus. About food, it's good in the canteen.

reviews.review_heading: PES Institute of Technology and Management (PESITM) review.
reviews.review_text: The campus is very good to see and very well maintained. Sports grounds are separate for cricket and football and many more games we can play and there is a library inside the college. It is very good to go and nothing more than that to like campus normal.

reviews.review_heading: Review of PES Institute of Technology and Management.
reviews.review_text: The campus is beautiful; all facilities are good except the food, which is not good and hygienic. It has a digital library, well-equipped labs and classrooms. Apart from engineering, there are other courses offered, like MBA, BCA, B.Sc., BBA, MCA, and many others. All facilities are student-friendly; they support and motivate students.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college, and it has value for money.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in our department. From 9:00 AM to 4:30 PM, the library and labs are open. Students can use the library and labs at any time during college hours. There is a canteen. Good-quality food is available in the mess. More encouragement is given to sports and games.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about PES Institute of Technology and Management (PESITM)

reviews_list.review_title: About PDA College of Engineering.

review_content.Placements: The placement in college is not too good in our senior batch; only 5 to 10 students got placed, and there is no prior teaching about interviews; they should give us mock interviews, tell us about the interviews, and allow us to do internships outside the college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The Wi-Fi is available in the college permits. The quality of food in the canteen is also nice. There is hostel for only boys. We have sports section also. The labs are clean, and the classrooms are also clean, but the fans are not working in the classrooms of college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is good in all aspects.

review_content.Placements: Around 50-60% of students got placed in our college. The highest salary package offered ranges between 7 LPA - 8 LPA. Top recruiting companies are HCL, Mahindra, etc. Many IT companies visit our college to recruit students. Around 30% of students got internships. The top role offered is project in-charge.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides good facilities. Labs are good. They have all the equipment. Our college has one of the oldest labs.
review_content.Faculty: Our teachers are helpful. They are good. They are always to help us. They help us in every possible way. They will make revisions. They help us to score good marks. I am satisfied with the teachers.

faqs.question: Can I get admission at PDA College of Engineering in BTech if my rank is between 36000 and 37000?

For COMEDK Round 2 cutoff 2023, the opening rank was 71183 and closing rank was 77070 for the general category candidates under All India quota. Cut off are different when it comes to other categories or female candidates and even domicile of home state. Admission to Computer Science Engineering in PDA College of Engineering is based on the scores obtained in the COMEDK entrance exam. Applicants are advised to confirm what category are they applying while checking for cut offs.

review_summary.college_name: PDA College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The college has good placements, infrastructure, facilities, and interactive faculty members.

content.Placements: About 90% or above placement opportunities in my college, with the lowest package being 3.5 LPA and the highest being 10 LPA in 2025. Top companies like IBM, Cognizant, Infosys, Accenture, etc., visit the campus. Some startups also visit, and some of them were started by our seniors.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is good, and the hostel facility is also good. The canteen, health care center, and sports room are well maintained. The cleanliness maintained by the canteen is impressive, and we even receive medical help from the health care center.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with this college. Good infrastructure and placements.

content.Placements: About 75% of students get placed in the college. Top recruiting companies are Amazon, Mahindra, Cisco, Infosys, IBM, TCS, etc. The highest package is 8 LPA. The lowest package is 2 LPA. 70% of students got internships. Overall, the college is good.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good. There are separate departments for all branches of the college. We have well-developed digital classrooms. A hostel facility is also available, providing healthy and hygienic food. Medical facilities are available near the hostel. There is a gaming area for indoor games. A sports ground is there for outdoor games.

individual_reviews.course: B.E in Computer Science and Design - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: About PDA College of Engineering.

content.Placements: The placement in college is not too good in our senior batch; only 5 to 10 students got placed, and there is no prior teaching about interviews; they should give us mock interviews, tell us about the interviews, and allow us to do internships outside the college.
content.Infrastructure: The Wi-Fi is available in the college permits. The quality of food in the canteen is also nice. There is hostel for only boys. We have sports section also. The labs are clean, and the classrooms are also clean, but the fans are not working in the classrooms of college.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our college is good in all aspects.

content.Placements: Around 50-60% of students got placed in our college. The highest salary package offered ranges between 7 LPA - 8 LPA. Top recruiting companies are HCL, Mahindra, etc. Many IT companies visit our college to recruit students. Around 30% of students got internships. The top role offered is project in-charge.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides good facilities. Labs are good. They have all the equipment. Our college has one of the oldest labs.
content.Faculty: Our teachers are helpful. They are good. They are always to help us. They help us in every possible way. They will make revisions. They help us to score good marks. I am satisfied with the teachers.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of PDA Engineering College, Gulbarga.

content.Placements: 1) In our college, 80 to 85% of passing students were placed in our college. 2) The highest or lowest package offered is INR 15–8 LPA. 3) Infosys, Wipro, Tech Mahindra, Accenture, Cognizant, Hindustan Copper Limited, etc. are the top recruiting companies. 4) 50% of students at PDA College got internships, some with companies like Tata and Reliance Industries.
content.Infrastructure: The college campus is fully Wi-Fi-enabled. The college has a number of state-of-the-art laboratories, a number of well-equipped classrooms, and a large library. The quality of facilities is not so good; the rooms are normal and okay; the cultural activities and sports; fashion shows; and many other activities.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in PDA College of Engineering for UG/PG courses?
faqs.answer:
PDA College of Engineering has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed Diploma in relevant stream from a recognised Institute.B.ArchCandidate must have passed 3 years of Diploma in Architecture from a recognised Institute.M.E./M.TechCandidates must have passed qualifying examination or equivalent examination as prescribed by the Competent Authority and obtained an aggregate minimum of 50% marks (45% of marks in case of SC, ST and Category-I candidates) taken together in all the subjects of all the years/ semesters of the Degree Examination from any recognised institute/university.
Final year students can also apply on provisional basis.
Candidates must have valid GATE score.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good placements, infrastructure, facilities, and interactive faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good, and the hostel facility is also good. The canteen, health care center, and sports room are well maintained. The cleanliness maintained by the canteen is impressive, and we even receive medical help from the health care center.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with this college. Good infrastructure and placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. There are separate departments for all branches of the college. We have well-developed digital classrooms. A hostel facility is also available, providing healthy and hygienic food. Medical facilities are available near the hostel. There is a gaming area for indoor games. A sports ground is there for outdoor games.

reviews.review_heading: About PDA College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi is available in the college permits. The quality of food in the canteen is also nice. There is hostel for only boys. We have sports section also. The labs are clean, and the classrooms are also clean, but the fans are not working in the classrooms of college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides good facilities. Labs are good. They have all the equipment. Our college has one of the oldest labs.

The college campus is fully Wi-Fi-enabled.
The college has a number of state-of-the-art laboratories, a number of well-equipped classrooms, and a large library. The quality of facilities is not so good; the rooms are normal and okay; the cultural activities and sports; fashion shows; and many other activities.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with teachers of our college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available but has never been connected. There is a library. The hostel food is not good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good.
reviews.review_text: Our campus was Wi-Fi enabled. It also provides a library. Laboratories were good. Classrooms were average. The food served in the hostel was good. The canteen was decent.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with faculty members, placements, and good infrastructure of our college.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms in our college are spacious with good quality benches and there is a smart board in every class. A Wi-Fi facility is available for students. The library contains a lot of different books. The hostel is good. Sports competitions are conducted from the intercollege level to the state level.

reviews.review_heading: This college builds the lives of students.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good in our college. The infrastructure is good. All basic facilities are given here.

reviews.review_heading: Good college, students can build there life here. Campus selection gets good jobs.
reviews.review_text:
In campus we have lab, classrooms, library, garden area and good infrastructure.
Well developed classrooms.
All the facilities are good here, students can come to this college without any second thought and without any doubt. Interiors admission blocks infrastructure everything is nice.

reviews.review_heading: Really Satisfied By Faculty and Placements in 2022, Very Nice Campus Selection .
reviews.review_text: Really good classrooms, library. , and gardening. Really good canteen for rich parents children. And no sports and games. I am really interested in playing cricket but there is no playing ground. Labs are really good and clean mentioned for every student every student can take self products .

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best engineering colleges.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure provided by our college is best. The environment and atmosphere here are good. The library has free Wi-Fi to access the digital books offered by the college for the betterment of students. Our college has an indoor stadium to encourage students to take part in games like chess, carrom, table tennis, etc.

reviews.review_heading: I don't recommend any student to opt for this college as they have bad reviews from students.
reviews.review_text: There is no proper drinking water, and restrooms are also not clean. Smartboards are not working in classrooms. They take Rs. 20,000 as their college building fund and have no basics need. All the equipment in our lab is either old or broken.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and faculty placement for civil branch not satisfied.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of department is good with high-speed Wi-Fi. Classes are well maintained and are kept clean. Labs too are pretty good well equipped with all the necessary equipments. There are two libraries one is common library for every branch and one is department library. You can find many books from good authors. Hostel is above average recently innovated. Quality of food in mess and canteen is just good. Sports like volleyball and badminton court are available and indoor sports carrom, tt a...

reviews.review_heading: Our college is autonomous and affiliated with VTU. It has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: In our college, classrooms and labs are very good. There are digital classrooms and very good computers, and the speed of Wi-Fi is very good. The library is also very good because there are both digital and non-digital libraries. All new edition textbooks are available. There is a very good mess. We have to choose sports like cricket, etc., and there are many other sports. In our college, there are indoor games and outdoor sports.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, SSBT's College of Engineering and Technology offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from streams like Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. College offers B.E. / B.Tech courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. The SSBT College Jalgaon course fee ranges between INR 80,000 to 2,74,892.

faqs.answer: A:    The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

faqs.answer: The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.Some job profiles are listed here:Brand ManagerAccount ManagerInternational Business ManagerMarketing ExecutiveBusiness Technical ConsultantAll the best.

faqs.question: Q: Is the BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus the same for all colleges?

faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses
faqs.question: Q: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?

faqs.answer: Dear candidate, the subject of Machine Design basically teaches you about the designing fundamentals of various types of machinery across industries. You get to learn about the different ways in which elements can be combined to form an equipment or machine system and get the work done in an effective manner.The knowledge of this subject is very important for a mechanical engineer as he/she will have to put this to use in the future whenever they enter the workforce as a mechanical engineering professional.Hope this cleared your doubt. Have a good day.
faqs.question: Q: What is covered in Machine Design subject in B.Tech course?
