overview_faqs.question: What is the average BTech Computer Science Engineering salary in India?
overview_faqs.answer: The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

overview_faqs.question: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?
overview_faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses

review_summary.college_name: SSBT College Jalgaon Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I'm at least motivated to get my degree done.

content.Placements: Last year, there is 0 percent placement in campus selection. The highest package up to date is 6 LPA. I wish to be in cyber security. I am learning operating systems, networking, etc. by myself, and I will get guidance on this from our counsellors for further steps.
content.Infrastructure: There are Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a central library. There is a very green, nature-friendly environment where students can study peacefully. The travel facility is provided by buses, which cost 10,000 per year, which I think is a bit costly.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good teaching staff and good placements.

content.Placements: Good placements are offered in college with good packages. Placements depend on the student's interview performance. 60-70% percent of students get placements in our field. Positions depend on student interviews, CGPA, their performance, their activities, and their projects.
content.Infrastructure: Everything is available in a good manner. All types of facilities are provided. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library facilities are all good. Good food, canteen, and medical facilities are also available, and sports and games are good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Not very satisfied because the overall placement record has decreased.

content.Placements: The passout batch get a average package of 4LPA. No internship offer by the college 70 percent student are pass out and the average package of our college is 5LPA. The highest package offered is 12 LPA which is given to CS and IT students. Top roles for the CSIT student are data analytics and other student like mechanical and electrical branches maintenance.
content.Infrastructure: College have all facilities like gym Indore sports, outdoor sports, canteens, and hostels. The hostels have a mess in them. The college has bus facilities and also have the fresh water drinking and canteen mess. The mess provides fresh food in the hostel. The Wi-Fi facility and freshwater facility and rooms are very clear.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Overall a good college and placements are also good.

content.Placements: I do not know more about placements but companies like L and T, ultratech give visit to campus and provide opportunities to students. Health care is available in college. Many counselling sessions are held to motivate students in their field.
content.Infrastructure: Campus has Wi-Fi in canteen, with affordable prices for students on various dishes. Library is best, big and all books are easily available with a variety of books. Sports are very important in any sector and here also they are given priority, like basketball, cricket, tennis, etc. Digital boards are also available in classrooms.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Details About SSBT's College of Engineering.

content.Placements: Minimum 40% of students are placed in our course. The lowest package is 3 LPA, and the highest is 26 LPA. Top recurring companies are Wipro, TCS, Accubits, etc. A minimum of 60% of students interned with TCS and Wipro. Top roles offered by companies are Software Developer, Web Developer, and Analyst.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are very good in our college, such as Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library. The hostel facility is also awesome. The college is very good for the engineering course, better than other colleges in Jalgaon. The faculty in college is awesome, helpful, and knowledgeable, and they assist with placements.

reviews.review_heading: I'm at least motivated to get my degree done.
reviews.review_text: There are Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a central library. There is a very green, nature-friendly environment where students can study peacefully. The travel facility is provided by buses, which cost 10,000 per year, which I think is a bit costly.

reviews.review_heading: Good teaching staff and good placements.
reviews.review_text: Everything is available in a good manner. All types of facilities are provided. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library facilities are all good. Good food, canteen, and medical facilities are also available, and sports and games are good.

reviews.review_heading: Not very satisfied because the overall placement record has decreased.
reviews.review_text: College have all facilities like gym Indore sports, outdoor sports, canteens, and hostels. The hostels have a mess in them. The college has bus facilities and also have the fresh water drinking and canteen mess. The mess provides fresh food in the hostel. The Wi-Fi facility and freshwater facility and rooms are very clear.

reviews.review_heading: Overall a good college and placements are also good.
reviews.review_text: Campus has Wi-Fi in canteen, with affordable prices for students on various dishes. Library is best, big and all books are easily available with a variety of books. Sports are very important in any sector and here also they are given priority, like basketball, cricket, tennis, etc. Digital boards are also available in classrooms.

reviews.review_heading: Details About SSBT's College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very good in our college, such as Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library. The hostel facility is also awesome. The college is very good for the engineering course, better than other colleges in Jalgaon. The faculty in college is awesome, helpful, and knowledgeable, and they assist with placements.

reviews.review_heading: Best college in North Maharashtra.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good, but it faces a large water shortage, and the management is not very supportive. Classrooms have projectors, fans, boards, benches, etc. Internet is available in the computer lab and library. Library cards are given at the time of admission. The lift is not available for students; only teachers can use it. The hostel is near to the college, but its food is not great; it is just average. The sports field has basic medical emergency kits.

reviews.review_heading: Should you take admission in SSBT?
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are average. Wi-Fi is available, but the connection is poor. The library is too good, with maximum seating capacity, and books are easily available regarding the respective course. The mess and canteen are average, and the rate of food is low.

reviews.review_heading: Ask for a decent college?
reviews.review_text: Infra is very nice, and the hostel is also well managed. The library is well-equipped with technology. The library is very much designed for the students to enjoy, not like it's very shabby or has a lot of spacing and books. I am saying all the books are there, and the e-lab, in which computers and stuff are, is very helpful to students who don't have laptops.

reviews.review_heading: Some faculty members are very good. The package is below average. Infrastructure and labs are nice.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is good It has a huge lawn and more than 15 computer labs. With high-end PC's, campus also has Wi-Fi but the speed is not good. It has a digital display in every room. There are a total of 4 canteens on campus: 2 are official and 2 are illegal. The food quality is below average; otherwise, you can go elsewhere for better options. There are many stores outside of college.

reviews.review_heading: Not dissatisfied by the faculty but not satisfied. Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: In this college the campus is of 25 acres with more tha 3 4 buildings and two lawns and canteens to hill out and the whole campus is Wi-Fi enabled. There is a filtered water in whole campus and the labs are well maintained. The classrooms are really good and have projectors in every class. I don't have that experience of hostel and mess but the food of mess is like average.

reviews.review_heading: Review of SSBT’s College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. Our college has labs. The library is excellent. Our college has computer labs. It has more than 20 computers. Our college has a workshop lab. There are many labs. The hostel facilities are not much good. The canteen is not much good. They should be improved.

reviews.review_heading: Modern college in our age.
reviews.review_text: My college is our best campus and best facility are there. The campus will be Wi-Fi is sppedly network. Many computer labs are there. And classrooms will be digital and modern. Classrooms are fully cameras are there. College are big library in college.

reviews.review_heading: The best college in the region with very well and equipped facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was very impressive and sustainable for education. There are various facilities like well-equipped labs with the latest technology and the whole campus was equipped with the Wi-Fi internet connectivity. Every classroom has projectors for 3d simulation and learning. Hostel was very nice infact I was also living in hostel the facilities are very good with good hygiene. There is all kind of sports games were organised by hostel committee for student to showcase the...

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with faculty members but placements were very good in 2022.
reviews.review_text: All the department courses are available. We have separate labs and Wi-Fi in departments. There are digital classrooms In the college. We have 2 canteens and there is a separate ground for all sports. All the equipment of sports is available. Many players from this college are gold medalists.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college because of its infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides all facilities like hostels, a canteen, Wi-Fi, and a library. Our classrooms are good. They have good sitting arrangements. We have a sports ground where students can play volleyball, basketball, etc. The food served in the hostel is good.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Aligarh College of Engineering and Technology offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Just don't waste your time and money if you want to seriously secure your future.

content.Placements: I am graduating this year but haven't secured a placement yet, even though I am one of the top students in my batch. Other colleges are getting at least some offers from service-based companies, but here, the placement and training coordinators haven't brought in a single company.
content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi, proper lab equipment, or teaching support from the college. There are no hostels for outsiders. Library and Canteen are available. It doesn't have a sports campus or any ground area for proper gameplay. Even events are held in areas where buses are parked.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Aligarh College of Engineering and Technology.

content.Placements: Approximately 70% of students are placed in this college. The highest package in this college is 7-8 LPA and the minimum package is 3 LPA. Top service-based companies recruit the students. Almost 80% of students got an internship in their pre-final year. The top roles offered in this college are software developer, full stack developed, android developed.
content.Infrastructure: Generally, classrooms are well maintained with whiteboards as well as a projector. The lab is also updated with time means upgraded technology is embedded in the lab for students. Hostels are also to good for both boys and girls. Both of them have separate rooms in the hostel.

The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the Aligarh College of Engineering and Technology BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 178958 and 1371559 for the General AI category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech. in E

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the AI quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 178958 for the general AI quota. The closing cutoff for the same stood at 805822 in 2023.

Aligarh College of Engineering and Technology accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. reviews.review_heading: Just don't waste your time and money if you want to seriously secure your future.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi, proper lab equipment, or teaching support from the college. There are no hostels for outsiders. Library and Canteen are available. It doesn't have a sports campus or any ground area for proper gameplay. Even events are held in areas where buses are parked.

reviews.review_heading: Aligarh College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: Generally, classrooms are well maintained with whiteboards as well as a projector. The lab is also updated with time means upgraded technology is embedded in the lab for students. Hostels are also to good for both boys and girls. Both of them have separate rooms in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and the temple of knowledge with good teachers.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure, clean seats, and water facilities. Canteen facilities are also very good. The behavior of teachers is very supportive, and the students are very friendly and helpful towards each other. The teachers also guide you for the future.

reviews.review_heading: Aligarh College of Engineering and Technology review.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure at Aligarh College of Engineering and Technology is average. The classrooms are not as good as they should be for the amount of fees they charge. I would give them a 2 out of 5. The library is only accessible during break time; otherwise, you have to be in class.

reviews.review_heading: Aligarh college of engineering and technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good and they do not provide a hostel because every student in the college is local to ALIGARH. Department of every course is different from each other and the faculty of each department is different.

reviews.review_heading: This college is not good for students.
reviews.review_text: There is no hostel in this college. We have to travel daily to book a PG room. Our campus is not Wi-Fi enabled. Classrooms are well-maintained. Laboratory is better. But you are not allowed to sit in the library.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely, the overall experience with college is good.
reviews.review_text: Yes, there are Wi-Fi facilities available in college. The classroom is so good, and there is a proper library management system available. There are no hostel facilities available. The canteen is also available, which has good-quality food available.

reviews.review_heading: Highly satisfied with the faculty, management of the college.
reviews.review_text: Fully Wi-Fi campus, good plantation in the campus. Labs have all the facilities and latest technology. Library has the large stock of book related to all courses. The quality of food in the canteen is very good, hygienic and different variety of food is available.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with facilities and management of our college.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is fully Wi-Fi enabled. It has good plantation and greenery everywhere. Environment of the campus is friendly for students. Labs have all the facilities. Our college has a good library with books related to all the courses. Sports are available for the students. The quality of food served in the canteen is very good and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty, infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Fully Wi-Fi campus, good plantantion, quality of food is very good in the canteen. Medical facilities is also very good. Good guidance by the faculty regarding projects, lab work, studies, etc. College timing is suitable for students. Holidays are provided before the tests, Sessional and pre semester exam.

reviews.review_heading: The college has its uniform and management is not good.
reviews.review_text: The campus is not good as a school. The building gate is closed after the first lecture. The timing is not comfortable from 8 AM to 4 PM. Students are not allowed to roam on campus even if they have some free time. The college does not have a hostel or mess. It has an average cafeteria.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely good faculty with best teachers. Good infrastructure and better placements since 2021.
reviews.review_text: There are good labs for every department and big libraries. There is no hostel in the campus. Canteen is there with good quality food. There are also well air-conditioned smart classes and seminar rooms. There are no sports and games events conducted. Medical facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: There are no hostel facilities because it is in a local city. It is recommended to stay in rented rooms because the hostel does not provide good food. Paying rent is something that a self-sufficient student handles easily. Some of the students are from nearby Own City.

reviews.review_heading: Our college value for money with good guidance.
reviews.review_text: There are most of the facilities. Library, computer labs, chemistry labs and many other labs are available. Transport facilities are available. Classrooms are big enough that 70 students can sit at a time. There are 2 halls for seminars and other programs.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Aligarh College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college was not good. Our course which was BCA for that course, there were no proper laboratories, and teachers did not have the practical knowledge to teach the students. The classroom was not hygienic and old-school-type. The library was good but students cannot take any random book without issuing it for reading. Only at the recess time library was accessible. There were no sports facilities at all in this college. Monkeys come to the campus and classroom and damage...

college_info.intro:
The BTech and MBA programmes are among the most popular offerings at Srinath University Jamshedpur. Srinath University BTech students are placed among the top companies such as Bajaj Finserve, ICICI Bank, Jamna Auto Industry, and others. The university offers the BTech programme in several branches such as Computer Science, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, and others. The USPs of Srinath University, which make it popular among the students, are listed below:
Srinath University offers a two-year MBA programme. Srinath University MBA faculty are highly eligible, skilled, and dedicated to providing support and guidance to students. There are vast career options open for MBA students to choose from such as Business Administration Researcher, Marketing Executive, Business Consultant, Business Analyst, Operations Manager, Sales Analyst, and Investment Analyst. admission_overview.college_name: Srinath University Admission 2025: Fee, Eligibility, Selection and Application Process

admission_process.title: Srinath University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Srinath University admissionis merit-based. Candidates need to fulfil the eligibility criteria set by the university to apply for any of the UG or PG courses.Srinath Universityoffers courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels through 11 schools. The courses at SU are offered in multiple streams such as Arts, Science, Commerce, Engineering, etc. The application process of the university is conducted in both online and offline modes.

Candidates seeking admission toSrinath University coursesare required to meet the course-specific eligibility criteria. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12 whereas, graduation is required to apply for PG courses. Below is Srinath University eligibility and selection criteria for top courses:
Make your selection here, to check the eligibility and selection criteria for other Srinath University courses

Admission to most of the Srinath University programmes is merit-based. Candidates must start with registration for the course of their choice followed by participating in the selection rounds. Check below the completeSrinath University admission process:STEP 1: Srinath University Application Process 2025

The mode of application is both online and offline. Candidates can collect the prospectus and the application form in person by paying the application fee at the admission office. For online submission, aspiants need to fill the form on the official website of the university.

STEP 2: SelectionOnce the registration process is over, the university starts shortlisting candidates for admission. The university evaluates the application forms of the candidates to confirm their eligibility.

STEP 3: Admission ConfirmationOnce the selection process is over, the shortlisted candidates are called for document verification. Aspirants need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the university.

It is ranked #3 by the Outlook 2025 under the Emerging State Private University category. institute is well-known for its well-structured academic curriculum, excellent faculty, and well-laid infrastructure. The Srinath University rankings have been explained in the article below:

outlook.description:
Based on the rankings from Outlook, Srinath University outperformed numerous other institutes, securing a higher position, indicating that the institute is considered to be doing better in various factors evaluated by the Outlook ranking system. In the 'Emerging State Private University' category, the institute's ranks have displayed constancy when compared with the previous year's ranking. reviews.review_heading: Overall, my college is good. It has good infrastructure, good faculty, and is a smart college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college is good. Hygiene and all classes are well maintained, and also classes are smart and smart board hostels and rooms of the good are well furnished, and infrastructure. Overall environment is good, and the campus is also nice.

reviews.review_heading: Srinath University is okay.
reviews.review_text: All are nice. Labs, Wi-Fi, classroom, and all are best and useful for students. Hostel facilities are also available at my university. They provide the best facilities to the students who live in the hostel. Facilities and infrastructure development are also the best at my university. They give us the best guidance and support.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for UG.
reviews.review_text: There is a library with a vast variety of books. Wi-Fi facility are also available. The college has labs for pharmacy students. The hostel rooms have attached bathrooms and are shared by three people. There is also a lift facility. The canteen offers decent-tasting food.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with good facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college and hostel is quite good. There are labs for computers, a chemistry lab, and mechanical instruments; the classrooms are well-equipped with sound systems. The library is also very nice, spacious, and filled with numerous informative books.

reviews.review_heading: College is good and within budget, we can pursue any course. Teachers are helpful.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are good as can be seen here. There is free Wi-Fi on every floor of college building. Labs are available for every practical subject. Classrooms are also fully-ventilated and library is a peaceful place giving satisfaction while studying. Mess, canteen, medical facilities, sports, and everything is just perfect.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the course and faculty members. Labs are great, and the field visits are very good.
reviews.review_text: There is a hostel available for girls, and it provides 4-sharing rooms. Washrooms are clean, and the food quality of the mess is good. As a day scholar, I have visited the mess and liked the food. Wi-Fi is present and proper security is present as the hostel is inside the campus. The hostel is quite affordable as it costs Rs. 6,000 per month as of 2024-2025.

reviews.review_heading: It is average college.
reviews.review_text: In terms of infrastructure, my college is average. Everything is available, but not in large quantities. Everything is available but in small amounts, like a small library. Wi-Fi does not perform at high speed. Classrooms are like school classrooms, and in the lab, many computers don’t work properly. Hostel facilities are good; there are separate boys' and girls' hostels. The girls' hostel is better than the boys' hostel. The quality of food in the canteen is not good; it is average. Sports and ...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Srinath University.
reviews.review_text: Library is the best. While our campus is somehow fine, it provides us with best knowledge, curriculum, activities, and more. It is a growing, uplifting, and opportunity-filled environment. Environment of empowerment it provides is great. Environment they provide for us to learn in is excellent.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for BCA course.
reviews.review_text: Food is good. Wi-Fi facility is available. Classrooms are good. Sports and games facility is available and bus facility is also available.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied from Srinath University.
reviews.review_text: We have a sports room, auditorium, labs, and a computer lab with good facilities, along with the best faculty to teach us. Just because of financial issues, I have been part of Srinath University, but it's satisfying for every middle-class student. About 5000 to 4000 students are pursuing BBA from our college. Finance, marketing, and HR are the roles. The highest package is 1 Lakh. Top recruitment companies are Bajaj, etc. Just because of financial issues, I have been part of Srinath University,...

reviews.review_heading: Knowledge skills fear.
reviews.review_text: I think students needs hostel inside the campus area. Where they can enjoy the terrace and canteen also and if they need to use the library than also it will be very easy for to use the library because the campus area is very big but no space for students that much .

reviews.review_heading: It's good overall, and you will adapt to it easily.
reviews.review_text: It's all well maintained, clean, and updated, so it's not something to worry about. I am not a hosteler, so I can't tell about the hostel. The benches are good, and classrooms are good. If you have any problems, the faculty and staff are good, polite, and supportive, so much of it is good.

reviews.review_heading: The placement and infrastructure and facilities are all good.
reviews.review_text:
The facilities and infrastructure available in my course or department are very well maintained the classroom were neat and clean and Wi-Fi connection is very well 
The quality of hostel and the quality of food is very well maintained the food is of very good quality.

reviews.review_heading: Value for money college with best education and faculties.
reviews.review_text: The campus area is not too big but the infrastructure is decent, there are libraries, computer labs, smart classes, etc. The girls hostel is in the campus whereas the boys was 3 km away from college, it costs around 72k per year with facilities like study table, wifi, food, some more stuffs.

reviews.review_heading: Is Srinath University worth it because the academy is affordable.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of a course hostel typically includes well-furnished rooms and provides basic accommodation. Classrooms are well-equipped with projectors, smart boards, and comfortable seating. Security and maintenance include 24/7 security, CCTV surveillance, and housekeeping services.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech, B.Com and B.Pharma. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Indira Gandhi University offers MBA/PGDM, M.Sc. and MCA. The fees for Indira Gandhi University courses range between INR 1,080 to 1,65,910.

faqs.answer: A:    Indira Gandhi University admissions are mix of entrance or merit-based as per course requirement. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The candidate must meet the eligibility criteria set by the college. Aspirants must pass Class 12 for the UG courses and graduation for the PG courses. The college also considers the candidates' academic performance for final selection.
faqs.question: What is the percentile required for Indira Gandhi University?

faqs.answer: A:    Indira Gandhi University, Rewari offers various Postgraduate programmes including MA in various disciplines. The duration for this course is two years. The eligibility criteria for IGU Rewari MA admission is Graduation in any discipline from any recognised university with a minimum aggregate of 45%. Admission to MA in IGU are completely based on merit scores obtained by the students in graduation. Hence, the university does not accept application in absence of final results of the qualifying degree.

The candidate must meet the eligibility criteria set by the college. Aspirants must pass Class 12 for the UG courses and graduation for the PG courses. The fee for IGU Rewari Bcom course has to be paid annually or semester-wise after the enrolment or payment of the admission fee amount. Candidates should keep fee receipts with them for future reference. The IGU Rewari Bcom fee ranges betweenINR 20,000 – 71,100.This fee is taken from the official website/sanctioning body. It is still subject to changes and hence, is indicative. The interested candidates must check the official website of IGU Rewari for more details.

description: Indira Gandhi University cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to the BTech program. The cutoffs are available in the form of ranks for different categories of students belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates interested in taking admission at Indira Gandhi University can check out the sections below to view the exam, course, and category-wise cutoff details. A few more updates are below:

The Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA) will start the registration for JEE Main Counselling 2024 on June 10. A total of 6 rounds of JEE Main 2024 counselling will be conducted.

Indira Gandhi University cutoff 2025 was released via HSTES entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff was 510621 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 497448.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 510621.
For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.
Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.

highlights.summary:
The JEE Main 2026 registration for session 2 has closed for Aravali College of Engineering and Management admission to BTech, BArch and BPlan courses. The session 2 exams will be conducted from Apr 2 to Apr 9, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

student_insights.feedback: Offered in the final year only
Higher in core jobs
Majority opted in India
Students are expected to reach out to companies themselves
Organized & proactive placement process
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved
Love being in college

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Aravali College of Engineering and Management offers a wide range of programmes at both UG and PG levels. With option for Full Time learning, students can choose from several streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG stage, courses available include B.E. / B.Tech, BCA and BBA. For the PG level, there is a wide range of courses like MBA/PGDM. Aravali College of Engineering and Management fee structure ranges between INR 1,97,000 to 2,85,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: This college is better with knowledgeable faculty and average placements.

review_content.Placements: Around 200 students got placed in the CSE course. Around 70 students got placed in the AIML course. The highest salary package offered in the CSE course is 14 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 5 LPA. In the ECE department, the salary package offered is 18 LPA. Wipro provides the highest salary package.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are better. There is a library. It has books. The infrastructure of the college is nice. Wi-Fi is not available for students but is available for faculty. Lab classes are conducted on time. The canteen food is not very good because they store food for many days.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Aravali College.

review_content.Placements: About 60-70% of students get placed in our college every year. The highest salary package offered in our college is 18 LPA. The average salary package offered is 5 LPA. There are many companies who visited our college. Many top roles are offered in our college by visited companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure of our college are good. Labs and classrooms are well-maintained. Our college also provides Wi-Fi on the whole campus. I am not sure about the hostel because I am not staying there. The food in the cafeteria is also very good.

overview_faqs.question: Is Aravali College of Engineering and Management a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Aravali College of Engineering and Management is a reputed institute for BBA, BCA, B.Tech, MBA/PGDM. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Engineering. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Aravali College of Engineering and Management has a review rating of 4 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 3.9 on campuslife, 3.8 on placements, 4.1 on faculty and 4.1 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Aravali College of Engineering and Management Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: All about Aravali College of Engineering and Management.

content.Placements: The placement of this college is excellent for studious and punctual students. They offer placements only if a student scores well in academics and maintains an attendance percentage of 75 percent or above. The college provides interview opportunities with companies but it depends on the students to crack the interview.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is excellent with well maintained playground that is the most attractive feature. The buildings are well maintained and the boys and girls hostels are located in convenient areas.
content.Faculty: Faculty members of this college is excellent because their teaching methods are highly effective, making it easy for students to understand. All faculty members are kind and helpful. The curriculum of this college is good, and sessional exams are conducted every two months.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: College life enjoyed in Aravali.

content.Placements: College placements are average due to the lack of companies in the college. The average package of the college is about 4 LPA. The highest salary is 10 LPA at Aravali College. Top recruiting companies like TCS, Mahindra, Wipro, etc., came to the campus.
content.Infrastructure: The courses like B.Tech, MBA, BBA, and BCA with better faculty members and the infrastructure of the college is good on campus. Wi-Fi is available and each branch has its own labs. Classrooms have projector and library is also present. The hostel is good for the students and mess always changes the menu for the students. Rooms are enough for the students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: This college is better with knowledgeable faculty and average placements.

content.Placements: Around 200 students got placed in the CSE course. Around 70 students got placed in the AIML course. The highest salary package offered in the CSE course is 14 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 5 LPA. In the ECE department, the salary package offered is 18 LPA. Wipro provides the highest salary package.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are better. There is a library. It has books. The infrastructure of the college is nice. Wi-Fi is not available for students but is available for faculty. Lab classes are conducted on time. The canteen food is not very good because they store food for many days.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review of Aravali College.

content.Placements: About 60-70% of students get placed in our college every year. The highest salary package offered in our college is 18 LPA. The average salary package offered is 5 LPA. There are many companies who visited our college. Many top roles are offered in our college by visited companies.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure of our college are good. Labs and classrooms are well-maintained. Our college also provides Wi-Fi on the whole campus. I am not sure about the hostel because I am not staying there. The food in the cafeteria is also very good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I'm satisfied with the study material and the way students get teached.

content.Placements: The highest salary package offered is 10 LPA and the minimum salary package offered is 2.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS and Wipro. Almost 60% of students got placed with no backlogs. Placement facilities are very good and the companies approached are reputed.
content.Faculty: Faculty members including helping hands are very friendly and helpful. They provide students with the best security and have great knowledge in their respective fields. Helping hands are all so very polite and respectful towards every student. Teachers have a great knowledge and a very long experience. Course is very relevant and due to the knowledgeable teachers the study is easy. Pass percentage is 33% which is a bit high but with the help of faculty members it gets easy to pass.

paragraphs: Admission at Aravali College of Engineering and Management are both merit and entrance-based as per the course. Students are offered programmes at UG and PG level. These courses are offered in full time mode. To get admission inAravali College of Engineering and Management, students must meet the eligibility. The applications are accepted online. Some of the accepted entrance tests include JEE Main, HSTES, and LEET, and more. For merit-based admissions, scores in last qualifying exam are the criteria. faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in Aravali College of Engineering and Management for UG/PG courses?
faqs.answer: Aravali College of Engineering and Management has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityBBACandidate must have passed the 10+2 or equivalent examination from any recognized board/university with mentioned marks (40% in case of candidate belonging to SC/ST candidates of Haryana only).BCACandidate must have passed the 10+2 or equivalent examination from any recognized board/university with mentioned marks (40% in case of candidate belonging to SC/ST candidates of Haryana only).B.E. / B.TechCandidate must have completed Diploma in engineering or B.Sc in relevant field from any recognized institute.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Bachelor Degree in any stream of minimum three years duration with mentioned marks (45% is for SC/ST of Haryana state only) from a recognized University.

faqs.question: How many seats are available for various courses offered at Aravali College of Engineering and Management?
faqs.answer: Courses offerred by Aravali College of Engineering and Management are approved by eminent Government bodies like AICTE. The combined seats available for courses offered at Aravali College of Engineering and Management goes up to 540.

Candidates interested in taking admission at Aravali College of Engineering and Management can check out the sections below to view the exam, course, and category-wise cutoff details. A few more updates are below:

Aravali College of Engineering and Management cutoff 2025 was released via HSTES entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 323804 and 885937 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 323804, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artifical Intelligence and Machine Learning) turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. reviews.review_heading: All about Aravali College of Engineering and Management.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is excellent with well maintained playground that is the most attractive feature. The buildings are well maintained and the boys and girls hostels are located in convenient areas.

reviews.review_heading: College life enjoyed in Aravali.
reviews.review_text: The courses like B.Tech, MBA, BBA, and BCA with better faculty members and the infrastructure of the college is good on campus. Wi-Fi is available and each branch has its own labs. Classrooms have projector and library is also present. The hostel is good for the students and mess always changes the menu for the students. Rooms are enough for the students.

reviews.review_heading: This college is better with knowledgeable faculty and average placements.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are better. There is a library. It has books. The infrastructure of the college is nice. Wi-Fi is not available for students but is available for faculty. Lab classes are conducted on time. The canteen food is not very good because they store food for many days.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Aravali College.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of our college are good. Labs and classrooms are well-maintained. Our college also provides Wi-Fi on the whole campus. I am not sure about the hostel because I am not staying there. The food in the cafeteria is also very good.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with the study material and the way students get teached.
reviews.review_text: The highest salary package offered is 10 LPA and the minimum salary package offered is 2.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS and Wipro. Almost 60% of students got placed with no backlogs. Placement facilities are very good and the companies approached are reputed.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for only study purposes. Placements are not good, but infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, also providing free Wi-Fi in every class and lab. All classes have projectors for smart study. The library is in the basement of our college. Hostel food is very bad. The canteen is not good, but also not bad. They don't encourage students for sports.

reviews.review_heading: Really satisfied and well-organized college. Very nice faculty. Opportunities for placement.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are available at the college like cafeteria and library, and others. Wi-Fi is also available. The quality is also the best and not compromised. Food quality is also good and eatable. Games and sports lectures are also there, and clubs are also corporate for more enhancement.

reviews.review_heading: Aravali Institute of Management and Technology.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for our course are very good. College provides Wi-Fi and air-conditioned classrooms with digital classes. Facilities in our hostel, the quality of food available in the mess and canteen are good. Medical facilities, sports, and games facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty in terms of study only.
reviews.review_text: Campus-wise infrastructure is good. Free Wi-Fi is available on campus. Classrooms are clean. The hostel is good. It has fewer students but the warden is available. Hostels are available for both girls and boys separately. All other facilities are available a medical room, sports room, and ground.

reviews.review_heading: Life at ACEM. It is not the worse.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms at this college are quite large, but the benches and seating arrangements are just average. The campus has Wi-Fi, but it doesn't work most of the time, so we will have to use our own data plan. There is a canteen on campus where we can hang out and eat with our friends.

reviews.review_heading: You can choose this college; there are setbacks, but still, they can be worked around.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available on the campus, but only limited to the building. I've never eaten hostel food but it doesn't seem that bad, according to some of my friends. The hostel building looks like a hospital, with a big dining table for everyone to eat together and rooms with windows, B.Ed light, and a fan. Labs are available depending upon your course; you'll find related labs.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good enough; they conduct placements and take students for industrial visits.
reviews.review_text: The college has computer labs, seminar halls, a library, and engineering labs. The food is nice, with a variety of options in Chinese, Italian, and Indian cuisines. The college conducts an annual fest, often featuring celebrities as guests, along with fresher events for newcomers and farewell parties for passouts.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is big and good enough . Ground is big that students can play many games like badminton, crickets, basketball, volleyball etc. Wi-Fi for students is also available in college campus. AC facility is provide in every class.

reviews.review_heading: Great college infrastructure.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure of the college was great, as were air conditioner rooms. College has a big library. 
A Wi-Fi facility is available in college. 
The canteen also has a good selection of food.
All computer lab have latest technology so student develop skills.

reviews.review_heading: Average college for studies and I will not rate it more than 4/10. The teachers are good.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are too good but the AC of the classrooms always faces issues. Labs and libraries are also good. You cannot sit in the library while having your lectures. You can only attend your library session in the library period. I am in the hostel on my bed while I write this review. The warden has a good behaviour but the hostel maintenance is very bad. Water supply, Wi-Fi problem and many other things need to be fixed. Management team is taking action but their speed is too slow. The food...

college_info.college_name: Chitkara College of Applied Engineering: Courses, Admission 2025, Placements, Fees

highlights.summary: Admissions 2023 are open for all the courses. Candidates can check and apply through the official website. According to the Chitkara College of Applied Engineering official data available, more than 670 companies visited the Chitkara campus during Chitkara University Engineering placements for 2023. Further, out of a total of 1,800 students, around 650 students got dream offers during the 2023 Chitkara University Engineering placements. Apart from this data, according to the Engineering NIRF report for 2024 released by the university, the median package offered during placements for BTech stood at INR 9.5 LPA.

fees_and_eligibility.overview:
Chitkara College of Applied Engineering offers a four-year BTech programme at UG level in five specialisations with an option of lateral entry in three of them. The College imparts modern and industry-oriented education in each area of the programme.

Here are some highlights around Chitkara College of Applied Engineering courses:

faqs.answer: A:    Chitkara College of Applied Engineering offers one course i.e. B.E. as an undergraduate course. The college provides various specialisations in B.E. Here's a table explaining the percentage criteria of B.E. programmes at Chitkara College of Applied Engineering:CourseEligibilityB.E.Class 10 and Class 12 with 60% aggregate from a recognised board
faqs.question: How much percentage is required for Chitkara College of Applied Engineering?

faqs.answer: A:    For the Mechanical with Minor CSE and Electrical with Minor CSE streams, Chitkara University's B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering tuition is Rs 8.80 lakhs.The B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering programme at Chandigarh's Chitkara College of Applied Engineering lasts four years. However, the B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering (Lateral Entry) course at Chitkara College of Applied Engineering lasts three years.
faqs.question: What is the fee structure for B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering at Chitkara College of Applied Engineering, Chandigarh?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, candidates can apply online at Chitkara College of Applied Engineering. Candidates are required to pay an application fee of INR 1,100 to complete the procedure. Check the steps below to know the step-wise application process 2025:Step 1: Visit the official website, i.e., Chitkara University.Step 2: Go to the admission tab.Step 3: Click on “Apply for Admission”.Step 4: Register with basic details to get application credentials.Step 5: Login to fill out and complete the application form.Step 6: Pay the application and complete the form.
faqs.question: Can I apply online at Chitkara College of Applied Engineering?

faqs.answer: A:    The tution fee for the B.E. course at Chitkara College of Applied Engineering is INR 6 lakh. The college charges other extra charges excluding tuition fees such as admission fees, registration fees, and hostel charges. Applicants who want admission to B.E. can visit the Chitkara Univeersity campus or apply online to register for admission.
faqs.question: What is the fee for B.E. at Chitkara College of Applied Engineering?

reviews_list.review_title: There are good infrastructure and facilities and nice hostels.

review_content.Placements: Maybe above 80% of students got placed, and I don't know specifically because currently, I am in the 2nd year. So, according to the past years, the highest salary package offered may be 1.5 LPA. The lowest salary offered is Rs. 30,000 per month. The top recruiting company here is Amazon. Mostly more than 95% of students get their internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is good Wi-Fi, a library, lots of sports and tournaments and nice medical facilities. The food served in the mess is average. The canteen is really good, and there is a variety of food items at a very low price. You can afford the food, but the billing can be both online or cash. There are virtual games also, and a lot of events and tournaments are conducted.

reviews_list.batch_info: - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Placements are good, and it is the best college with fun.

review_content.Placements: Almost 100% of placements are guaranteed by our college. The average salary package offered is very good, i.e., 8 to 9 LPA and the highest salary package offered is 20 LPA. We are given internship opportunities from the starting of 3rd year. There are many good opportunities in the computer science field. Wipro, Infosys and other good companies visit here.

overview_faqs.question: Which are the cultural events that happen at Chitkara College of Applied Engineering, Chandigarh?
overview_faqs.answer: Cultural events are offen held in Chitkara University.All the events are entertaining and fun.A freahers party is must for every year. Besides that diffrent kind of events are held during special days like in Independence Day. The Cultural Night event is one of the offenly held events. Events are mostly organised by two clubs namely EPIC club and C2S2.Last year, a cultural night was organised by EPIC club and C2S2 for orienting the students that included various hypnotic performances and amusing activities. All the hostellers were divided into 4 houses: Knights, Spartans, Vikings, and Legions who then competed in 2 competitions- Junoon and Civil War.

overview_faqs.question: How is the college life at Chitkara College of Applied Engineering, Chandigarh?
overview_faqs.answer: Generally, our engineering students are free for three to four hours a day, Saturday and Sunday, but it varies from person to person, some students are studying daily, truely speaking 80% of students are studying only at the time of the exam. If you're serious in your studies, then there is a minimum of 2 hours free time to be had for 4 or 5 hours. Chitkara Provides featurea for both type of students there is library for the studius student on the otherhand there is playgrounds and swiming pools etc. for others.And for the lectures you have to maintain a 75% of attendence.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: It is a very good college, and I would recommend students to take admission in it.

content.Placements: Around 98% of students were placed. The highest salary package offered was 28 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 13 LPA. The top recruiting companies were Google, Microsoft, Syska, etc. Almost 78% of students got internships in Google and FIS. Many roles were offered in our course.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college was good. Wi-Fi speed was good in this college. Laboratories and classrooms were average. Some books were not available in this college.
content.Faculty: The course did not make students ready for the industry. The session-ending exams were good. Exams were average in this college, and the pass percentage was 8 CGPA.

individual_reviews.course: - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: There are good infrastructure and facilities and nice hostels.

content.Placements: Maybe above 80% of students got placed, and I don't know specifically because currently, I am in the 2nd year. So, according to the past years, the highest salary package offered may be 1.5 LPA. The lowest salary offered is Rs. 30,000 per month. The top recruiting company here is Amazon. Mostly more than 95% of students get their internships.
content.Infrastructure: There is good Wi-Fi, a library, lots of sports and tournaments and nice medical facilities. The food served in the mess is average. The canteen is really good, and there is a variety of food items at a very low price. You can afford the food, but the billing can be both online or cash. There are virtual games also, and a lot of events and tournaments are conducted.

The Holy Mary Institute of Technology and Science course fee ranges between INR 44,700 to 4,08,000.

reviews_list.review_title: It's a good college with great faculty, good placements, and good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Never heard of good placements, but as far as I've seen, there are a good number of placements, actually a decent amount of placements. It depends on how you study, but as far as I've seen, I've seen good companies like TVS and pharmaceutical companies are recruiting. Strong placement support with top recruiters and great for freshers aiming for IT/finance roles. Best for driven students in a practical setup.

overview_faqs.question: Can Holy Mary Institute of Technology & Science be considered a good college?
overview_faqs.answer: Holy Mary Institute of Technology & Science is a renowned institution offering B.E. / B.Tech, M.Pharma, Pharm.D, M.E./M.Tech, After 10th Diploma, B.Pharma, MBA/PGDM. Students can choose these courses to embark on their careers in the field of Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies. The institute is staffed with highly skilled and experienced faculty members dedicated to delivering these programs. Holy Mary Institute of Technology & Science boasts an impressive review rating of 3.38 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has received a rating of 3.76 for Campus Life, 2.88 for Placements, 3.46 for Faculty, and 3.62 for Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Holy Mary Institute of Technology and Science Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of Holy Mary Institute of Technology & Science.

content.Placements: Students have performed very well this year. A total of 286 students passed all exams this year. All students got a good percentage, and they have been placed in good companies. The highest package offered is 9 LPA last year in the B.Tech. Top companies like Google and Microsoft visit the college to hire students.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has well-maintained classrooms. The library is very big with more books. We have high security in the college.
content.Faculty: The college has good faculty members with high professional standards. Teachers have good teaching skills. Students are well prepared for industry-level work. Exams are conducted from time to time. There are 8 semesters in the B.Tech course.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: If you are looking for a good college with great faculty and infrastructure, this is it.

content.Placements: A good amount of placements, compared to other colleges, our college had good placements, which most people don't know. We frequently see companies coming to placement drives, actively recruiting students. Overall, a good track of placements.
content.Infrastructure: Decent classrooms, I would say. Don't expect them to be great. They are not well-maintained, but it's enough to study in them. The library is well-equipped with books that help you in your studies and personal life. Wi-Fi is not available for the students, but the canteen is good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It's a good college with great faculty, good placements, and good infrastructure.

content.Placements: Never heard of good placements, but as far as I've seen, there are a good number of placements, actually a decent amount of placements. It depends on how you study, but as far as I've seen, I've seen good companies like TVS and pharmaceutical companies are recruiting. Strong placement support with top recruiters and great for freshers aiming for IT/finance roles. Best for driven students in a practical setup.
content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure, but poorly maintained. If it is maintained well, it would be great. But it's so pleasant to spend time in college. It's so cool and the best to spend in college is rainy, very good. It's so good with lush green trees and greenery. Library is the best in the college.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Electrical & Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Now, placements are good.

content.Placements: A maximum of 80% of students get placed. The package offered ranges from 8-10 LPA. MNCs and IT companies offer placements. Roles like JE and sub-engineer are offered. Substations also hire students. It provides internships for 3 months. Students are eligible for all technical government jobs. All the private, government, and electrical device manufacturing companies hire students.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are very good. Labs are clean and neat. All the equipment is available. Classrooms are very neat. The canteen is neat and clean with good food facilities. Medical facilities are available. Sports are conducted in other colleges, and prizes will be given to participating students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Our college gets almost a number of placements, and every year, 900 students are placed.

content.Placements: In my college, 45% of students get jobs. The highest package is 35 LPA and the lowest is 6 LPA. Wipro, Software, Google, Randstand, AbC Consultant, Hire Global, and Talentiser are recruiting companies. Software engineer, data scientist, cybersecurity analyst, marketing manager, and also software developer are roles offered.
content.Infrastructure: In the college, we have a canteen and a big place to sit anywhere, and we have good facilities and infrastructure. Also in the college, we have the library, labs, and classrooms. The hostel food is very nice and it looks like our homely food and also washing machines, Wi-Fi, canteen, medical facilities, sports, and games are available.

Students should scroll down to this page to know the round, category, and year-wise cutoff for TSI ICET and other accepted exams. Refer to the pointers below for more updates:

Holy Mary Institute of Technology and Science TS EAMCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for the AI and HS quota. In the General category under the HS quota, the last round closing ranks ranged between 48722 and 116073 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) was the toughest to get admission into, considering its competitive cutoff rank. In the first round, the

For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top three most competitive branches were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science), B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering and B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning), with competitive TS EAMCET last round cutoff ranks of 48722, 56289 and 65264, respectively. These ranks are valid for the students belonging to the General HS quota.

For 2026 admission, candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important TS EAMCET dates. TS EAMCET is a state-level entrance test for admission to BE, B.Tech, BPharm, PharmD, B.Sc, B.FSc, and BVSc courses.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Holy Mary Institute of Technology & Science.
reviews.review_text: Our college has well-maintained classrooms. The library is very big with more books. We have high security in the college.

reviews.review_heading: If you are looking for a good college with great faculty and infrastructure, this is it.
reviews.review_text: Decent classrooms, I would say. Don't expect them to be great. They are not well-maintained, but it's enough to study in them. The library is well-equipped with books that help you in your studies and personal life. Wi-Fi is not available for the students, but the canteen is good.

reviews.review_heading: It's a good college with great faculty, good placements, and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure, but poorly maintained. If it is maintained well, it would be great. But it's so pleasant to spend time in college. It's so cool and the best to spend in college is rainy, very good. It's so good with lush green trees and greenery. Library is the best in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Now, placements are good.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very good. Labs are clean and neat. All the equipment is available. Classrooms are very neat. The canteen is neat and clean with good food facilities. Medical facilities are available. Sports are conducted in other colleges, and prizes will be given to participating students.

reviews.review_heading: Our college gets almost a number of placements, and every year, 900 students are placed.
reviews.review_text: In the college, we have a canteen and a big place to sit anywhere, and we have good facilities and infrastructure. Also in the college, we have the library, labs, and classrooms. The hostel food is very nice and it looks like our homely food and also washing machines, Wi-Fi, canteen, medical facilities, sports, and games are available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Holy Mary Institute of Technology & Science.
reviews.review_text: Labs are average and classes are average. There is no Wi-Fi facility. Hostel is waste and the food is average. Medical facilities and sports are average. Hostel looks like a regular, which is not a building. We will suffer due to more sheets in the hostel rooms and fans are not nice.

reviews.review_heading: Not bad, and improvement can be seen in the coming 3-4 years.
reviews.review_text: The college has many buildings and a lot of space, but it has failed to utilize that space efficiently. When we first joined, labs were not in good condition, and some did not have properly functioning computers. Now, in the final year, all labs have been upgraded with new equipment and computers. However, the network problem still persists.

reviews.review_heading: College was very good once upon a time, but now it is above average. Infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure in our college is average. Wi-Fi is not available, and the signal is not available. Labs are the one we prefer and classrooms are general. Library is the good place in our college. Facilities and infrastructure are available for our department.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Holy Mary Institute of Technology and Science.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is really awesome and very joyful, and the annual festival is heaven-fun. A clean and beautiful library and more informative books are there. Classrooms have AC and LED screens, and Wi-Fi is also provided by the college for the students.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Holy Mary Institute of Technology & Science.
reviews.review_text: This college is okay. The library, faculty, labs are just okay, and students having bikes can reach the college easily. It's a bit of a hassle for students with no vehicle facility because the college is about 1 km distance from the main road. College hostel is available but not that good.

reviews.review_heading: Poor placements and poor infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is normal and not much good. All facilities are not available. Only classrooms, library, canteen, labs, and computers are available in the college. Also, there are no groups for our college here. Food is average in our campus hostels which are allocated for students.

reviews.review_heading: The college has big and good infrastructure. The best year for placements was 2017, and the faculty
reviews.review_text:
I would rate the infrastructure of the college 10/10. Wi-Fi is available, and we have large classrooms. Our library contains biographical books, course-based books, subject books, and also delves into the history of CSE or deep thoughts for CSE.

Hostel life for me in our college was average. They serve food well, and they are very strict about rules and regulations. They have medicine for emergency purposes. We have a large ground for cricket, a volleyball court, and a basketball court. They al...

reviews.review_heading: A review of Holy Mary Institute of Technology and Science.
reviews.review_text: There are many infrastructure facilities available for the courses here at the college. There are separate labs for students from different branches, and classrooms are divided by branches. The college also offers sports facilities, with separate grounds for each sport, like cricket and volleyball courts, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Holy College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure available for the course is abundant here at the college, with separate labs for students of different branches and classrooms divided by branches. The college also offers sports facilities with separate grounds for each sport, such as a cricket field and a volleyball court.

reviews.review_text:

college_info.college_name: Mahaveer Institute of Science and Technology: Courses, Fees, Admission 2024

highlights.summary:
The TG ICET 2026 registration deadline has been extended for admission to the MBA and MCA courses. Students can now register till Mar 23, 2026, (without a late fee) for the exam scheduled for May 13 and May 14, 2026.

Below are a few more updates related to the Mahaveer Institute Of Science and Technology:

college_info.intro: Mahaveer Institute of Science and Technology popular programmes are BTech and MBA. The basic aim of the college is to provide contemporary technical educational programmes to students in the field of ECE. This in turn prepares the students for competitive employment, higher studies, and several entrepreneurial requirements. The courses provide comprehensive and in-depth knowledge to students with a research orientation that is important and relevant to society, industry, environment, and global needs. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by the Mahaveer Institute of Science and Technology. Along with this, students can also have a look at the Mahaveer Institute of Science and Technology fee structure:

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Offered in the final year only
Many students looking for better jobs
Higher in core jobs
Majority opted in India
Organized & proactive placement process
Students are expected to reach out to companies themselves
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved
Loved in first year but not in later years

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Mahaveer Institute of Science and Technology offers PG and UG courses to students. These courses are provided across the Management, Engineering, and various other streams. At the UG level, the college offers BTech courses to students. BTech is provided in nine specialisations, namely Computer Science & Engineering, Information Technology, Aeronautical, and others. At the PG level, the college offers MTech and MBA. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by the Mahaveer Institute of Science and Technology and their respective eligibility. Along with this, students can have a view at the Mahaveer Institute of Science and Technology fee structure:

faqs.answer: A:    The tuition fee for Mahaveer Institute of Science and Technology M.Tech course is INR 75000. MIST offers M.Tech programme in three specialisations which are Computer Science & Engineering, Power Engineering & Energy Systems, Advanced Manufacturing Systems. Below is seats and fee details for all specialisations:CourseSeatsTuition FeeComputer Science & Engineering18INR 75000Power Engineering & Energy Systems18INR 75000Advanced Manufacturing Systems18INR 75000Note: Candidates must note that this information is sourced from the official website of the institute/university sanctioning body and is subject to change.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Aeronautical Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Great learning environment for arrow with decent infrastructure and supportive faculty.

review_content.Placements: In our nautical branch, approximately 70 to 75 percent of the students got placed. The highest package offered is around 5 LPA, while the lowest is 2 LPA, with an average of 3.5 LPA. The top recruiting companies, including TAIN, various aerospace start-up companies, offer about 60 percent of the students internships at DRDO and HAL. Common roles offered include design engineering, including design engineering, graduate engineering, and maintenance engineering.
review_content.Infrastructure: The aeronautical department has well-equipped labs, such as aerodynamic and other labs. The library is consulted with relevant technical journals and textbooks. The campus has defined Wi-Fi connectivity in the hostel, and the rooms are spacious. Well-maintained mess is available. Food is not as good as you expect compared to the private hostels.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Good college with lot of opportunities.

review_content.Placements: Most of the students are very well placed in greater companies. The highest package is 20 LPA and the average is around 3 LPA. The recruiting companies are Google, Zepto, etc. The course is about optoelectronic devices, communication and systems, electrical devices, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities are very good and we have a good library. The campus and hostel contain Wi-Fi and LAN connection. We can stay in hostel or we can go as a day scholar. The sports and medical facilities are available very well. The canteen is also available for students.
