review_summary.college_name: Mahaveer Institute of Science and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Our college infrastructure is good.

content.Placements: Placements for ECR are quite good here, with many seniors getting placed in companies like TCS, Wipro, and other core electronic firms. Above 60 percent of the students get placed every year in our college, with the highest package of 5 LPA and the average package of 4 LPA. We are also getting opportunities for internships from the third year.
content.Infrastructure: In our EC department, the labs are well-equipped with a lot of things like analog circuits, microprocessors, etc. The library has a good collection of books, there are thousands of books in our library. The hostel is good, but the food is bad. Wi-Fi is also available in our hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Excellent AI & ML branch and curriculum with great labs.

content.Placements: For our AI & ML branch, approximately 60 percent of the students are placed. The highest package is 7 LPA, and the average package is 4.5 LPA. The top recruiting companies included TCS and Wipro. Many of us secured internships in various AI & ML–related roles like data analyst and junior ML engineer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the AI & ML department is good. We had the latest labs which are essential for our projects. The library is well stocked with books and the latest journals on Data Science. Regarding the hostel, the rooms are big, and we had gym and sports facilities, but the food is bad in taste.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Aeronautical Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Great learning environment for arrow with decent infrastructure and supportive faculty.

content.Placements: In our nautical branch, approximately 70 to 75 percent of the students got placed. The highest package offered is around 5 LPA, while the lowest is 2 LPA, with an average of 3.5 LPA. The top recruiting companies, including TAIN, various aerospace start-up companies, offer about 60 percent of the students internships at DRDO and HAL. Common roles offered include design engineering, including design engineering, graduate engineering, and maintenance engineering.
content.Infrastructure: The aeronautical department has well-equipped labs, such as aerodynamic and other labs. The library is consulted with relevant technical journals and textbooks. The campus has defined Wi-Fi connectivity in the hostel, and the rooms are spacious. Well-maintained mess is available. Food is not as good as you expect compared to the private hostels.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good college with lot of opportunities.

content.Placements: Most of the students are very well placed in greater companies. The highest package is 20 LPA and the average is around 3 LPA. The recruiting companies are Google, Zepto, etc. The course is about optoelectronic devices, communication and systems, electrical devices, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities are very good and we have a good library. The campus and hostel contain Wi-Fi and LAN connection. We can stay in hostel or we can go as a day scholar. The sports and medical facilities are available very well. The canteen is also available for students.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Do not expect placements and well faculty.

content.Placements: 20 to 25 percent of our Diploma students were placed as it does not offer more packages. When it comes to placements the college still needs to work harder. Only a limited number of companies visit and the opportunities were not very high for all branches. Students who are talented or take extra effort do get placed but overall placement statistics were average. Placements were somewhat limited. Overall the placement support still needs improvement.
content.Infrastructure: Overall an average college with a mix of positives and negatives. The campus environment was definitely one of its strengths its calm and green and gives students a comfortable place to study and enjoy college life. Placements were somewhat limited and only a few companies visit regularly. Students who put in extra effort can get placed but overall the placement support still needs improvement.

admission_overview.college_name: Mahaveer Institute of Science and Technology Admission 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Process

admission_process.title: Mahaveer Institute of Science and Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Mahaveer Institute of Science and Technology admission process 2025isentrance-basedfor UG & PG courses.Mahaveer Institute of Science and Technology, Hyderabad, affiliated with theJNTUH,offers various programmes at UG, PG and diploma level.
There are several courses options available, such asMTech, MBA, BTech, diplomain the stream of Engineering, Business & Management Studies atMIST. Admission to BTech is done on the basis ofEAMCETexam.

Before applying to MIST, candidates must satisfy the local/non-local status laid down by the Andhra Pradesh State Educational Institutions. the institute select the students on the basis of entrance exam score for all the courses admission.
Below mentioned are the Mahaveer Institute of Science and Technology eligibility and selection criteria details for the PG and diploma courses:
Know more aboutMahaveer Institute Of Science and Technology courses

Mahaveer Institute of Science and Technology registration for all the courses admission must be doneonlineand the application process usually starts inFebruary,each year. Eligible candidates can apply by visiting the official website of MIST.
Below mentioned is the Mahaveer Institute of Science and Technology admission process:
Step 1:MISTApplication
Candidates need to apply on the official website of Mahaveer Institute of Science and Technology @mist.ac.in
Step 2: MIST Selection round
Step 3: Seat Allotment

For BTech course, the provisional first phase allotment of seats will be prepared and will be published on the websitetseamcet.nic.in.To download the candidate’s Provisional Allotment Order, enter theROC Form Number, TSEAMCET Hall Ticket No., password and DOB in candidate login in on the TSEAMCET website.
Step 4: Payment of the Tuition Fees
Candidates need to pay the tuition fee through online (credit card / debit card/ net banking ) before the deadline set by MIST.
Step 5: Reporting/ Document Varification
Candidate has to report at the allotted college (MIST) after final phase of counselling and submit the copies of the certificates and original TC.

cut_off.college_name: Mahaveer Institute of Science and Technology Cutoff 2025: Check TS ICET Round Wise Cutoff Ranks

description: Mahaveer Institute Of Science and Technology cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to MBA programmes via the TSI ICET entrance examination result. Students should scroll down to this page to know the round, category, and year-wise cutoff for TSI ICET and other accepted exams. Refer to the pointers below for more updates:

Mahaveer Institute Of Science and Technology TS EAMCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for the AI and HS quota. In the General category under the HS quota, the last round closing ranks ranged between 24936 and 70972 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) was the toughest to get admission into, considering its competitive cutoff

For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top three most competitive branches were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning), B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering and B.Tech. in Aeronautical Engineering, with competitive TS EAMCET last round cutoff ranks of 24936, 26453 and 39430, respectively. These ranks are valid for the students belonging to the General HS quota.

For 2026 admission, candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important TS EAMCET dates. TS EAMCET is a state-level entrance test for admission to BE, B.Tech, BPharm, PharmD, B.Sc, B.FSc, and BVSc courses.

The TS EAMCET cutoff has been released for admission to Mahaveer Institute Of Science and Technology. Candidates can view or download the consolidated year-wise and round-wise TS EAMCET cutoff lists in the form of PDF from the table below for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course.

Candidates can view the other specialisation options available for admission at multiple colleges accepting the TS EAMCET entrance exam. The comparison below is based on the last round cutoff rank of TS EAMCET for the General HS category students.

The Mahaveer Institute Of Science and Technology MBA cutoff 2025 for the General HS category in the last round was 19265. In contrast, the cutoff in 2024 was 19878, and the 2023 cutoff was 12157 for the aforementioned course and category. According to this data, we can say that the competition for MBA has been fluctuating in the last 3 years.

hostel_campus.college_name: Mahaveer Institute of Science and Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Our college infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: In our EC department, the labs are well-equipped with a lot of things like analog circuits, microprocessors, etc. The library has a good collection of books, there are thousands of books in our library. The hostel is good, but the food is bad. Wi-Fi is also available in our hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent AI & ML branch and curriculum with great labs.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the AI & ML department is good. We had the latest labs which are essential for our projects. The library is well stocked with books and the latest journals on Data Science. Regarding the hostel, the rooms are big, and we had gym and sports facilities, but the food is bad in taste.

reviews.review_heading: Great learning environment for arrow with decent infrastructure and supportive faculty.
reviews.review_text: The aeronautical department has well-equipped labs, such as aerodynamic and other labs. The library is consulted with relevant technical journals and textbooks. The campus has defined Wi-Fi connectivity in the hostel, and the rooms are spacious. Well-maintained mess is available. Food is not as good as you expect compared to the private hostels.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with lot of opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are very good and we have a good library. The campus and hostel contain Wi-Fi and LAN connection. We can stay in hostel or we can go as a day scholar. The sports and medical facilities are available very well. The canteen is also available for students.

reviews.review_heading: Do not expect placements and well faculty.
reviews.review_text: Overall an average college with a mix of positives and negatives. The campus environment was definitely one of its strengths its calm and green and gives students a comfortable place to study and enjoy college life. Placements were somewhat limited and only a few companies visit regularly. Students who put in extra effort can get placed but overall the placement support still needs improvement.

reviews.review_heading: It has really good infrastructure and faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is also wonderful, with a full range of greenery plants, and the classroom is also fully digital with projectors and spacious. There are a lot of books in our library. All types of books are available, and the hostel is too bad. The food is bad in taste, and the quality of the food is poor.

reviews.review_heading: This college is actually good, but not as expected.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is also wonderful, full of greenery plants, classrooms, and fully digital with projectors and spacious. There are a lot of books in the library. All types of books are available. The hostel is average, and the food is bad in taste. Poor quality of food is provided in the college hostel.

reviews.review_heading: My college is good for studying and has a good faculty.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are available in my course classrooms, labs, and library. Wi-Fi is provided separately for the hostel and the college. For hostels, separate hostels for boys and girls. The quality of the food, canteen, medical, sports, and games is good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a better college in our surroundings.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is also wonderful, full of green plants, and the classrooms are also fully digital with projectors and spacious. There are a lot of books in the library, and all types of books are available. The hostel is average, and the food is bad in taste. Poor quality of food is provided.

reviews.review_heading: Don’t expect to achieve high placements. If you want to attend this college, keep that in mind.
reviews.review_text: We have Wi-Fi, digital classrooms, and digital apps, along with good computers. The laboratories are also well-equipped. The library contains over one lakh books. However, the quality of facilities in the hostel is poor. The food in the mess is subpar, but the canteen offers better options. There are many sports and games available on campus.

reviews.review_heading: They need to improve the food quality and improve placements.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available in our department, like Wi-Fi, are not so good. Labs are also not good, and classrooms are somewhat better. Facilities in our hostel are lacking, and the quality of food is not so good. The mess needs improvement.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure should be built and hostel food should improve.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course are like Wi-Fi which is not properly working, the labs are good, and the classrooms are better to sit and study. The quality of facilities in our hostel is not good food is not considered good in the dinner time.

reviews.review_heading: College has a good infrastructure and experienced faculty, we cab choose this college.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure. Wi-Fi and labs are also good, with working systems. Classrooms are big in size, with air-conditioning and projectors. College also provides separate hostel facilities for boys and girls, with Wi-Fi, gym equipment, clean and neat washrooms, and good food with full of quantity.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best colleges in Hyderabad.
reviews.review_text: All types of infrastructures are available. We have good practical labs. The machinery lab is awesome. All machines work well and give good results in practical. It is one of the best colleges for students who want to join engineering. We have a dream to become an engineer.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of no placements, but good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text:
College maintenance and infrastructure are not good. Hostel rooms were not clean and common bathrooms are for 50-60 people, which makes it uncomfortable. There are no proper washing areas for clothes or washing machines. 
College premises and washrooms were also not good.

college_info.intro:
DY Patil Pune popular programmes are BTech, MBBS, and BSc. MBBS students are taught Human Anatomy, Biochemistry, Physiology, and several other subjects. DY Patil Pune has been ranked at a top position by the NIRF 2025 under the Medical category. The university students are placed in top companies at top positions such as Qspider, Edunet Foundations, TATA Motors, Doggle, and Prodigy Infotech, and others. The university students are taught by expert faculty.
DY Patil Pune Medical faculty include a total of 114 professors and 134 Tutor/ Clinical Instructor/ Demonstrator, and others. DY Patil in Pune BTech students are taught technical as well as Managerial skills. Overall, it is one of the top universities offering quality education to students. review_content.General: Teachers were outstanding with great knowledge and supportive always. They gave sufficient time to resolve queries as SELMA provided best examples to understand the topics and most guiding when was in internships. They were always ready to cope with the hectic schedule and even assisted us whenever they were out of the station over the phone. Faculty members were super awesome and very much dedicated. Some of the teachers make you love the subject which they teach. It was too useful but a little bit lengthy with vast knowledge comprised of all fields such as marketing human resource, finance, and law contacts as well as detailed study tours with reputed firms and all collaborated project internships in the company to be finished in the last semester. The course impacted our future success in how we completed with knowledge and experience and really helpful.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: My honest review about my college.

review_content.Placements: Well about placements the college had good contacts. Department tried to bring various companies to college for the benefit of the students. A lot of companies carry out campus drives in our college for different branches. We had Tata, Toyota, HCL, and many other companies. Even foreign companies visited the campus for placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hence, creating a lot of convenience for students to travel to different campuses. But you could opt for different hostels because there were various hostels surrounding the college. No compulsion to join the college hostel. But 1 thing good about the college hostel was security with time limits for students at night and a gym in hostel. What else you need in hostel, you had a freaking gym in the hostel.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: My honest review of my college.

review_content.Placements: The college had good placements. Major recruiters were come like Tata Motors, Bajaj, and L&T. 10-15% of students got placed. The average package was Rs. 4 LPA. DY Patil Institute of Management had a separate placement cell. Teachers in the placement cell will guide and coach us with all aspects regarding how to attend an interview. We have been coached in such a way that we have the confidence to crack any interview without fear.
review_content.Infrastructure: I have not experienced the hostel facilities and the mess food of DY Patil Institute of Management. However, I have had friends who stayed in the college hostel. I have never seen them so I can't say anything regarding the hostel or the mess food.

faqs.answer: Interested students seeking DY Patil Vidyapeeth admissions must note that admissions are held according to the entrance test basis. The candidate can apply on the basis of prominent prescribed entrance tests like JEE Mains, MHT CET, GATE, NEET, CAT, etc. Students can visit the official website and head to the admissions portal by clicking on the relevant section.
faqs.question: Q: Can I get direct admission at DYP Pune?

faqs.answer: No, direct admission is not available at DY Patil Pune. Admission to all the UG & PG courses are entirely entrance-based. Candidates seeking for admission at DY Patil Pune are required to qualify for university-level entrance exam. The university conductes separate exams for every course. Futher, for admission to courses such as MBA, MBBS, BTech, etc., the university also accepts entrance exams such as CAT, MAT, NEET UG, JEE Main or state-level exams such MHT CET exams. It's mandatory for every candidate to qualify for the exam and apply online on the official website.
faqs.question: Q: Is there direct admission available in DY Patil Pune?

review_summary.college_name: DY Patil Pune Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: My honest review about my college.

content.Placements: Overall, the course had variety but diverged into niche research and strategy side. Well about placement the college had good contacts. Department tried to bring various companies to college for benefit of the students. A lot of companies carry out campus drive in our college for different branches. We had Tata, Toyota, HCL, and many other companies. Even foreign companies visited the campus for placement.
content.Infrastructure: I didn't opt for college hostel because the hostel was a bit congested I felt for myself. 2 rooms were joined together which had 6 beds, 1 bathroom, and 1 toilet. But you could opt for different hostel because there were various hostel surrounding the college. No compulsion to join the college hostel. But 1 good thing about the college hostel was security.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: My honest review about my college.

content.Placements: Lot of companies meet this college. According to their criteria, students get selected for the job. Before 2-3 days two companies came to this college and 17 students were selected for the placements. Companies like Infosys, Tech Mahindra, etc., came to the college.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel facility was available for first year students only. Hostel fee was Rs 35,000 for a year. Hostel rooms were good enough. Mess was also available.
content.Faculty: Teachers were outstanding with great knowledge and supportive always. They gave sufficient time to resolve queries as SELMA provided best examples to understand the topics and most guiding when was in internships. They were always ready to cope with the hectic schedule and even assisted us whenever they were out of the station over the phone. Faculty members were super awesome and very much dedicated. Some of the teachers make you love the subject which they teach. It was too useful but a little bit lengthy with vast knowledge comprised of all fields such as marketing human resource, finance, and law contacts as well as detailed study tours with reputed firms and all collaborated project internships in the company to be finished in the last semester. The course impacted our future success in how we completed with knowledge and experience and really helpful.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: My honest review about my college.

content.Placements: Well about placements the college had good contacts. Department tried to bring various companies to college for the benefit of the students. A lot of companies carry out campus drives in our college for different branches. We had Tata, Toyota, HCL, and many other companies. Even foreign companies visited the campus for placements.
content.Infrastructure: Hence, creating a lot of convenience for students to travel to different campuses. But you could opt for different hostels because there were various hostels surrounding the college. No compulsion to join the college hostel. But 1 thing good about the college hostel was security with time limits for students at night and a gym in hostel. What else you need in hostel, you had a freaking gym in the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: My honest review of my college.

content.Placements: The college had good placements. Major recruiters were come like Tata Motors, Bajaj, and L&T. 10-15% of students got placed. The average package was Rs. 4 LPA. DY Patil Institute of Management had a separate placement cell. Teachers in the placement cell will guide and coach us with all aspects regarding how to attend an interview. We have been coached in such a way that we have the confidence to crack any interview without fear.
content.Infrastructure: I have not experienced the hostel facilities and the mess food of DY Patil Institute of Management. However, I have had friends who stayed in the college hostel. I have never seen them so I can't say anything regarding the hostel or the mess food.

admission_process.title: DY Patil Pune Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: DY Patil Pune admission process begins with theregistrationfor respective undergraduate and postgraduate courses on its official website. Before registering candidates seeking admission must ensure that they are meeting the specifiedeligibilitycriteria set by the university. Next, candidates must appear foruniversity-level examsfor their desired courses. To get to know the detailed process for DY Patil admission 2025, refer to the detailed steps below:
Step 1: Fill out the application form

For DY Patil course admissions, candidates have to fill out anonline application formand register for the respective entrance exam. The application form can be fetched on the official website of the university, once the application window gets open. While filling out the application form, candidates have to mention all the basic details such as personal and educational information along with paying the application fee. The application fee may vary from course to course. Simultaneously, aspirants must also pay for the processing/ entrance exam fee at the time of filling out the application form.
Website:https://admissions.dpu.edu.in/
Step 2: Selection Rounds

DY Patil admission process is entirely based on valid scores of entrance exams. Most of the entrance exams are conducted at the university level. For admission to MBA, BTech, and other Medical courses, the university also accepts scores of state/ national-level entrance exams such as CAT,MAT, JEE Main, NEET UG, etc. These candidates can directly apply online and appear for the next selection round such as GD/PI (wherever applicable).
Step 3: Result Declaration & Counselling Process

After the completion of all selection rounds, the university declares the course-wise final result. By fetching the result from the university's official website, candidates can appear for the counselling process for the final seat allotment as per the defined schedule.
Step 4: Final Admission

Once the selection process is completed, the selected candidates have to pay a certain amount ofcourse feeto confirm their seats for the respective course. University eligibility & registration fees are payable for the first year only viaNEFT/ RTGS/ DDin favor of:'Registrar, Dr. D. Y. Patil Vidyapeeth,Pimpri, Pune'.
Dr. D.Y. Patil Vidyapeeth includes various components in the fee structure which include tuition fees, hostel fees, medical insurance, mess, and other deposits.

Coming to affordability,It is among the causes of the high dropout rates from colleges and universities. While financial aid and student loans have made education more accessible, qualifying for a loan or scholarship still has conditions that can be difficult to meet. Below areD.Y. Patil Vidyapeeth tuition feesalong with average package details for popular courses:
Popular Courses
Tuition Fees (Investment)
Average Package (Return)
INR 2.6 lakh - INR 6 lakh
INR 5.5 lakh - INR 25.45 lakh
Note: Candidates must note that this information is sourced from the official website of the institute/university-sanctioning body and is subject to change.

The seat intake of each programme varies at D.Y. Patil Pune. Medical programmes have a limited number of seats available, while Management courses have a larger intake. The seat distribution of theMBBSprogramme is212forGeneral Categorystudents and38forNRIstudents, so the total seats are 250 at the university. Seats will be allotted to eligible students based on a valid score obtained in the respective entrance examination. Check out below the seat intake for popular courses at D.Y. Patil Vidyapeeth, Pune:
Popular Courses
Seats Intake

ForAllied Health Science seats, All India merit lists will be prepared on the basis of the AICET exam. Eligible candidates should fill out the online application form to apply for the reservation, and submit their cast certificates. If any seat remains, that will be allotted to inter-merit students of the common merit list i.e. General category. For other programmes reservation details, candidates can visit the official website. placement_data.title: DY Patil Pune Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: As per the latest DY Patil Vidyapeeth Pune placement report of School of Science and Technology overall 73 companies have offered placements or internships to students in 2025. While the placement process for 2025 is still ongoing, more than 320 students have secured placements or are doing internships.The highest PPO offered was INR 12 LPA . In 2024, the total number of placements was more than 200 . The highest stipend recorded was INR 50,000 per month. Currently, there are 62 internships in progress, which amounted to 215 in 2024, with opportunities at prominent companies such as Qspider, Edunet Foundations, TATA Motors, Doggle, and Prodigy Infotech,etc.

A total of 192 students secured placements and the average package stood at INR 5.40 LPA. For MBA placements 2024, the highest package recorded during DY Patil VIdyapeeth, Pune placements, the highest package recorded was INR 12 LPA .

DY Patil Pune NEET UG cutoff 2025 has been published for admission to MBBS and BDS courses for various categories and rounds under the All India quota. For the General AI category, the cutoff in the last round for the MBBS course was 660786. On the other hand, for the BDS course, the last round cutoff was 786096. This difference in the ranks suggests that the competition for the MBBS course is higher than for the BDS course.

DY Patil Pune MBBS Cutoff 2025 was 660786 for the General AI category. In 2024 and 2023, the cutoffs were 377556 and 353475, respectively, in the last round. After analysing the cutoff ranks we can say that the competition has decreased over the years.
For more such analyses for other rounds, categories, course, see the table below and use the filters given.

Dr. D.Y. Patil Vidyapeeth, Pune Cutoff 2025 was released in the form of opening and closing ranks. Students who want to gain a seat at this institute for the MBBS and BDS courses via the entrance exam can refer to the table below to know the important dates for the same.

Dr D.Y. Patil Vidyapeeth, Pune, accepts the NEET UG entrance examination results for admission to the MBBS and BDS courses. Students who participated in the NEET UG counselling rounds can refer to the table below to know the cutoff round and year-wise for 2025, 2024, and 2023. Students who are preparing for the upcoming academic term can also look at the qualifying ranks to get an idea of the cutoff trends.

The DY Patil Pune NEET PG cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to the PG-level courses till round 2 for all categories under the All India quota. For the General AI category, the last round cutoff ranged between 37823 and 121505, wherein MD in General Medicine was the hardest course for admission. On the other hand, the easiest course for admission was the MD in Community Medicine for this aforementioned category.

The DY Patil Pune MD Cutoff 2025 is acceptable for admission to MS and MD courses. For the General AI category, the top three hardest courses for admission were MD in General Medicine, followed by MD in Dermatology, Venereology and Leprosy, and MD in Radiodiagnosis, with the round 2 closing ranks of 37823, 45698 and 48632, respectively.

Analysing the cutoff for the previous years helps students better prepare for the upcoming admission cycle. DY Patil Pune accepts the NEET PG results for admission to MD and MS courses. The DY Patil Pune NEET MDS Cutoff 2025 was published for admission to the MDS course for all rounds and various categories under the All India quota. For the General AI category, the last round cutoff fell between 4598 and 22455, wherein MDS in Prosthodontics and Crown & Bridge proved to be the toughest course for admission, with the lowest rank of 4598. The lower the rank, the higher the competition.

The DY Patil Pune MDS cutoff 2025 was released in the form of opening and closing ranks. According to the last round, the hardest course among all was MDS in Prosthodontics and Crown & Bridge, with a cutoff rank of 4329. In 2024 and 2023, the cutoffs were 3820 and 6299, respectively.

This difference in the ranks says that the competition for this course has seen fluctuation in past years. Students can check out the table below to know the cutoff for 2025, 2024, and 2023 for various other cou

Analysing the cutoffs of the previous years helps students gain a better understanding of the cutoff trends over the years. This understanding might help candidates better prepare for the upcoming academic cycle.

The table below lists the cutoff details for the General AI category, round and year-wise. For the General AI category, the last round rank was 593550; in 2024, the last round rank was 461853. This difference in the ranks suggests the competition has decreased over the last 2 years.

Apart from NEET MDS, DY Patil Pune offers admission to MDS courses based on Maharsahtra NEET PG. According to the NIRF Ranking 2025, the institute has been awarded #71 rank in the Overall category, #41 under University, #12 under Medical, and #4 under Dental. The institute is a top-ranked institute because of its equipped infrastructure and well-educated faculty. Check the article given below to know details around DY Patil Pune rankings.

nirf.description:
DY Patil Pune has received strong ranks by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the NIRF 2025. In the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, DY Patil Pune fell 8 ranks to #71 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
One can observe that within the category of 'University', the institute's ranking has scaled up when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, DY Patil Pune climbed 3 ranks to #41 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
It is to be noticed that the institute has shown a fluctuating trend in the 'Medical' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, DY Patil Pune fell 1 rank to #12 rank in the 'Medical' category by the NIRF ranking.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Dr. D.Y. Patil Vidyapeeth Global Business School And Research CentreReviewed on 15 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My honest review about my college.
reviews.review_text: I didn't opt for college hostel because the hostel was a bit congested I felt for myself. 2 rooms were joined together which had 6 beds, 1 bathroom, and 1 toilet. But you could opt for different hostel because there were various hostel surrounding the college. No compulsion to join the college hostel. But 1 good thing about the college hostel was security.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Dr. D.Y. Patil Vidyapeeth Global Business School And Research CentreReviewed on 10 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My honest review about my college.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facility was available for first year students only. Hostel fee was Rs 35,000 for a year. Hostel rooms were good enough. Mess was also available.

reviews.review_text: Hence, creating a lot of convenience for students to travel to different campuses. But 1 thing good about the college hostel was security with time limits for students at night and a gym in hostel. What else you need in hostel, you had a freaking gym in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: My honest review of my college.
reviews.review_text: I have not experienced the hostel facilities and the mess food of DY Patil Institute of Management. However, I have had friends who stayed in the college hostel. I have never seen them so I can't say anything regarding the hostel or the mess food.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Dr. D. Y. Patil Vidyapeeth- Center for Online LearningReviewed on 26 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Online MBA is excellent choice for working professionals

reviews.review_heading: My experience at Dr. D.Y. Patil School of Design.
reviews.review_text: Various labs like the CAD lab, drawing studio, illustration and graphic design studio, photography studio, model making studio, furniture working studio, lighting studio, and many other labs and studios are there to help students learn better and earn real industry experience.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Dr. D.Y. Patil School of DesignReviewed on 24 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is shaping the future of students for creative excellence.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is modern and enhances the learning experience for students. The hostel provides food, laundry, a TV room, a study room, cleaning staff members, and thoughtful design to support academic, creative, and extracurricular needs for students who are doing the design course.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Dr. D.Y. Patil School of DesignReviewed on 24 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely fully satisfied with the faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in our college are the best. We have got the best infrastructure that I haven't seen before. We have the best PCs in our labs and the best Wi-Fi. I don't live in a hostel but I can say that there is good hygiene and better food too. There are different clubs for sports.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Dr. D.Y. Patil School of DesignReviewed on 24 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Students can culminate their vision here.
reviews.review_text: The quality of food can be better. The canteen is very lively and there are limited sports facilities. The library is very lively and has a lovely atmosphere. The infrastructure is very comforting overall.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Dr. D.Y. Patil School of DesignReviewed on 24 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It provides empowering minds and an inspiring future.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is decent with a hygienic environment. There are maids who clean our rooms every day. There are guards on every floor for safety or to provide help whenever needed. The hostel has games to pass our time but sometimes there are water issues.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Dr. D.Y. Patil School of DesignReviewed on 24 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It provides the best experience. It has the best faculty members, friends, etc.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is best in the college. Every floor has a good interior and comfortable nature. It provides the hostel facilities with good faculty members. The hostel has full infrastructure in it. I stay in the hostel. I had the best experience.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Dr. D.Y. Patil School of DesignReviewed on 24 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is the best college with the best staff and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: There are two girls' hostels on the college campus with great security. The infrastructure of both hostels is good. The atmosphere around is also good. The meal is provided on time. Good quality water is provided. The electricity is good too. It is very neat and clean.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Dr. D.Y. Patil School of DesignReviewed on 24 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is the best college with the best staff members and the best infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is the best in college. Every floor has a new interior and is comfortable. It also provides a hostel facility and it gives us all the infrastructure in them. I personally stay in the hostel, and it is the best one. Water supply, food supply, and electricity are the best.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Dr. D.Y. Patil School of DesignReviewed on 20 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My experience at Dr. D.Y. Patil School of Design.
reviews.review_text: The college has a very cozy lobby area for the students to sit and take a breath, along with clean and hygienic washrooms on every single floor that are cleaned regularly. We also have water coolers with pure water on every floor. The canteen also has clean, healthy, and tasty food.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Dr. D.Y. Patil School of DesignReviewed on 20 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: One of the best colleges for designing in the country.
reviews.review_text: The college is really great and top of the line. It really offers a great studying environment for us which helps us concentrate on our art to improve it more. It has new generation monitors and PCs for us to use the software to learn more about new-gen AI.

They are majorly involved in the Operations sector, followed by the Engineering and Sales sector.

faqs.answer: YBN University accepts admission through both CUET and its own entrance test, YBN University Entrance Test (YBNUET). YBN University conducts its own entrance exam to select candidates for Ph.D. admission. Candidates must have received a passing grade in the relevant subject in Class 12 from an approved board in order to be considered for admission to any undergraduate programme at YBN University.
faqs.question: Q: What is the entrance exam for YBN University?

faqs.answer: YBN University BSc registrations may open around May/ Jun. Candidates seeking admission must register and apply on or before the prescribed deadline. The admission office of the university can also be contacted for updates related to the form release and course admission.
faqs.question: Q: Are admissions open for BSc in YBN University?

faqs.answer: Yes, YBN University offers BSc programmes in different course specialisations. Some of the available course specialisations are Nursing, Post Basic Nursing, Agriculture, Optometry, etc. Candidates who are Class 12 or equivalent examination pass with required aggregate the subject combination can apply. The eligible students can go to the official website to register and apply.
faqs.question: Q: Is there BSc available at YBN University?

faqs.answer: YBN University BSc admission cycle commences with the form release and application submission. Aspirants who fulfil the course-specific eligibility requirements can apply. The selection for course admission is done either on a merit-basis or as per performance in the accepted examinations. YBNU may accept scores of CUET, or applicable national/ state/ university level examinations. Once the selection procedure is completed, the aspirants can pay the admission fee amount to lock their seats.

admission_process.title: YBN University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: YBN University admissions are both merit and entrance-based. The university accepts entrance exam for courses such as MBA, BBA, PhD, etc.YBN University Ranchioffers98 UG, PG, diploma and PhD programmessuch as BHMS, BSc, B.Ed, BTech, Diploma in Engineering, Diploma in Journalism, MSc Information Technology, MBA, MPH, etc. across18 schools, namely School of Legal Studies, School of Medical Sciences, School of Nursing, School of Education, among others.

YBN University Ranchi offers multiple programmes under various disciplines, namely Science, Engineering and Technology, Law, Journalism and Mass Communication, Computer Science and Information Technology, Arts and Humanities, etc. The duration of these programmes varies from course to course. YBN University admission process includes multiple steps. Candidates are first required to register for the preferred programme followed by participating in the selection rounds. Below are the steps to get a seat in YBN University:
STEP 1: YBN University Application Process 2025

The mode of application is online. Candidates need to apply with the basic details to generate login credentials. Additionally, candidates need to login and fill out the application form for the preferred course. Aspirants need to upload a photograph as a document in the application form.
STEP 2: Selection

YBN University selects candidates for most of the UG and PG courses based on merit in the last qualifying exam. The university accepts CAT, XAT and other Management entrance exams for MBA admission. YBN also conducts an entrance test for BBA programme.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation & Fee Payment
Once the selection process is over, aspirants need to confirm their admission by paying the course fee.

hostel_campus.college_name: YBN University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

facilities: Infrastructure: The campus might have well-designed buildings, academic blocks, administrative offices, libraries, laboratories, and research centers.
Green Spaces: Universities often have green and landscaped areas, gardens, and open spaces where students can relax and study.
Hostel Facilities: For outstation students, the campus could offer hostel accommodations with basic amenities.
Cafeteria and Dining Facilities: There might be canteens or cafeterias that provide food options for students and staff.
Sports and Recreational Facilities: Universities often have sports grounds, indoor sports complexes, gyms, and other facilities to promote physical fitness and extracurricular activities.
Auditoriums and Seminar Halls: Spaces for organizing academic events, seminars, conferences, and cultural programs.
Technology and Connectivity: Wi-Fi connectivity throughout the campus to facilitate access to online resources.
Medical Facilities: Some universities may have medical centres or tie-ups with nearby hospitals to provide medical assistance to students and staff.
Student Activity Centers: Places where students can engage in various clubs, societies, and extracurricular activities.
Security Measures: Universities often have security arrangements to ensure the safety of students and the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Affordable practical electrical engineering diploma with supportive faculty.
reviews.review_text: YBN University Ranchi offers a comprehensive environment for students. Classrooms equipped with air conditioning and modern audio-visual tools like LCD projectors facilitate interactive learning classes. Labs state-of-the-art labs with advanced pieces of equipment. Sports is also good and engaging.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with faculty and fee.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure at this university is good and is still under construction. There are different types of areas for different sectors. The hostel is good, and the price is affordable. Although we may have concerns about the infrastructure at the moment, but in two or three years this university will have great infrastructure.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by School of Pharmacy, Kawali, YBN UniversityReviewed on 29 Jul 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Choose this college for degree purpose only .
reviews.review_text:
Facilities are getting better day to day. 
Wi-Fi and a library are available but the college is in a very remote area, due to which you can face problems. You have to walk for 5 to 6 km every day if you attend regular classes. Bus facilities are available but the whole day gets wasted as bus timing is very poor.
9 AM to 5 PM is the timing of the college .

reviews.review_heading: Review of YBN University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. Classrooms are well-maintained and equipped with huge boards. Our college is Wi-Fi enabled. The library is average. They provide Wi-Fi facilities in labs, so you could have a better experience and understanding. Our college provides sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: College supports you in every possible manner
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available within college premises and the speed of Wi-Fi is also fine. Labs, classrooms and library are regularly cleaned and maintained. The quality of food at the college is also fine and they prepare different food at different days and special food on special occasions.

reviews.review_heading: Review of YBN University.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available within college premises, and the speed is also fine. Labs, classrooms and library are regularly cleaned and well-maintained. The quality of food is good, and they prepare different food items on different days, and special food is provided on special occasions.

reviews.review_heading: If Ranchi is the only option, then I suggest opting for YBN.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is average. Hostels for the second year are not well-maintained. Classrooms have all the necessities that are required. The canteen is good, but it is a bit costly. Our college organises sports and cultural events every year.

reviews.review_heading: A good university with some ups and downs but it felt like my home.
reviews.review_text: Rooms are generally shared (double, triple, or dormitory-style), with individual beds, study tables, and cupboards. Single rooms may be available at a higher cost. Common areas include lounges, recreation rooms, and sometimes a study hall. Sanitation facilities have shared or attached bathrooms with basic amenities. It has better hostels and there might be a hot water supply and regular maintenance. Most hostels offer Wi-Fi, though speed and reliability vary. Security includes CCTV cameras, biom...

reviews.review_heading: Review of YBN University.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is huge. Our college has good environment. It is peaceful. We have well-equipped labs. Our college provides hostels for boys and girls. It provides many facilities like an ambulance, a canteen, a playground, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good teachers and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of our college were very good and attractive. Classrooms were very good. Ground and hostel were good.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college but budget-friendly.
reviews.review_text: The hostel and food are average. It has well-equipped labs, a Wi-Fi campus, a big library, and classrooms. They are smartly equipped with projectors and smart screens. Sports facilities are available with a basketball court, volleyball court, indoor sports like table tennis, and other board games.

reviews.review_heading: College is good and is upgrading every day.
reviews.review_text: There are libraries, labs, Wi-Fi, classrooms, and the infrastructure is good compared to other colleges. There are game rooms and medical facilities. Mess and canteen food is average. Overall, it is possible to survive here.

college_info.college_name: YBN University Scholarship Details

paragraphs: YBN University offers scholarships to meritorious students and students from economically weaker sections of society and others. YBN University scholarship applies to all the students who are admitted to the UG and PG programmes of a particular academic year. Scholarships are awarded to a candidate based on their performance in any of the following categories:
Merit Scholarship: Scholarships are awarded to candidates based on their performance on the national entrance exam or toppers of the centre and state boards.
Financial Aid: Scholarships are awarded to candidates based on need-based, orphan applicants, persons with certain disability, and defence and central armed police forces.

college_info.intro: PSG Institute of Advanced Studies offers courses on a UG, PG, and diploma level in many streams such as Engineering, Management, Science, Arts, and others. BTech/ BE and MBA are the popular programmes offered at PSG Institute of Advanced Studies. The institute offers a full-time four-year BTech/ BE programme. The BTech/BE programme offered at the institute covers core courses in the areas of CSE, Mechanical, Electrical, Mechatronics, Robotics & Automation, and others. The MBA programme offered by the PSGIAS is a two-year programme. It is offered in several specialisations, including Marketing, Finance, Business Analytics, and others. The below-mentioned are PSG Institute of Advanced Studies popular programmes:

The institute has a career development cell and offers various job opportunities to the students. Candidates at PSG Institute of Advanced Studies get an opportunity to do an internship abroad during their visit to pursue their final year. Some of the companies associated with PSGIAS for placements are Hella India Electronics, Lucas TVS, Mold Masters, Mold Tech, Pricol, TVS Group, Venture Lighting, Caterpillar and many more.

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, KPMG and EY can be considered as some of the top recruiters of PSG Institute of Advanced Studies (PSGIAS). According to the information available, both KPMG and EY are among the top recruiters of PSG Institute of Management, which is a part of PSGIAS. They are also listed as top recruiters along with PWC and Deloitte in the placement details of PSG Institute of Management for the year 2024-25. fees_and_eligibility.overview: PSG Institute of Advanced Studies offers undergraduate and postgraduate courses across Engineering, Management, and Arts streams. At the UG level, PSG Institute of Advanced Studies offers BE, BE (Hons.), BA (Hons.), and others. The duration of BE & BE (Hons.) is four years and BA (Hons.) of three years duration. At the PG level, it offers an MBA and MTech with a three-year duration. Apart from the UG and PG programmes, it also offers Diploma and PG Diploma programmes. Admission to all courses is done on a merit basis, except the MBA programme. Below mentioned are the details regarding some of the and

faqs.answer: A:    PSG Institute of Advanced Studies BE fee is a cumulative of multiple components, such as tuition fee, abroad university fees, etc. The total tuition fee for the BTech/ BE course is INR 17.63 lakh- 64.06 lakh. Apart from tuition fees institute includes, there are a few components that are charged one-time by PSGIAS while some have to be paid semester-wise
faqs.question: What is the fee for B.Tech/B.E course at PSG Institute of Advanced Studies?

faqs.answer: A:    PSG IAS BA (Hons) fees is a cumulative of multiple components. Candidates are required to pay the course fee within one week after the issuance of the selection letter. The course fee payment can be done by demand draft/bank transfer (NEFT/RTGS). Tabulated below is the tuition fee for the offered BA Hons programmes:BA (H) CourseTotal Tuition Fee*International BusinessINR 3.54 lakhInternational FashionINR 5.3 lakhFurthermore, apart from this, the aspirants may have to pay an additional university fees (Abroad) of £17,000*.*The above-mentioned fee is taken from the official website/sanctioning body. It is still subject to changes and hence, is indicative.
faqs.question: What is the total fee for PSG Institute of Advanced Studies BA (H) course?

faqs.answer: A:    PSG Institute of Advanced Studies eligibility criteria varies course-wise. Candidates need to complete a minimum of Class 12 to apply for UG courses whereas, graduation is required to apply for PG programmes. Below is the eligibility criteria for PSGIAS courses:CourseCommon EligibilityBEClass 12 with a minimum of 45% aggregateMBAAny graduate degree with more than 55%-70% aggregate from a recognised universityBA (Hons)Class 12 or equivalent from a recognised boardBSc (Hons)Class 12 or equivalent from a recognised board
faqs.question: What are the eligibility criteria at PSG Institute of Advanced Studies - PSGIAS apart from national-level entrance exams?

faqs.answer: A:    Students need a composite score of 550 in MAT with a language percentile greater than 40 for admission to PSG Institute of Advanced Studies MBA course. Students may get admission if their MAT percentile ranges between 60 and 70. However, aspirants also need to fulfil other requirements specified for the MBA programme for admission.

reviews_list.batch_info: Post Graduate Diploma in Tool and Die Design - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: It is an excellent college for learning advanced technologies.

review_content.Placements: Till now, we are not placed due to this pandemic situation. Still, management is trying to get good placements even in this situation, which is a good quality effort taken by the management. Even German standard companies and MNC companies selected us, but we are waiting for a call. Salary packages offered may vary depending upon locations we are placed and depending on the skills of students. We get placed as a tool designer. Even sometimes, placements can be offered from product designing companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are very good in our institution. There are individual systems in labs, and classrooms have smart setups for a seminar. Shop floors are provided for doing project works. Medical facilities are provided. There are parking facilities, and the atmosphere is also good. Hostel, canteen and mess facilities are provided with good quality.

reviews_list.batch_info: Discontinued (SEP 2025) Master of Business Administration (MBA) - University of Toledo, USA - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Can join if you have lots of money to spend and want to chill out the part of education in India.

review_content.Placements: I am still studying, but from my seniors, I can say that getting a job is purely based on one's personal skills. One can opt for internships and gain experience, then get into a company. Initially, one can expect around 1000 euros as salary after all tax, and in 3 years, the salary can shoot up to even 3000 euros.
review_content.Infrastructure: No Wi-Fi facility is provided. The classrooms are good. The library is excellent. There is a hospital nearby by the same group. Since it is inside the city, there are lots of food places nearby. The hostel rooms are decent, nothing special. Labs are excellent, and one can find many advanced types of CNC machines and what not on the campus.

faqs.answer: No, students cannot join PSG Institute of Advanced Studies (PSGIAS) directly without any entrance exam. Admission to the institute's courses is granted based on the merit of students in last year's qualifying exam and the score obtained by them in entrance exams. However, PSGIAS provides opportunities for students to get international degrees awarded by universities abroad with a major part of study in India (thus reducing the overall expenses) under the credit transfer system.
faqs.question: Q: Can students join PSG Institute of Advanced Studies - PSGIAS directly without any entrance exam?

faqs.answer: Yes, PSG Institute of Advanced Studies offer MBA programmes in collaboration with foreign universities. The duration of these PG courses range from one and half years to two years. The three MBA courses are offered with the below-mentioned foreign universities:University of Toledo, USALeeds Becket University, UKNorthern Kentucky University, USAThe admission to these programmes is subject to fulfiment of eligibility and selection requirements. Interested candidates can visit the PSGIAS official website to apply.

faqs.answer: TNEA 2026 notification will be out in May 2026.TNEA stands for Tamil Nadu Engineering Admissions. The Directorate of Technical Education, Tamil Nadu conducts TNEA every year. It is an online counselling window. All Indian National candidates who wish to take admission to Government and Government Aided Engineering Colleges, University Departments and Constituent Colleges of Anna University, Annamalai University and for the seats surrendered by Self-Financing Engineering Colleges in Tamil Nadu have to apply for TNEA counselling.TNEA counselling is a Unified Single Window Admission System for Indian Nationals only. The courses offered via this online counselling are BE/BTech and BE (sandwich) courses. TNEA counselling is conducted online in 4 rounds as per the schedule. Candidates need to participate in corresponding rounds based on their rank.

individual_reviews.course: Post Graduate Diploma in Tool and Die Design - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: It is an excellent college for learning advanced technologies.

content.Placements: Till now, we are not placed due to this pandemic situation. Still, management is trying to get good placements even in this situation, which is a good quality effort taken by the management. Even German standard companies and MNC companies selected us, but we are waiting for a call. Salary packages offered may vary depending upon locations we are placed and depending on the skills of students. We get placed as a tool designer. Even sometimes, placements can be offered from product designing companies.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are very good in our institution. There are individual systems in labs, and classrooms have smart setups for a seminar. Shop floors are provided for doing project works. Medical facilities are provided. There are parking facilities, and the atmosphere is also good. Hostel, canteen and mess facilities are provided with good quality.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (SEP 2025) Master of Business Administration (MBA) - University of Toledo, USA - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Can join if you have lots of money to spend and want to chill out the part of education in India.

content.Placements: I am still studying, but from my seniors, I can say that getting a job is purely based on one's personal skills. One can opt for internships and gain experience, then get into a company. Initially, one can expect around 1000 euros as salary after all tax, and in 3 years, the salary can shoot up to even 3000 euros.
content.Infrastructure: No Wi-Fi facility is provided. The classrooms are good. The library is excellent. There is a hospital nearby by the same group. Since it is inside the city, there are lots of food places nearby. The hostel rooms are decent, nothing special. Labs are excellent, and one can find many advanced types of CNC machines and what not on the campus.

admission_overview.college_name: PSG Institute of Advanced Studies Admission 2025: Application, Dates, Fee & Selection

admission_process.title: PSG Institute of Advanced Studies Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: PSG Institute of Advanced Studies admissionsare primarily entrance-based. The institute conducts an entrance exam for admission to UG and PG courses.PSG Institute of Advanced Studiesoffers UG, diploma, PhD and PG courses in Engineering, Management, Arts and Science in collaboration with international universities. Interested candidates can apply online for PSGIAS admissions.

PSGIAS offers more than 15 courses including specialisations at UG and PG levels. The institute offers admission to PSGIAS courses based on the entrance exam. Candidates also need to meet the course-specific eligibility criteria to apply for admission. Below arePSG Institute of Advanced Studies coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Note:The eligibility for BE is taken from an unofficial source. Hence, data might vary.
Download:PSGIAS PG Brochure
PSG IAS Brochure

The fee for PSGIAS varies course-wise. Candidates need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the institute. PSGIAS, Tamil Nadu fees include multiple components, such as tuition fee, security deposit, hostel fee, etc. Below is thePSGIAS feefor all courses:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Admission to PSGIAS is merit/ entrance-based. The PSGIAS course admission is a multi-step procedure, involving application form filling, exam/selection, issuing of selection letter, and course fee payment. Below are the steps to get a seat in the institute:
STEP 1: PSGIAS Application Process 2025

Candidates meeting the course-specific eligibility can apply by filling out the online application form. For the application submission, a fee ofINR 1,000has to be paid. The application fee payment can be made via demand draft or via credit card/debit card/bank transfer.
STEP 2: Selection

The institute shortlists candidates within approximately two weeks of application submission. Admission is done based on merit in the entrance exam of PSG Institute of Advanced Studies. The students with a very good academic record do not need to take the test. After the shortlisting of applications, selection letters are issued to the candidates.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation
Further, the shortlisted candidates have to pay the course fee within one week of issuing of selection letter to confirm their admission.

faqs.question: What is the PSG Institute of Advanced Studies admission process for BTech?
faqs.answer: For thePSG Institute of Advanced Studies BE admission, a candidate must be Class 12 pass from CBSE/Tamil Nadu board with at least 45% aggregate (as per unofficial sources). Eligible students can visit the official website to register and apply. The institute then may required students to take the institutes' entrance exam. Students with very good academic record are exempted. The selection letters are then issued to the students. These students can pay the admission fee for seat confirmation. Th

faqs.question: Can students get selected at PSG Institute of Advanced Studies - PSGIAS with MAT range of 60-70 percentile?
faqs.answer: Students need a composite score of 550 in MAT with a language percentile greater than 40 for admission to PSG Institute of Advanced Studies MBA course. Students may get admission if their MAT percentile ranges between 60 and 70. However, aspirants also need to fulfil other requirements specified for the MBA programme for admission.

faqs.question: Can students join PSG Institute of Advanced Studies - PSGIAS directly without any entrance exam?
faqs.answer: No, students cannot join PSG Institute of Advanced Studies (PSGIAS) directly without any entrance exam. Admission to the institute's courses is granted based on the merit of students in last year's qualifying exam and the score obtained by them in entrance exams. However, PSGIAS provides opportunities for students to get international degrees awarded by universities abroad with a major part of study in India (thus reducing the overall expenses) under the credit transfer system.

faqs.question: What is the last date to pay PSG Institute of Advanced Studies course fees?
faqs.answer: The institute allows selected candidates to pay the course fee within one week after the offer letters are issued. There is no fee submission deadline available as of now.PSG Institute of Advanced Studies course feepaymentfor the respective programme can be done by demand draft or bank transfer (NEFT/RTGS). Aspirants must submit the course fee on time or their admission status shall remain pending.

faqs.question: When will the TNEA notification be out?
faqs.answer: TNEA 2026 notification will be out in May 2026.TNEA stands for Tamil Nadu Engineering Admissions. The Directorate of Technical Education, Tamil Nadu conducts TNEA every year. It is an online counselling window. All Indian National candidates who wish to take admission to Government and Government Aided Engineering Colleges, University Departments and Constituent Colleges of Anna University, Annamalai University and for the seats surrendered by Self-Financing Engineering Colleges in Tamil Nadu have to apply for TNEA counselling.TNEA counselling is a Unified Single Window Admission System for Indian Nationals only. The courses offered via this online counselling are BE/BTech and BE (sandwich) courses. TNEA counselling is conducted online in 4 rounds as per the schedule. Candidates need to participate in corresponding rounds based on their rank.

review_content.Placements: Currently, I am in 3rd year, and my seniors have been placed in very well and big companies. description: Government Engineering College, Rajkot cutoff 2025 is finally out for aspirants seeking admission to the BTech and Integrated BTech courses. The JoSAA Round 1 seat allotment result 2025 has been released as opening and closing ranks across different categories belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates can scroll down to this page to view the Government Engineering College, Rajkot JEE Main cutoff 2025 for various specialisations and categories. A few more updates are below:

Government Engineering College, Rajkot cutoff 2025 was released via ACPC Gujrat entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 901632 and 907271 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 901632, B.E. in Computer Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 901078.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 901632.

For the OBC category students, the JEE Main last round closing ranks varied between 902676 and 914280 for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. Of all the BTech specialisations, the most competitive was B.E. / B.Tech. was the easiest grab for students with a least competitive cut
Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.
The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General AI category.

Government Engineering College, Rajkot GUJCET cutoff 2025 concluded with the final round cutoff list being published for various All India and Home State quota categories, like General, OBC, SC, etc. The cutoff was released for admission to B.E./ B.Tech course.
For the General AI category, the overall B.E./ B.Tech cutoff ranged from 901632 to 907271. According to the last round, the most competitive branch for admission was , followed by

This section provides the closing ranks for 2025, 2024, and 2023 for various categories, rounds, courses, and quotas. Students can refer to the table below to know the cutoff trend for the past 3 years.

In the final round for the General AI category, the Government Engineering College, Rajkot B.E./ B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged from 901632 to 907271, wherein the toughest branch was B.E. in Computer Engineering.

The Admission Committee for Professional Courses (ACPC) released the GUJCET 2025 cutoffs for various participating institutions for admissions to all branches, rounds, categories, and quotas. Aspirants aiming for admission to the next academic session can refer to the table provided below to know the important GUJCET 2026 dates.

Provided below are the GUJCET last three years, i.e., 2025, 2024 and 2023 cutoff data for all rounds for students to compare and get a better understanding of the admission changes and trends over the years, so that they have a better comprehension of how to prepare for their admissions for the upcoming year.

reviews.review_heading: It has a good crowd and a nice hostel. It is a proper Karan Johar-type college.
reviews.review_text: It's really good and luxurious. In the hostel, we feel at home. The food is also like home, so it's comfortable. Labs are good, and sometimes, they call industry specialists for the guest lecturers in the auditorium. The hostel is also good with facilities like a lift, food, and CCTV cameras.

reviews.review_heading: GECR: A growing hub for technical excellence and career opportunities.
reviews.review_text: There is a government hostel available for boys. They can stay there with minimal cost. The college has very good infrastructure, and there are different departments for every engineering line. There is also a mess available for students who stayed in a hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Good and bad things about GECR.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available at our college, such as a library, gymkhana, playground, tools for all types of sports, hostel, labs, computers, and a workshop for the mechanical department. The hostel is for students who do not belong to Rajkot, and the mess food is quite good, like home-cooked food. The college also has a doctor available for any medical emergency.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of infrastructure, not having good placement.
reviews.review_text: There is campus Wi-Fi, but it doesn't work everywhere and at all times. Different departments have their own Wi-Fi, but it also doesn't work or disconnects anytime. In the government hostel, there is no mess available at any time, and the canteen in the college has been closed for the last 2 years.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Government Engineering College, Rajkot.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is decent. We have good Wi-Fi, and the buildings are separate for each department. Hostels are okay, but they are old and requires a bit of paint. We have to manage our own meals. There are all the facilities in the hostel except Wi-Fi and mess.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with placement and management.
reviews.review_text: Faculty members do not respond that much, except for some faculty members. The Wi-Fi facility is very poor, classrooms are average, and labs are good. But the main problem is the library; they take fees for the library but do not provide the library facility. The hostel does not have a mess, and the canteen is not there. Food facilities in the local area are below average. There is no medical store in this area; you need to travel 4 km for medical needs.

reviews.review_heading: About My College: For Helping Out Strangers.
reviews.review_text: In my department, I am from computer engineering, so there were many computer labs, network labs, etc. For mechanical, there are separate workshops in which there are a variety of instruments. And for different branches, there are different facilities available.

reviews.review_heading: Honest review for Government Engineering College, Rajkot.
reviews.review_text: Our college is not too old, but still, its buildings are weak, even our Computer Department. Wi-Fi, lab, classrooms, and we don't even have a water cooler or water filter. Our government hostel doesn't even have proper facilities. The quality of food is the worst, no one can even eat it. Medical facilities are not good.

reviews.review_heading: Government Engineering College, Rajkot: Excellence in Education, Placement, and Innovation.
reviews.review_text: The Computer Engineering department at GEC Rajkot offers excellent facilities including well equipped labs with modern hardware and software spacious classrooms with projectors and campus wide Wi Fi for academic use. The library provides a rich collection of books journals and digital resources. Hostel facilities are basic but clean with adequate security and drinking water. The mess serves decent vegetarian meals while the canteen offers snacks. Medical support includes a health center for firs...

reviews.review_heading: BEAT Review for my college.
reviews.review_text: Our college and hostel provide Wi-Fi internet. The classrooms are very big. For silent reading, our college provides a two-floor, very good library. Many sports facilities are available at my college, like cricket, volleyball, carrom, etc. Medical facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: GEC Rajkot provides a comprehensive education with strong placement and internship opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Overall experience with campus life is excellent, but according to my pov, there is one major problem for girls. There are no government hostel facilities provided by the college for girls so they have to up-down from the city. Our college has impressive infrastructure to support both academic and extracurricular activities. The college arranges sports festivals once a year. The library has a vast collection of different types of books and academic resources for students. Any student with a coll...

reviews.review_heading: College was value for money with good faculty.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi connections at the college are really good, and the college's infrastructure is comfortable, which facilitates the study environment. And the buildings are separate according to department. Qualities in the hostel are good to live in; living rooms are well facilitated. Guards are provided for the safety. The food they provided was good, till I was there.

reviews.review_heading: Government Engineering College is best for placements.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our college and college hostel is very beautiful and amazing. Atmosphere and infrastructure of the college are the same as our home. All facilities are available at the hostel and college, for example, water supply, Wi-Fi, electricity, etc. A total of seven branches are available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Best placements, faculty, and atmosphere of our college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college and hostels is very beautiful and amazing. The atmosphere and infrastructure of the college are the same as our home. All facilities are available at hostels and college, e. g. , water supply, Wi-Fi, electricity, etc. A total of 7 branches are available at our college.

reviews.review_heading: College in brief and placement details.
reviews.review_text: The hostel has basic facilities but it's old and has problems but it's not strict. That's why it's 4 stars, otherwise 2.5 stars. It has no dining facilities and you need to manage your own meals. If you complain, they will fix the problems, but it takes time, so you have to be patient. You have to bring your own mattress.
