college_info.college_name: PJTSAU: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Ranking

highlights.summary:
NIRF 2025 Rankings are out. As per the latest NIRF 2025 rankings, PJTSAU ranks #37 under the category 'Agriculture and Allied Sectors'.

The TG EAPCET 2026 registration has commenced for PJTSAU admission to BPharma and BE/BTech courses. The deadline to register without a late fee is Apr 4, 2026. The entrance exam for BPharm is scheduled for May 4 and May 5, 2026, while the BE/BTech exam will be held from May 9 to May 11, 2026.

college_info.intro:
PJTSAU popular programmes are MBA and BTech. MBA and BTech students are placed in top companies in top sectors. MBA students are trained with modern methods of teaching. MBA and BTech students are taught presentation skills. BTech students can also go for non-technical fields such as Marketing, Sales, and others. Professor Jayashankar Agriculture University students are taught Engineering Mechanics, Design of Structures, Soil and Water Conservation Engineering, and others.
Professor Jayashankar Telangana State Agricultural University motivates students who are involved in the research work. Below mentioned are some of the Professor Jayashankar Telangana State Agricultural University Rajendranagar Hyderabad Telangana courses and their respective eligibility and fee:

faqs.answer: A:    Professor Jayashankar Telangana State Agricultural University (PJTSAU) has definitely made sure to excell its students in terms of placement. The placement records ranges upto 85 percent. From campus interviews to recruitment training, They have always chosen the best companies of the industry . ITC, AXIS Bank, Syngenta, Nagarjuna Dairy, NCCF and NFCL are some of the top recruiters here. The average package during placement is 6 Lacs Per year, which is pretty decent for a fresh talent. If

fees_and_eligibility.overview: PJTSAU offers UG, PG, and other courses to students. These courses are provided across Agriculture and various other streams. At the UG level, the university provides BSc and BTech courses to students. BTech is provided in two specialisations, namely Food Technology and Agricultural Engineering. At the PG level, the university offers MSc, MBA, and other courses to students. Professor Jayashankar University also provides PhD programmes to students. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by Professor Jayashankar Telangana State Agricultural University Hyderabad Telangana and their respective eligibility and :

faqs.answer: A:    The PJTSAU BSc fees is INR 45,550 per annum for course duration of four years as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is, however, subject to changes and hence, is indicative. This fee amount is a composition of various components such as refundable deposits, hotel deposit, tuition fee and more. Tabulated below is the detailed fee structure of PJTSAU BSc courses:ParticularsAmountTuition FeeINR 9,700Other Special FeeINR 12,700Library Deposit (Refundable)INR 2,500Hostel Deposit (Refundable)INR 5,500Mess Deposit (Refundable)INR 5,500Hostel Establishment ChargesINR 5,500 (Per Semester)Hostel Room Rent1,650 (Per Semester)* The hostel and mess charges are additional/extra.
faqs.question: What is the total tuition fees for PJTSAU BSc courses?

faqs.answer: A:    The total tuition fee for Professor Jayashankar Telangana State Agricultural University BTech ranges between INR 38,800 and INR 40,000. This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Candidates need to pay the course fee at the time of admission to confirm their seat in the university. Besides, aspirants also need to pay an application fee to register for BTech programme in the start.
faqs.question: What is the fee for B.Tech at PJTSAU?

faqs.answer: A:    There are 16 seats for MBA in Professor Jayashankar Telangana State Agricultural University (PJTSAU). The competition to get admission in university is increasing, You must apply for it as quick as possible.You can apply to get admission for MBA in PJTSAU through ICAR PG-AIEEA Examination. To know more regarding the fee structure and admission process for MBA in Professor Jayashankar Telangana State Agricultural University (PJTSAU), students can refer to the official website of the university.
faqs.question: How many students can do MBA at PJTSAU?

faqs.answer: A:    PJTSAU considers national or state-level entrance exams for admission. The university accepts TG EAPCET or ICAR CUET for admission to BSc and BTech programmes. For MTech, MBA and MSc courses, selection is based on ICAR AIEEA PG scores of the candidates.

review_content.Infrastructure: There is a huge academic section with department-wise. There are 10 departments on our campus. Near the academic section, there is a canteen and a ground to play on after finishing our classes. There is a well-facilitated hostel with more security for girls.

There is a large sports complex with encompassing facilities, along with a gym and indoor stadium.

review_summary.college_name: PJTSAU Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The college needs major improvement in all aspects.

content.Placements: Honesty, placements in PJTSAU are very disappointing for B.Sc. Agriculture students. Hardly 10-15% of students get placed, and the packages are very low compared to the effort and years of study. The highest package is not even attractive, the average is poor, and many students are left without any opportunity. Internships are also limited and not provided by reputed companies, so most students have to arrange them on their own. Top roles are not clear, mostly sales-related jobs which don't match our core field. Overall, the placement and internship support is extremely weak and does not meet expectations.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good learning experience with decent campus life but average placements.

content.Placements: Honesty, around 25% of our batch got placed. Packages go up to 4.7 LPA, average is 3 LPA to 4 LPA. Companies like Coromandel, Syngenta, Bayer, and Godrej hire here. Many of us do internships in these firms too. Most roles are sales, field, or project-related. I will recommend it to my juniors.
content.Infrastructure: Our department has good classrooms, labs, and a decent library, plus campus Wi-Fi that works fine most of the time. Hostel rooms are okay, not very fancy but manageable. Mess food is average, some days good, some days boring. Canteen snacks are better. Medical help is available on campus, though for big issues, we go outside. Sports grounds and games are nice. You will always find friends playing in the evening that's one of the best parts.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The wonderful PJTSAU at a glance.

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed in our course is based on EAMCET or AGRICET ranks. The package after this course is between 5 LPA to 10 LPA. Many seed companies recruit students after completing this course. Roles offered include AFO, Professor, SSC officer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: There is a huge academic section with department-wise. There are 10 departments on our campus. Near the academic section, there is a canteen and a ground to play on after finishing our classes. There is a well-facilitated hostel with more security for girls.

individual_reviews.course: MBA in Agri business Management - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Comprehensive review of Agribusiness Management at PJTSAU.

content.Placements: At PJTSAU, 40 percentage of the students will get placed, and the average package is about 5 Lacs per annum. Companies like Input Industries, Godrej Agrovet, Bayer, Syngenta, Cropwings, Khethari Agritech, Kapil Agro Farms, etc. Roles offered are analyst and etc.
content.Infrastructure: At PJTSAU, infrastructure facilities are quite excellent. Wi-Fi is available everywhere around the campus, laboratory and library facilities are well-equipped, and hostel facilities are available for both boys and girls. There is a large sports complex with encompassing facilities, along with a gym and indoor stadium.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of Professor Jayashankar Telangana State Agricultural University.

content.Placements: Around 70% of students are getting placed in several companies every year. The highest salary package offered is 10 LPA. The average salary package offered is 5 LPA and the lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA for many students. Syngenta, Marut Drones, and Coromandel are some of the companies. No internship, but a few may get one in Aghub. Roles offered by this course include AEO, AFO, AO, IBPS, etc.
content.Infrastructure: We have an academic block with a digital smart board and speakers with a high-speed internet connection. A central library is open to every student. Food is good, and canteen is below the academic block. PHC is available for medical assistance. Sports meets are conducted between colleges.

admission_overview.college_name: PJTSAU Admission 2025: Eligibility, Selection Process, Application & Fee

admission_process.title: PJTSAU Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: PJTSAU admissionsare entirely entrance exam based. PJTSAU inducts candidates for its UG programmes based on their ranks inEAMCETconducted by the Government of Telangana. The university also considersICAR AIEEA,TS POLYCETfor admission to specific courses.Professor Jayashankar Telangana State Agricultural University (PJTSAU), Hyderabad offers various UG, PG, diploma and doctoral level courses in Agricultural Science.

The university offers courses in full-time mode. Candidates who are interested in taking admission must apply online for the preferred course. Here are some of the important details regardingPJTSAU course admission:

Professor Jayashankar Telangana State Agricultural University (PJTSAU) offers a wide range of UG, PG, diploma, and doctoral level programmes in the field of Agricultural science. Candidates willing to enrol in the courses offered at PJTSAU must meet the eligibility and selection criteria established by the institute. Given below are the eligibility and selection process for some of the most optedPJTSAU courses:
Common Eligibility
Selection Criteria
Class 12 in relevant subjects

Bachelor's degree with a minimum of 50% aggregate (40% for reserved categories)

UG degree in relevant discipline with a minimum of 50% aggregate (40% for reserved categories)
ICAR AIEEA+ GDPI
PG degree in relevant subjects with a 50% aggregate
ICAR AICE – JRF/ SRF+ Counselling

The total fee of PJTSAU is a sum of various components such as tuition fee, library fee, medical, student activities, etc. Some of the components such as Library, laboratory deposits are refundable. Candidates need to pay the fee once their admission is confirmed in the university. Below is thePJTSAU feeand seat intake for popular courses:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

PJTSAU offers seats to candidates based on their entrance-exam scores. There is reservation in seats for SC, ST, PwD and other categories. Candidates falling under the reserved category need to provide the documents supporting their claim. Below is category-wise seat reservation for PJTSAU:

The admission process includes the application process, selection round, cutoff, merit list or counselling, and other steps.PJTSAU admissions begin with the opening of registration portal. Below are the steps to get a seat in PJTSAU:
STEP 1: PJTSAU Application Process 2025

Candidates meeting the eligibility criteria can apply online for the preferred course. Aspirants need to pay an application fee of INR 1800 (INR 900 for SC/ ST/ PH) for BTech and BSc courses under MPC stream. The application fee for PG courses is INR 2,000 (INR 1,000 for SC/ ST/ PwD).
STEP 2: Selection

PJTSAU considers TS EMACET scores for admission to UG courses. Candidates with CUET-UG ranks can also apply for any of the UG programmes. The selection for PG programmes is based on ICAR AIEEA PG. Selected candidates may further be called for a GDPI round for MBA programme. Aspirants scoring equal or abovePJTSAU cutoffare called for counselling.
STEP 3: Counselling and Admission Confirmation

Shortlisted aspirants need to participate in the counselling round. CUET-qualified candidates need to participate inCUET-UG Counselling. The university conducts counselling in offline mode. They further need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam is accepted by PJTSAU?
faqs.answer: PJTSAU considers national or state-level entrance exams for admission. The university accepts TG EAPCET or ICAR CUET for admission to BSc and BTech programmes. For MTech, MBA and MSc courses, selection is based on ICAR AIEEA PG scores of the candidates.

faqs.question: Is admission open at PJTSAU?
faqs.answer: Professor Jayashankar Telangana State Agricultural University (PJTSAU) admissions are closed for most of the courses. The university usually concludes the admissions by August and September. Candidates interested in taking admission must apply online on the university website for admission. The university opens the admission cycle with the opening of registration portal. Admission to all the courses of PJTSAU is based on entrance-exam scores.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at Professor Jayashankar Telangana State Agricultural University?
faqs.answer: No, it is not possible to enter in the college without giving the entrance exam. Professor Jayashankar Telangana State Agricultural University BE/ BTech admissions are based on Andhra Pradesh EAMCET score. For UG courses, the candidates will be selected on the basis of their performance in the TS EAMCET, conducted annually by the Department of Higher Education of the Government of Telangana. Selection to PG & Ph.D.programs will be done on the basis of marks obtained in the entrance test conducted by ICAR on all India basis.

faqs.question: How many students can do MBA at PJTSAU?
faqs.answer: There are 16 seats for MBA in Professor Jayashankar Telangana State Agricultural University (PJTSAU). The competition to get admission in university is increasing, You must apply for it as quick as possible.You can apply to get admission for MBA in PJTSAU through ICAR PG-AIEEA Examination.To know more regarding the fee structure and admission process for MBA in Professor Jayashankar Telangana State Agricultural University (PJTSAU), students can refer to the official website of the university.

paragraphs: The details for the 2023 drive are not released as of now. However, the NIRF report 2023 is out. According to the report, 59 UG (4-year) and 25 PG (2-year) students were placed during PJTSAU placements in 2022. The median package offered to UG (4-year) and PG (2-year) students was INR 3 LPA and INR 5.49 LPA , respectively.

data: INR 4.75 LPA (UG-4 year) INR 5 LPA (PG-2 year)

faqs.question: What are the different career prospects after BSc in Agriculture from PJTSAU?
faqs.answer: BSc Agriculture course from PJTSAU provides students with a thorough understanding of the many subjects of Agriculture such as crop production, soil science, animal husbandry, and agricultural economics. Students can expect a promising career after completion of BSc in agriculture. Prospect jobs for the aforementioned field include positions such as Agricultural Officer, Agricultural Analyst, Plant Breeder, and Seed Technologist. Moreover, Agriculture can also work in Agriculture sector in foreign countries. Core industries for Agriculture students to work after graduation include Pharmaceutical Industry, Chemical Firms, Actuaries, Academic Institutions.

faqs.question: How are MBA placements at PJTSAU?
faqs.answer: Professor Jayashankar Telangana State Agricultural University (PJTSAU) has definitely made sure to excell its students in terms of placement. The placement records ranges upto 85 percent. From campus interviews to recruitment training, They have always chosen the best companies of the industry . ITC, AXIS Bank, Syngenta, Nagarjuna Dairy, NCCF and NFCL are some of the top recruiters here. The average package during placement is 6 Lacs Per year, which is pretty decent for a fresh talent. If you are looking to complete your Masters here, you should definitely go for it. To know more regarding the admission process in Professor Jayashankar Telangana State Agricultural University (PJTSAU), refer to the official website of the university.

faqs.question: How are the placements at PJTSAU?
faqs.answer: Professor Jayashankar Telangana State Agricultural University is visited by top companies for placements. The below-mentioned are PJTSAU placement statistics based on the NIRF 2024 data: Particulars Statistics 2023 Median package INR 4.75 LPA (UG-4 year) INR 5 LPA (PG-2 year) No. of students placed 112 (UG-4 year) 58 (PG-2 year)

faqs.question: How are MBA placements at PJTSAU?
faqs.answer: Here are some of the salient features of MBA placements at Professor Jayashankar Telangana State Agricultural University (PJTSAU), based on the information available: Campus placements are facilitated by the university's Placement Cell and Center for Career Planning & Development. Placement drives are attended by top businesses from the FMCG, banking, food processing, and agriculture sectors, such as ITC, Amul, HUL, Nestle, Venky's, and NABARD. The average wage for the 2021–22 final placement was Rs 7.2 LPA, while the maximum salary package offered was Rs 11.7 LPA. More than 90% of MBA candidates who showed up for placements were assigned to prominent banks, FMCG companies, and agribusiness corporations. Pre-Placement Offers (PPOs) were also given to students by summer internship providers such as ITC, HAFED, NABARD, and others.

hostel_campus.college_name: PJTSAU Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: The college needs major improvement in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure at PJTSAU are very average and below expectations. Classrooms and labs are outdated with limited equipment, Wi-Fi is either very slow or not accessible everywhere, and the library lacks updated resources. Hostel conditions are also poor, with congested rooms, irregular water supply, and no proper maintenance. Mess food quality is bad, repetitive, and hygienic at times. Canteen options are limited, and medical facilities are minimal, making it difficult for stude...

reviews.review_heading: Good learning experience with decent campus life but average placements.
reviews.review_text: Our department has good classrooms, labs, and a decent library, plus campus Wi-Fi that works fine most of the time. Hostel rooms are okay, not very fancy but manageable. Mess food is average, some days good, some days boring. Canteen snacks are better. Medical help is available on campus, though for big issues, we go outside. Sports grounds and games are nice. You will always find friends playing in the evening that's one of the best parts.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Agricultural College, Sircilla - Professor Jayashankar Telangana State Agricultural UniversityReviewed on 9 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The wonderful PJTSAU at a glance.
reviews.review_text: There is a huge academic section with department-wise. There are 10 departments on our campus. Near the academic section, there is a canteen and a ground to play on after finishing our classes. There is a well-facilitated hostel with more security for girls.

reviews.review_heading: Comprehensive review of Agribusiness Management at PJTSAU.
reviews.review_text: At PJTSAU, infrastructure facilities are quite excellent. Wi-Fi is available everywhere around the campus, laboratory and library facilities are well-equipped, and hostel facilities are available for both boys and girls. There is a large sports complex with encompassing facilities, along with a gym and indoor stadium.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Professor Jayashankar Telangana State Agricultural University.
reviews.review_text: We have an academic block with a digital smart board and speakers with a high-speed internet connection. A central library is open to every student. Food is good, and canteen is below the academic block. PHC is available for medical assistance. Sports meets are conducted between colleges.

reviews.review_heading: Professor Jayashankar Telangana Agricultural University.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi facility in the hostel. Labs are available for practical experience. Classrooms are extraordinary, with good ventilation, light, fans, etc. Digitalized classes are taken up in the classrooms. There is a central library in the university to study different aspects of agriculture. Sometimes, water may not come in the hostels. A playing ground is there, and sports are also encouraged. Canteen facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Average placements, infrastructure okay, facilities average, faculty excellent.
reviews.review_text: Labs available and classrooms are good, and library is available. Facilities are average. Canteen is available. Mess food is average. Sports available, and all types of games are available in the sports complex. The food quality in the mess was below average. Monthly mess bill is more than the food quality.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good placement and it was really good for infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities at the College of Agricultural Engineering Sanga Reddy are quite good. They have facilities in every department including biochemistry entomology pathology horticulture extension agricultural engineering economics, agronomy, and the statistics department. They also have food available in the mess and the canteen, and they have sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Professor Jayashankar Telangana Agricultural University.
reviews.review_text: Buildings are good enough to study, but in some classrooms, there is no proper ventilation. But in the second year, there are good facilities of digital classes, fans, ventilation, speakers, seminar hall. There is a central library where you can utilize your time in reading books. If you want to take any book home, you would be provided with a library card, and we should apply for it in the library. Hostel buildings are okay, but in some washrooms, tap water may not come. The mess is reasonable—...

reviews.review_heading: Study in PJTSAU and build your career.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college hostel, classrooms, as well as various departments, is good, but they are of old architectural design. The quality of facilities in my hostel is average and the food is very hygienic and well prepared. There are various facilities for health, such as a primary health centre, available in my college. There is also a sports club that conducts various intercollegiate tournaments in my college.

reviews.review_heading: College of agriculture: produces future agriculturists.
reviews.review_text:
Our college also provides a digital library and better connectivity. The infrastructure of the college is good but the architectural design is old.
The hostel is very well organized, and the food provided is of good quality and hygiene in the mess and canteen.
Our college also has a primary health centre and many sports and games at both district and state levels.

reviews.review_heading: The  experience: A blend of knowledge and growth.
reviews.review_text: The labs are in good condition but the equipment is not modern. The library and classrooms are well equipped with digital technology. The hostels are average but not bad. The food is excellent and they maintain hygienic conditions. I would rate this university 4 out of 5.

reviews.review_heading: The Associate Dean is strict.
reviews.review_text: Smart board facilities were offered to us with Wi-Fi and computer labs. Quality of the food in the boys hostel was very good. Extra curricular activities were also present in the campus and a sports complex is also provided for the students to enjoy extra curricular activities.

reviews.review_heading: My college review of 2022.
reviews.review_text: The medical facilities are good. The food in the hostel is worst and has insects. We pay 23000 per year but the facilities are not properly available. Even though we complain, they don’t respond. The sports complex present in our college is more than enough and we have trainers for each and every sport.

reviews.review_heading: College of Agriculture—a dream college for agricultural graduation in Telangana.
reviews.review_text: Our university classrooms are completely digitalized, and the ambiance of the university is very good. The university boasts one of the largest libraries in the state, equipped with high-speed internet and accessible to all college students. The rooms in the hostel are good, and the mess is also considerably smaller. The hostel feels very affordable compared to other PG hostels. The university has a public health center that is free for the students of the college. Additionally, the university f...

college_info.college_name: PJTSAU

data.description: Yes, very well furnished yet reasonable hostel facilities are provided to the students.The students joining the colleges of the University mostly opt to stay in the hostels as most of the students are from rural background. All the hostels are provided with good boarding and lodging facilities. For overseas students, International Hostels with necessary amenities are provided. The girls and boys are housed separately in different hostels in each campus.

paragraphs: The total tuition fee for Professor Jayashankar Telangana State Agricultural University BTech ranges between INR 38,800 and INR 40,000. This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Candidates need to pay the course fee at the time of admission to confirm their seat in the university. Besides, aspirants also need to pay an application fee to register for BTech programme in the start.
Professor Jayashankar Telangana State Agricultural University provides refund only in the below conditions:

PJTSAU offers BSc course with two specialisation Agriculture and Community Science. Students graduation from either of the course have promising career. However, the prospect job profiles and respective payouts may differ depending on the subject. Students graduation with BSc Agriculture course can expect positions such as Agricultural Officer, Agricultural Analyst, Plant Breeder, and Seed Technologist.

After completing BSc in Community Science from PJTSAU, students can apply for job profiles such as Nutritionist, Dietician, Research Assistant, Educator, Microbiologist and more. Moreover, prospect career choices and expected salary also depends on students’ individual skill set and competency. For each student the salary may differ with difference in the level of skills and knowledge. Tabulated below are few career options and respective industry based average payouts for BSc graduates:

The PJTSAU BSc fees is INR 45,550 per annum for course duration of four years as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is, however, subject to changes and hence, is indicative. This fee amount is a composition of various components such as refundable deposits, hotel deposit, tuition fee and more. Tabulated below is the detailed fee structure of PJTSAU BSc courses:

Majority opted in India
Organized & proactive placement process
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, Adhiyamaan College of Engineering offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time and Part Time courses, from streams like Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. College offers B.E. / B.Tech and B.Arch courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. The Adhiyamaan College of Engineering course fee ranges between INR 35,000 to 2,60,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Courses offerred by Adhiyamaan College of Engineering are approved by eminent Government bodies like AICTE. The combined seats available for courses offered at Adhiyamaan College of Engineering goes up to 1485.
faqs.question: How many seats are available for various courses offered at Adhiyamaan College of Engineering?

reviews_list.review_title: Adhiyamaan College of Engineering is really good engineering college.

review_content.Placements: Adhiyamaan College of Engineering was the best placement college. 95% of students got placed in reputed companies in 2021. The highest salary package was 12 LPA. The lowest salary package was 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies like TCS, Infosys, Zoho, Accenture, Wipro, Tech Mahindra, and IBM these companies visited this college for recruitment.
review_content.Infrastructure: Adhiyamaan College of Engineering had one of the best infrastructures. More than 15 courses and multiple classrooms were available at this college. Hi-tech laboratories and well-stocked library were also there at this college. This college hostel facilities were very good. Hostel and canteen food tastes were very good. Multiple sports grounds and coaching staffs facilities were available at this college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Chemical Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Best college in Krishnagiri. It is located near Bangalore so easily we can find many opportunities.

review_content.Placements: In my batch, the strength was 120 members and 50 members got placed. The average salary ranges from 3 LPA to 5 LPA. Recruiting companies were Luminous, Tata, Delta, and Ashok Leyland. Around 30 to 40 members got internships in bio company and in a global company. Top roles may vary from each other but I don't know exactly.
review_content.Infrastructure: All types of labs were available with fully modernized equipment. Wi-Fi facility was not there but available only for computer labs. Library was the biggest on campus and also very spacious to read. I was a day scholar so I didn't know more about the hostel. But some of my hostel friends said that the food was moderate in taste wise but the quality was very good. I did not explore more sports and games. Our college conducted many district-level and division-level events.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence AndData Science - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: The college has good infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: Adhiyamaan College of Engineering provides dedicated career services to assist with resume building, interview preparation, and career counseling. On-campus recruitment: whether companies regularly visit the campus for recruitment. Big tech firms like IBM, and Infosys.
review_content.Infrastructure: Adhiyamaan College had 3 hostels. For girls Bhavani hostel. In a hostel regular maintenance is important for a comfortable living experience. The hostel has a dedicated study space. The hostel is equipped with fire safety measures such as fire extinguishers, smoke detectors, etc.

faqs.answer: Adhiyamaan College of Engineering is a reputed institute for MCA, B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, B.Arch, M.E./M.Tech. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in IT & Software, Engineering, Business & Management Studies, Architecture & Planning. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Adhiyamaan College of Engineering has a review rating of 3.7 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 4.2 on campuslife, 3 on placements, 3.4 on faculty and 4 on Infrastructure.
faqs.question: Q: Can Adhiyamaan College of Engineering be considered a good college?

faqs.answer: Adhiyamaan College of Engineering has courses such as MCA, B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, B.Arch, M.E./M.Tech which are primarily in the stream of IT & Software, Engineering, Business & Management Studies, Architecture & Planning. Adhiyamaan College of Engineering has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Aeronautical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Biotechnology Engineering, Chemical Engineering, Information Technology, Mechanical Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, Instrumentation Technology, M.E./M.Tech specializations in Communications Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Power Engineering, Civil Engineering, VLSI Design.
faqs.question: Q: What courses are available at Adhiyamaan College of Engineering?

faqs.answer: Adhiyamaan College of Engineering has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityMCACandidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.B.E. / B.TechCandidate must have completed Diploma in relevant branch of Engineering/ Technology securing minimum 55% marks (50% for the backward class including backward class Muslim, 45% for MBC and DNC and a mere pass in the qualifying examination for SC/ SCA/ ST). Or Candidate must have completed B.Sc. with Mathematics as subjects securing minimum 55% marks (50% for the backward class including backward class Muslim, 45% for MBC & DNC and a mere pass in the qualifying examination for SC/ SCA/ ST).MBA/PGDMCandidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.B.ArchCandidate who have passed 10+3 Diploma Examination with Mathematics as compulsory subject with at least 50% marks in aggregate from a recognised Institute/ University can also apply. Candidates appearing for 10+3 Diploma with Mathematics in the current year may also provisionally appear for NATA.M.E./M.TechCandidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.

individual_reviews.title: Neither satisfied nor dissatisfied.

content.Placements: This is one of the best colleges in providing placements. This is useful in students' careers as they are keenly focusing on each and every child to be placed. They are also conducting placement training, which is essential for students.
content.Infrastructure: The library in college and a lot of other buildings are generally very good with their infrastructure, neat and clean. Whereas the hostel is not that good, it should be changed. The rooms can be better, and for the price of hostel fees, food can be even more tasty.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Around 85–95% of students were successfully placed during the campus placement drive.

content.Placements: Around 85–95% of students are successfully placed during the campus placement drive. The highest package is 25 LPA, offered by international recruiters or top product companies. The lowest package is 3.5 LPA, and the average package ranges from 6.5 to 8 LPA. Around 80–90% of students secured internships in various companies.
content.Infrastructure: A High-speed Wi-Fi facility is available throughout the campus and inside the department buildings. Students can access online resources, attend webinars, and collaborate easily. Labs are well-equipped and updated, specific to the course e.g., Computer Labs, Electronics Labs, Simulation Labs, etc. Most labs have modern hardware and licensed software required for practical learning.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Adhiyamaan College of Engineering is really good engineering college.

content.Placements: Adhiyamaan College of Engineering was the best placement college. 95% of students got placed in reputed companies in 2021. The highest salary package was 12 LPA. The lowest salary package was 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies like TCS, Infosys, Zoho, Accenture, Wipro, Tech Mahindra, and IBM these companies visited this college for recruitment.
content.Infrastructure: Adhiyamaan College of Engineering had one of the best infrastructures. More than 15 courses and multiple classrooms were available at this college. Hi-tech laboratories and well-stocked library were also there at this college. This college hostel facilities were very good. Hostel and canteen food tastes were very good. Multiple sports grounds and coaching staffs facilities were available at this college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Chemical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Best college in Krishnagiri. It is located near Bangalore so easily we can find many opportunities.

content.Placements: In my batch, the strength was 120 members and 50 members got placed. The average salary ranges from 3 LPA to 5 LPA. Recruiting companies were Luminous, Tata, Delta, and Ashok Leyland. Around 30 to 40 members got internships in bio company and in a global company. Top roles may vary from each other but I don't know exactly.
content.Infrastructure: All types of labs were available with fully modernized equipment. Wi-Fi facility was not there but available only for computer labs. Library was the biggest on campus and also very spacious to read. I was a day scholar so I didn't know more about the hostel. But some of my hostel friends said that the food was moderate in taste wise but the quality was very good. I did not explore more sports and games. Our college conducted many district-level and division-level events.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence AndData Science - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The college has good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: Adhiyamaan College of Engineering provides dedicated career services to assist with resume building, interview preparation, and career counseling. On-campus recruitment: whether companies regularly visit the campus for recruitment. Big tech firms like IBM, and Infosys.
content.Infrastructure: Adhiyamaan College had 3 hostels. For girls Bhavani hostel. In a hostel regular maintenance is important for a comfortable living experience. The hostel has a dedicated study space. The hostel is equipped with fire safety measures such as fire extinguishers, smoke detectors, etc.

reviews.review_text: Very good infrastructure just mess food can be better. Adhiyamaan College of Engineering (ACE), established in 1987, is an autonomous institution located in Hosur, Tamil Nadu. reviews.review_heading: Life at Adhiyamaan College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. Hostel facility is also available with only South Indian food, which is not set for North Indian students. I prefer students not to choose the hostel. The hostel fee is also too high. The library has a separate building, and they also provide GATE papers and other commutative exam papers.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for sports and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure, you can access everything within the campus, good security, a good hostel with attached restrooms and space, you have a high-tech gym, there is usable food also not bad compared to other colleges, and fee is good for hostel facilities .

reviews.review_heading: Adhiyamaan College of Engineering review.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure at this college is good, but it can be difficult to navigate the campus due to the large number of students. The hostels are clean and well-maintained, and students are assigned rooms based on their fee structure.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely okay with my college,because of the infrastructure and environment
reviews.review_text: Wifi was not good, we can't able to access it easily. Classrooms are little bit okay. Library is good. Hostel quality is not good. The food provided by the hostel is worst. Canteen infrastructure is nice. Games like cricket, hockey are there and we get good practice.

reviews.review_heading: Adhiyamaan College of Engineering review
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure in our college is very good, which includes library, classroom with projector, etc. Food is average but the room will be clean. Canteen is so good and affordable. The overall facilities provided here are good. Recently they opened the Digital library that is very useful for many students.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure in my college.
reviews.review_text: In my college, there is no Wi-Fi facility, and it was the worst and worth the money for counseling students only, not for management students. Anyone going to the lab means it was a good and best new system, and there is no Wi-Fi in the lab system. No fans in the library have a digital system.

reviews.review_heading: Pleasant environment, good infrastructure, excellent coaching. Enjoyable college life.
reviews.review_text: A very good infrastructure along with many good facilities are provided by the college. Wi-Fi, smart boards, laboratory, projectors and classrooms facilities are also too good. The hostel management is also good and they provide good quality food. Our college is next to a multi specialty hospital and they provide 24/7 free medical facilities to our students.

reviews.review_heading: It has a very nice infrastructure and surroundings.
reviews.review_text: The college has a nice infrastructure available for our course having Wi-Fi facilities in our classrooms. They have very good standard in our hostel, they provide good quality food for the students.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good for the education of the students.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good and the climate is excellent. There are many courses available in Adhiyamaan college of engineering. The hostel facilities are good. They conduct many cultural events, the hostel fest is excellent.

reviews_list.review_title: The college is quite average. The college is situated in a remote area of Pune, about 3-4 km from Lo

review_content.Placements: College claims that 70-80% of students were placed in MMIT On Campus, but most of them are Off Campus placed on their own efforts. The highest package of MMIT is 10-12 LPA, and the lowest is 2-3 LPA, with the average being 5-6 LPA depending on your efforts. Companies like Wipro, Tech Mahindra, IndiGo, and TCS select students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities at MMIT are quite average. The college infrastructure is quite good, but if students want to use Wi-Fi in college, it’s difficult because Ethernet is installed all over the college. review_summary.college_name: MMIT Pune Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: A college for computer engineering course and has value for money.

content.Placements: Multiple placement opportunities are given to students at our college. College has a highly active placements cell that organizes placement drives. The average package is offered between 4 LPA-6 LPA to students of our course. Students got placed in software development, web development, app development, etc., fields. Students also got internship opportunities in the computer engineering course.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has good infrastructure for computer engineering course. The quality of facilities is good. Labs and library are available for students. Wi-Fi facility is available on entire college campus. Hostel facilities are available for students. Multiple sports facilities are also available for students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Robotics and Artificial Intelligence - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It has good infrastructure, average placements, and good faculty members.

content.Placements: We are the first batch of robotics and artificial intelligence. The robotics and artificial intelligence branch is new for this college the faculty members are good and they give the right information about the things where you are stuck. The average salary package offered ranges from 3-4 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The college won the award for the green campus of SPPU. Other infrastructure like classrooms and labs for computer, civil, mechanical, etc., are well-equipped. All the labs and departments have their separate Wi-Fi connection. There is a playground for sports.

individual_reviews.course: B.E in Mechatronics Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The college is quite average. The college is situated in a remote area of Pune, about 3-4 km from Lo

content.Placements: College claims that 70-80% of students were placed in MMIT On Campus, but most of them are Off Campus placed on their own efforts. The highest package of MMIT is 10-12 LPA, and the lowest is 2-3 LPA, with the average being 5-6 LPA depending on your efforts. Companies like Wipro, Tech Mahindra, IndiGo, and TCS select students.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities at MMIT are quite average. The college infrastructure is quite good, but if students want to use Wi-Fi in college, it’s difficult because Ethernet is installed all over the college. The worst thing is Wi-Fi is not available even in the library or reading room. The hostel is good, but the condition of the grounds is so bad. The grass on the ground grows 5-10 meters long without continuous cleaning.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The teachers are good but the placements are average.

content.Placements: Last year, more than 50 students were placed. The highest package offered was around 12 LPA and average was about 5.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Amadocs, Tata consultant service, Wirpo, and Jio visited our campus. Roles offered were that of developers, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The faculty is good and their teaching is excellent. The classrooms are well maintained and also contain projectors. The labs are continuing i7 processors with 110 bandwidth of Wi-Fi. The hostel mess is not good and the food quality is average and sometimes it is unhygienic.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am not at all satisfied by placements, faculty, campus and even Hostel because it's expensive.

content.Placements: In this college, 70 to 80 percent of students are placed every year. The highest package this year was around 7.5 LPA, the lowest package of 3.5 LPA, and an average package of 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies are mainly TCS, Tata Motors, Selenium, etc. Roles offered in this course are mainly product tester, software development, web development, software tester, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are equipped with visual projectors which do not work properly most of the time, and Wi-Fi connectivity which does not work well either. Labs are well-equipped with many equipment like computers with the latest specifications, projectors, printers, etc. The library is also good, but it has very limited space to sit for students. The hostel is average too. It has water purifiers, solar theater, etc. But we do not get hot water most of the time. And there is nothing to write about the hostel. The mess is the worst part of this college. We do not get anything good to eat most of the time. Students have their lunch and dinner outside the college because they do not serve any good food.

admission_process.title: MMIT Pune Admission Process

paragraphs: MMIT Pune admission 2024to BE and ME is open. The college is formally known asMarathwada Mitramandal's Institute of Technology. Admission is merit and entrance-based for UG and PG courses. The college offers one course at UG and one course at PG level such asB.E. and M.E. Interested applicants are required to fill out the eligibility criteria. After, candidates fill out the eligibility criteria the college releases the cutoff list.Marathwada Mitramandal's Institute of Technologyoffers an online mode of application. Applicants seeking admission to any courses can apply by visiting the college website. Check below to know more details aboutMarathwada Mitramandal's Institute of Technology admission 2024along with course eligibility and selection criteria:

MMIT Pune admissionis entrance-based for B.E. courses. Further admission to M.E, is merit-based. To be eligible for admission, applicants are required to fill out the eligible and selection criteria for their desired courses. After, filling out the eligibility and selection criteria candidates are required to apply online for admission. To check other admission-related details aboutMMIT Pune courseseligibility along with selection criteria, check out the table below:
Eligibility
Selection Criteria
Class 12 or equivalent from a recognised board
Graduation degree with 55% aggregate
Merit-Based
Download:MMIT Pune Brochure
MMIT Pune admission is a multi-step process. Candidates looking for admission to UG and PG courses at the college must check out the detailedMMIT Pune admission process 2024:
Step 1: Visit MMIT Pune Website
Candidates looking for admission to any UG and PG at MMIT Pune must fill out the application form online by visiting the college's official website.
Step 2: Selection Round

According to the selection criteria, the candidates must have passed Class 12 for admission to B.E., and a graduation degree with 55% for admission to Further, to be eligible for BTech candidates need to appear in the accepted entrance exam such as CET/JEE Main. The college releases the Cutoff list based on their score in the entrance exam and merits.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation
Candidates who get shortlisted in the selection round and have their names on the Cutoff list are required to make a fee payment within the given deadline to secure their seats.

faqs.question: Is it easy to get admission to Marathwada Mitramandal Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: Marathwada Mitramandal Institute of Technology admission is merit and entrance-based. The college accepts JEE Main and MH CET entrance exams for admission to Further, for M.E. college offers merit-based admission. faqs.question: What is the admission process at Marathwada Mitramandal Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: To apply for admission to Marathwada Mitramandal Institute of Technology, candidates must follow these steps:Step 1: Online ApplicationCandidates are required to visit the official website of the college and fill out the online application form. Candidates will need to provide complete details, including their name, email ID, phone number, and other personal information.Step 2: Selection RoundsAdmission to B.E. is based on entrance exam scores, while for M.E. admission is merit-based. Candidates who qualify for the entrance exam will be shortlisted for the next round.Step 3: Admission ConfirmationAfter the selection rounds, candidates must visit the college campus for document verification and pay the application fee. Finally, selected candidates must pay the course fee to confirm their admission.

description: Marathwada Mitramandal's Institute of Technology cutoff 2025 is finally out for aspirants seeking admission to the BTech and Integrated BTech courses. The JoSAA Round 1 seat allotment result 2025 has been released as opening and closing ranks across different categories belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates can scroll down to this page to view the Marathwada Mitramandal's Institute of Technology JEE Main cutoff 2025 for various specialisations and categories. A few more updates are below:
NTA has released the JEE Main Result 2024 for Session 2. Candidates can download their scorecard from the NTA website jeemain.nta.ac.in.
The Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA) will start the registration for JEE Main Counselling 2024 on June 10. A total of 6 rounds of JEE Main 2024 counselling will be conducted.

Marathwada Mitramandal's Institute of Technology cutoff 2025 was released via MHT CET entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 141644 and 308258 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 141644, B.E. in Computer Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 113111.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 141644.

For the General category, the Marathwada Mitramandal's Institute of Technology B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 66.39 and 88.96, with the most sought-after branch for admission being Computer Science, which had the highest cutoff percentile of 88.96. Marathwada Mitramandal's Institute of Technology MHT CET cutoff 2025 was released as percentiles, which means the higher the cutoff percentile, the more competitive the course is for admission and vice versa. Considering the last round cutoff data of 2025, Computer Science turned out to be the most competitive for admission, with a cutoff closing at 88.96. For the same competitive branch, the last round cutoff was 90.08 in the General category under the HS quota.

It is situated in the middle of nowhere. Classrooms are good. The library is also good. There is very poorly maintained ground beside the main building.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements in 2019. Really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: So many facilities are available in our college. Our college has the 24/7 access. Labs are well maintained. Hostel students has the access to library 24/7 in exam time. Canteen food is also well maintained. Medical facility is also offered in my college.

The natural environment on campus appears to be good with many trees. There is a huge ground. There is a lot of opportunity for students who are interested in games.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Marathwada Mitramandal's Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: Our labs have a good environment. They have Wi-Fi. They have hardware and software equipment. Wi-Fi is available on campus. The campus and hostel are clean. environment Our campus is surrounded by many trees and plants.

reviews.review_heading: A brief review about MMIT.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good. Wi-Fi is available all the time. PCs are very good and have all the latest specifications. Canteen is very good and serves many types of food for very reasonable price. Classrooms in the computer department have projectors.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good with nice faculty and placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. Wi-Fi is available for 24*7 hours. We can connect to the Wi-Fi at any time. The labs and classrooms are well maintained. The boys’ hostel has gym facility and the mess is also good. The canteen area is also well maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Pretty satisfying placements in year 2021.
reviews.review_text: The hostel provides you with all the necessary facilities, including the separate beds, cupboards, study table, bucket, etc. There is abundance of water and other resources. The Wi-Fi is available 24/7. They have a reading room with Wi-Fi connectivity. The college has a fully fledged and updated library with books of all types. The quality of food available in the canteen and mess is very good. Right away from Indian, south Indian to dishes, you get everything. They not only make you study the s...

reviews.review_heading: UNDERRATED College with a hectic schedule.
reviews.review_text: It was average before the beginning of this academic year but now with the improvements made The college has a good infrastructure for computer engineering Labs, the Wi-Fi is however not so good in the campus it doesn't cover the whole campus but is acceptable, Quality of food in the canteen is great And in the recent times variety of options are made available, I felt the college is a bit underrated for its facilities.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for computer engineering.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was good with all the required facilities. The college hostel was top-notch, with a quality mess and canteen. The warden of the hostel handles students' issues silently and with great ease. They know how to run a hostel. Surroundings were beautiful as the college is in the village area.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members and infrastructure are good, but placements and mess are not good.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms have projectors, and the entire campus has Wi-Fi, including hostels. Labs are huge. The library is huge and also has a study hall. The food is not good. They provide rice and roti that are not of good quality. The canteen is great, but the mess is not good. Sports facilities are available. Medical facilities are also available.

highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the HPTU - Himachal Pradesh Technical University:

college_info.intro: Himachal Pradesh Technical University offers UG, PG, and diploma courses in the streams of Engineering and Hospitality & Travel, among others. The popular programmes at HPTU include M.Sc., MCA, and MBA/ PGDM.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: HPTU - Himachal Pradesh Technical University offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and B.Arch. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and M.Sc. HPTU - Himachal Pradesh Technical University courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for HPTU - Himachal Pradesh Technical University courses stands around INR 4,000 to 4,63,200.

admission_overview.college_name: HPTU Hamirpur Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

admission_overview.title: Himachal Pradesh Technical University Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: HPTU - Himachal Pradesh Technical University admissions are both merit and entrance-based. At the UG level, Himachal Pradesh Technical University offers BTech, BPharm, BSc, BBA, BCA and BArch programmes. Candidates seeking admission to any of these programmes are evaluated based on academic merit and course-specific entrance exam scores. The duration of these courses varies from course to course. Some of the UG programmes are also offered in lateral entry mode. The first 50 per cent of seats are filled through the students' scores in JEE Main, and the remaining 50 per cent of seats are selected based on the merit of HPCET. At the postgraduate level, the University offers several courses under its various faculties, such as Engineering, Management, Science, etc. Admission to all the courses offered under any faculty is entrance-based.

eligibility_selection.title: Himachal Pradesh Technical University Eligibility & Selection 2025
eligibility_selection.description: Himachal Pradesh Technical University admission 2025 is open. The university offers an online application process for all courses. HPTU offers BTech, BPharm, BSc, MSc, MCA and MBA at the UG and PG levels. Admission to BTech is based on HPCET. Check the below table for Himachal Pradesh Technical University course eligibility & selection criteria in the following table: Course

courses_table.eligibility: Class 12 from a recognised board with atleast 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for reserved category candidates) with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects along with one of the Chemistry/ Biotechnology/ Biology/ Technical Vocational subjects
Bachelor‘s degree from a recognised university, securing at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for reserved category candidates)

faqs.answer: You can get direct admission in merit-based courses at Himachal Pradesh Technical University with 60% in Class 12. For BTech and other entrance-based programs, you also need JEE Main or HPCET scores. Reserved category students have relaxed criteria. Always check the latest cut-off marks.
faqs.question: Will I get a direct admission in Himachal Pradesh Technical University with 60% in Class 12?

admission_process.title: HPTU - Himachal Pradesh Technical University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: HPTU - Himachal Pradesh Technical University admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.HPTU - Himachal Pradesh Technical Universityoffers courses at UG and PG levels. Some of the courses include B.Sc., BHMCT, M.A. and PG Diploma. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 1,60,000 - 4,63,200. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 3 years - 4 years. PG courses are offered for 1 year - 2 years.

faqs.question: What are the specialisations offered in BTech at HPTU?
faqs.answer: HPTU provides BTech in 9 specialisations viz; Mechanical, IT, CSE, Electronics, and Textile Engineering.The programs are technical education that is relevant to the industry.Students acquire practical knowledge together with the theory.The programs last four years.

faqs.question: How is admission granted to BTech courses at HPTU?
faqs.answer: Admission to HPTU BTech programs is based on scores in JEE Main or HPCET. Candidates can apply with either of the exam results. Selection is strictly merit-based, considering entrance test performance. Higher scores increase the chances of getting preferred specialisation.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for HPTU BTech admission 2025?
faqs.answer: To qualify in HPTU BTech, applicants should score 45 percent in Class 12 containing physics and mathematics.40 percent aggregate is required by reserved category students.The third subject can be Chemistry, Biology, Biotechnology or Technical Vocational.To apply, it is required that these criteria should be met.

Every food is available at the college mess and canteen. Medical facilities are also very good. Sports and games are also available for students.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by T. R. Abhilashi Memorial Institute of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 27 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I think it’s pretty nice and has a good environment.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is pretty good. Classrooms are spacious. Teachers are not very helpful. The environment is pretty nice, and the playgrounds are also very spacious. The hostel is very interesting, and the admin block of the college is also very nice. I think the teaching faculty does not support students as well, and the parking facility of the college is also very good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Government College, DharamshalaReviewed on 4 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: College life at GDC Dharmashala.
reviews.review_text: All facilities and infrastructure are available at my department, like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, etc. The quality of the facilities in my hostel is good. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen, Medical facilities, sports, and games are good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Government College, DharamshalaReviewed on 16 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is the best college that I have found in Dharamshala.
reviews.review_text: All facilities like Wi-Fi, learning, playgrounds, etc., are available. Classrooms and washrooms are neat and clean. The library is also very good and nice. I did not experience hostel facilities. My friend who stays in the hostel gave five-star ratings to all hostel facilities, like rooms are very clean and the food is healthy. The college canteen provides us with hygienic food. Medical facilities are available in our college. In emergency cases, processors help us to get rid of them. Sports and...

reviews.review_heading: Average college life not like a place where you can enjoy.
reviews.review_text: College buildings are good and well-designed, having lifts. Wi-Fi facility in labs and classrooms, a good library is available where almost every book related to course is available. Grounds are under construction and have indoor games like table tennis, etc. Hostels are not available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Himalayan Group of Professional Institutions, SirmourReviewed on 5 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Helpful review you will find about this college.
reviews.review_text: This is a really beautiful institute, and with a really beautiful campus, it is worth the fee we pay. There are separate buildings for each course, and the labs are fully equipped. They have every sort of facility. Classrooms are big enough but AC is not provided in every room. The library is big and beautiful too. There is Wi-Fi on every floor but not working most of the time. The hostel is good, decent facilities are provided but few students apply for the hostel.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Himalayan Group of Professional Institutions, SirmourReviewed on 5 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Nice infrastructure and teaching staff.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are nice, neat, and clean. College is situated in a nice area. There are many labs, classrooms, and library at the college. Canteen food is also awesome. Medical facilities are also available. Sports are also provided to students, and hostel rooms are also good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by L.R. Group of InstitutesReviewed on 18 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Best college to take admission.
reviews.review_text: In hostel, there are facilities like Wi-Fi, fan, open and spacious rooms with neat and clean environment. Food is good. Hostel faculty is also very cooperative and of good nature. Hostel is neat and clean. Environment is also very good and awesome with facilities of gym, library, Wi-Fi, etc.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by S.V.S.D. CollegeReviewed on 7 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is an average college with good staff.
reviews.review_text: A small campus self self-sufficient to conduct classes and small-scale events. There is no hostel facility for far-away students. Canteens are quite old-fashioned, with only 2 to 3 dishes. Moreover, good classrooms with proper cleaning should be provided. Moreover, no good and sanitized washrooms are available on the college campus.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Vaishno College of EngineeringReviewed on 10 Apr 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Our college is good at providing education.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for our course/department include labs, classrooms, a library, a seminar hall, etc. The quality of facilities in our hostel is good. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is also good. Sports and games are available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Government College, DharamshalaReviewed on 5 Apr 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is the most beautiful college in the world.
reviews.review_text: Dharmshala College is a very big college. In this college Wi-Fi is available, and the library is very big and beautiful. The classrooms are almost smart classrooms. Each department has its own washrooms. The computer labs are very clean and hygienic.
